name: Haylee Kurka
subject: ATTENTION PATRIOTS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kurka for Governor PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687
body:
Volunteer meeting this coming Saturday!

| Hi Peter, This Saturday at 9am we will be having a *Meet & Greet* volunteer meeting and then dispersing to knock on doors in 2 locations: Wasilla and Soldotna! We hope you will join us as we spread our message of Liberty and Hope to the great people of Alaska! *Christopher and I will be present at the Wasilla HQ and addressing the volunteers in Soldotna via Zoom.___**Wasilla**_**-** Kurka / Hueper HQ 190 E Paulson Ave. Wasilla, AK 99654 _**Soldotna**_ \- Ammo Can Coffee 35559 Kenai Spur Highway Soldotna, AK 99669 See you Saturday! Haylee Kurka PS. We are actively raising a LITTLE money from A LOT of grassroots donors from across Alaska to get our message out. For as little as $0.83 cents a day you can further our efforts to MAKE ALASKA FREE ! Prayerfully consider becoming a grassroots donor and donating $25 a month! To donate click the link > [https://www.chriskurka.com/donate](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzW-zEK-3Z9mAZxjdCeR3iqLWUT4kcfhLZxsXf_4rl-GR&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_volunteer_meeting&n=1) [www.ChrisKurka.com](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzZYHrXjSSqDZFm4adezdWWY&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_volunteer_meeting&n=2) Paid for by Kurka for Governor PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687.

name: Your Democratic Nominee for US Senate
subject: Wow, I want to do this again!
body:
Wow, We Did it and we will keep making history while flipping Arkansas to Blue!
| | | [](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABioUG3Sez9r_NFbfVpGD31YZtL7UFtqC4r-Ta2qFEfyLcdVYRdYxPB2GVEtZHVyHlVFj8AGcYCL4X6RXwXLbOJ36HsGcZdCG8gy3Wc5a9E8kiAEQdJPgGElCgZ5U9gcx6FlRFzZe69xvwFBmI15n77_-6aB3iv7apJGm-iWDub8Is4zv6aX_ca_0Y7lYhCfRt-z1_liX2dwUP0GFOYLV1jnWTjrHAds1UO7qD3RSAkS0RhhM90NrDgckzhxAswK60SeULfhmoQ3CDT-dqWTqXcrOkIyPUMKRzCAJUxXN3fv4JyRlnap6lOnyN1NRAl2SYcHHL0BQ9evPsnoIA72D1r4tu8s4LfsnQBETPDBas22z7NG80Ah_nlzSTH-YPlCQIzlTT8mhOO17DDpacxb2cElLKzbQ==)

| Hi friend! **WE DID IT!!** We made history in the primary when I became the first black female Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Arkansas and we are going to make history again when we win the general election this November! At this very moment we are gearing up to visit each county in the State of Arkansas. Our 75-county tour will kick off on June 17th. And, to lead with hope, our first stop will be in Hope, Arkansas. Please join us that day from 5:00PM to 7:00PM at Northside Park to hear our plans for Arkansas and learn more about our campaign. I look forward to meeting you! Thank you for being a part of this historic journey with me. I've poured my heart and soul into every aspect of this campaign and it means so much to have your support. We have come far, and we have far to go. With your continued support, I know we will get there.
---
| | Join the fight!

name: Pat Fallon
subject: what is Joe Biden talking about?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

What is Joe Biden even talking about in this Tweet? Honestly,
what is he ever talking about? Biden released his
"plan" for inflation this week, and as usual, it's a
bunch of nonsense.

I don't have enough space in this email to go over it all, but
let's focus on the second bullet point, "lower everyday
costs for Americans."

That's right, folks...Joe Biden's genius "plan" to
tackle inflation is... "end inflation." What a joke.

If that's what constitutes a plan these days, well then I've
also got a plan to become a billionaire. Step 1: become a
billionaire. Does Biden really think the American people are
stupid enough to fall for this stuff?

I'm fighting against incompetent Democrats and a Radical Left
that believes your gas is too cheap, inflation doesn't matter,
borders should be open, and that you're not taxed enough.

We absolutely must win this race and reclaim a Republican
Majority in Congress. The woke Dems are going to spend tens of
millions of dollars in an attempt to flip Texas blue, and we must
stop them!

Unlike the Radical Left, I don't cozy up to special interest
donors.

I rely on grassroots conservatives like you. Will you
contribute $25, $50, or another amount today?

Thank you for your generous support and most importantly, your
vote. It's an honor to know that you've got my back in this
fight.

Pat Fallon

Conservative Congressman TX-04

CONTRIBUTE $10

CONTRIBUTE $25

CONTRIBUTE $100

CONTRIBUTE OTHER

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Biden’s First 500 Days
body:
No wonder Biden‘s approval numbers are so low...
No wonder Biden's approval numbers are so low... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Biden's First 500 Days](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden has now been President for more than 500 days. How's it going? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Leftists are Coming!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Every 10 years we do a census, and congressional districts are redrawn as a result thereof. Because ours got more Democratic, The Left intends to spend millions of dollars trying to take it. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-k/)

Over the weekend, Joe Biden reached out to Taiwan. With his other hand, he slapped them in the face. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [An Orwellian Idea](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiudhdk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Biden administration is contemplating setting up a Misinformation Governance Board, which sounds a whole lot like an Orwellian Ministry of Truth (from 1984.) God help us! You can read about it in this week's blog. Friend -- I've got two quick notes to share, and then I've got to get back to hearing prep: First, after 11 months and more than 1,000 interviews, the House committee investigating the January 6th attack on the U.S. Capitol by a pro-Trump mob is ready to share what we know. We will do that in public hearings, broadcast across the country on major networks, throughout this month. **The first will be TOMORROW, Thursday, June 9th at 8pm ET / 7pm CT / 6pm MT / 5pm PT.** I hope you will make the time to watch -- it should be Must-See-TV for every American! Country First will be distributing a digest within 24 hours of every hearing to help consolidate the facts and coverage for you in one place. Please keep an eye out for it in your inbox. Second, and on a much lighter note, Father's Day is coming up, and we've got some great deals for the dads in your life, including a discounted bundle. Hi Derek — it’s
Ashley Floyd, Stacey Abrams’ Finance Director.

I’ll get right to the point: we’re running behind on our fundraising goals
for June.

campaign for governor and implementing her vision for One Georgia.

beat us this November — and that’s on top of the more than $3 million

Georgia history.

Derek, our

Every grassroots donation this campaign receives means we have more

disinformation and do everything else we need to make sure Stacey Abrams
is the next Governor of Georgia.

real difference.

Thank you,

Ashley Floyd

Every grassroots donation this campaign receives means we have more resources to engage voters, push back against Republican attacks and disinformation and do everything else we need to make sure Stacey Abrams is the next Governor of Georgia. [ ]So Derek, please, can you chip in right now to put us back on track for the month? This is a grassroots campaign, so anything you can give today will make a real difference. Thank you, Ashley Floyd Finance Director, Abrams for Governor +---------------------------------+ | PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR | +---------------------------------+ Abrams for Governor 931 Monroe Dr NE Ste A102 #363 Atlanta, GA 30308 United States Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

subject: 20 DAYS TO GO! THIS IS NOT A TEST!!
body:
Gender-fluid bathrooms coming to a school near you...

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c46908a639-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_09_03_06&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c46908a639-584862049

** Courtesy of The Biden Administration:
------------------------------------------------------------

** No Boys in the Girls Bathroom? No Free Lunch.
------------------------------------------------------------

“Under this new demand, establishments that accept any federal food funding, including food stamps, must also allow males who claim to be female to access female private spaces, such as showers, bathrooms, and sleeping areas. Such organizations must also follow protocols such as requiring staff to use inaccurate pronouns to describe transgender people and allowing male staff to dress as women while on the job.”

“It seems to be playing politics with feeding poor kids, which is really unfortunate,” John Elcesser, executive director of the Indiana Non-Public Education Association, said via phone amid weeks of attempting to sort out these new demands with government officials on behalf of private schools in his state. “Because if a school feels like they cannot participate because it’s in conflict with their mission or values, if a religious exemption is not granted, you’re taking away a program that’s feeding low-income kids.”

“Religious institutions, however, qualify for a waiver exempting them from these requirements, said Alliance Defending Freedom Senior Counsel Greg Baylor in an interview Monday. According to the 1972 Title IX law, he said, religious institutions don’t have to file any paperwork to be exempt, although they can if they wish.”

“Government schools can receive no exemption. At best, parents and taxpayers can urge school districts to not comply while inevitable lawsuits over the Biden administration’s interpretation work through courts for years.”

*Reference: https://thefederalist.com/2022/05/25/biden-admin-k-12-schools-must-put-boys-in-girls-bathrooms-to-get-federal-lunch-money/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c46908a639-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_09_03_06&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c46908a639-584862049

** I will not let the children of Colorado down!
------------------------------------------------------------

As the next Governor of Colorado, I will submit a written declaration of exemption to the Secretary of Agriculture on behalf of ALL COLORADO SCHOOLS that details how this requirement violates our deeply held, sincere beliefs.

But we can't do it alone! Donate (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c46908a639-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_09_03_06&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c46908a639-584862049) or volunteer (http://lopez2022.com/volunteer-1?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c46908a639-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_09_03_06&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c46908a639-584862049) today and let's protect our children!

Sincerely,
Greg Lopez
Find Out More (https://www.lopez2022.com/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c46908a639-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_09_03_06&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c46908a639-584862049)

============================================================

We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.

Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/LU5tWv-1iSOt2GQrqxY29Q) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/pJXrIRyxhUuhqwWVNmPvmg)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/sQIJIhrnEZKk82HAp0KIag)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher — nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country — along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots — believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/E0_ahWTG9Y8RrEa8Tab9Ug) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone — bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas — paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we'll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/OOX9R8KAoXXXxxmyYNKjZg) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/4K589TImWEGFQgHgFQA6oA)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjAtMWFjMjZiNmYwMTNjNDRmYmE2YmM3OTZmNWQyYWRhYjgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8wbW54aWd2amZyP3NyYz1UVjI4NDUwIn0/PxQTJBlSUu2U7teiWTnqcg)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action

| | Friend, Tony Evers has spent a pretty penny on his recent ad campaigns to cloak his failed policies. Over $3 Million, actually. But that's like putting lipstick on a pig. Friend -- Join the Republican National Committee, Republican Party of Wisconsin, former State Supreme Court Justice Daniel Kelly, and others for a **9-city Election Integrity Roundtable**! Learn more about the party's efforts to ensure 2022 is the year of fair, open, and honest elections in Wisconsin. There will also be an opportunity to ask questions and have a discussion on ways we can incorporate effective recommendations into our strategy in advance of the fall elections. body:

You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547145:6KFBU_ogN:m:1:3253819041:4D8E16A3B0FDB688231622460C57DC5A:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547145:6KFBU_ogN:m:1:3253819041:4D8E16A3B0FDB688231622460C57DC5A:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547145:6KFBU_ogN:m:1:3253819041:4D8E16A3B0FDB688231622460C57DC5A:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

subject: Congress needs Sarah Palin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
She's the fighter we need | I've known Sarah for many years, and I can promise you that she is the conservative fighter...
_**" Sarah Palin would make a great member of Congress."**_
_\- Newt Gingrich_

Patriot,

Sarah Palin has my full support.

I've known Sarah for many years, and I can promise you that she is the conservative fighter we need in Washington. Her toughness and directness will be a refreshing addition to the national debate, and she will always dedicate herself to solving America's biggest problems.

**I'm reaching out to ask you to join me in publicly pledging your support for Sarah Palin.** Your support is crucial to the success of her campaign and the success of the America First movement in Alaska.

**[Add your name to the list of proud patriots publicly supporting Sarah Palin for Congress in the next hour.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547374:6r4LO_oqN:m:1:3299561967:50D56EE72AFC769C03B943E9361523F3:r)**

**[ADD YOUR NAME NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547374:6r4LO_oqN:m:1:3299561967:50D56EE72AFC769C03B943E9361523F3:r)**

Sarah Palin is building a movement in Alaska, and I couldn't be more excited to be a part of it. _I want you to be a part of it, too, Patriot._

Make sure you can say that you stood with Sarah Palin from the beginning. There's only one hour left to give her your support.

**[Join me in publicly pledging your support for Sarah Palin for Congress in the next hour.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547374:6r4LO_oqN:m:1:3299561967:50D56EE72AFC769C03B943E9361523F3:r)**

body:
It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547230:Jr4wO_ocN:m:1:3317145305:08E0B47291900C5AC02E792278706303:r)
---

**I've been subpoenaed by the January 6th Committee**

Peter,

Their witch hunt is getting out of hand. Make no mistake, they're only coming after me because **I'M FIGHTING FOR YOU!** Because I won't back down and I fight for the people who elected me trusting that I would spend every waking moment in office serving our Country.

Attack me on TV, attack me in the New York Times but to question my legal integrity with a subpoena?! I'm going to need your help, Peter **[Can you chip in $10, $20, $30 or more today to help me defend myself from this vicious attack so that I can get back to doing the job I was elected to do?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547230:Jr4wO_ocN:m:1:3317145305:08E0B47291900C5AC02E792278706303:r)**

[**COME TO JIM'S DEFENSE
CHIP IN $3-> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547230:Jr4wO_ocN:m:1:3317145305:08E0B47291900C5AC02E792278706303:r)

There's no question why this is happening so close to an election . . . Midterms are in November and THE LEFT WANTS ME GONE.

Well, I've got news for them: **I won't back down without a fight.** But I need all of my supporters to rally together today so that I can show the Left that they're not just coming after me, they're coming after the American people that voted conservatives into office.

All they're trying to do is distract from the real issues at hand. Whether it be inflation, record high gas prices, or moms unable to find baby formula, they want to make sure I don't have time to do the job the American people trusted me to perform.

Let's show the Left that an attempt to slander my name will be in vain. **[Send in $5, $10, $20, $30, or whatever you can spare today to help me get past this and back to my job serving the American people.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60547230:Jr4wO_ocN:m:1:3317145305:08E0B47291900C5AC02E792278706303:r)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsc4bshf4u16jeru9j5opfdehotos474vrnf3728_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr1e9om3c30c9ie1o34c5i72cpk6hpr7c34smp7ad3hm1ib9cjieiqmbd70s6rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phhe2qr8ptnchj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo55p9lhho42clq0elpgpv442eq2k0u4vi678tvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zimpn0clipej0nmj7m5kn97mnp7q8c6mh1qm90og_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71clh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl05ni759mker29aeptmrfv63kf31hks6pnqoqh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71clh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ajhdq66v9i7q4gdju3eo6p8v1n7k5pidfnu7tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71clh2bs)**
---

body:
From Afghanistan to Ukraine to China, it’s been even more painful to watch Joe Biden’s weakness destroy America’s elite st
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z845clevnk6bfc0toh0q6oc9p45f428avfti3jr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr31pj7cgqb8o3gs3j7dcb161ie2obimpo7cornceqbddlkelrb4ttic3h3cdr0cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj32s5lmhjrep3661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgmeor0s3gmcoh5u)

---
| | Friend,

I left both of my legs on the battlefield in Afghanistan after a Taliban IED detonated beneath me, so I know what real pain feels like.

**From Afghanistan to Ukraine to China, it’s been even more painful to watch Joe Biden’s weakness destroy America’s elite standing in the world. **
---
| [PLEASE, HELP ME HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkei8mi6pna7ka2e12b2s94tbf1mlacnm6iabcag_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71cph2bs "PLEASE, HELP ME HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
| This Administration likes to call their foreign policy doctrine _“strategic ambiguity.”_ Let’s call it for what it really is - weakness. _They are flailing and drowning, and they are taking America down with them!_

**I’m not going to mince words: Joe Biden doesn’t deserve to have _“Commander”_ or _“Chief”_ anywhere near his title when his weakness is leading to these foreign policy blunders.**

Hear it from someone who knows personally the cost of military missteps:
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr18j4hb9n2b7ttjpd427jfoteqhvd26u4tarnm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71cph2bs)
---
| Joe Biden has been more focused on Woke, CRT-style training for our troops than keeping our country safe. That’s why we absolutely must take back the House in November before it’s too late.

**To do that, we need to flip 5 seats across the country from blue to red - and the district I’m running in, Florida’s 21st Congressional District, is currently represented by a Biden-loving Democrat. **

[**So, please, help me TAKE BACK THE HOUSE to hold Joe Biden accountable →**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8vjbutj8kvoihb2tffciga42onjcms54a57nquo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o71cph2bs)

clean_body: From Afghanistan to Ukraine to China, it’s been even more painful to watch Joe Biden’s weakness destroy America’s elite st | | | | | | Friend, I left both of my legs on the battlefield in Afghanistan after a Taliban IED detonated beneath me, so I know what real pain feels like. From Afghanistan to Ukraine to China, it’s been even more painful to watch Joe Biden’s weakness destroy America’s elite standing in the world. | "PLEASE, HELP ME HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE" | This Administration likes to call their foreign policy doctrine “strategic ambiguity.” Let’s call it for what it really is - weakness. They are flailing and drowning, and they are taking America down with them! I’m not going to mince words: Joe Biden doesn’t deserve to have “Commander” or “Chief” anywhere near his title when his weakness is leading to these foreign policy blunders. Hear it from someone who knows personally the cost of military missteps: | | Joe Biden has been more focused on Woke, CRT-style training for our troops than keeping our country safe. That’s why we absolutely must take back the House in November before it’s too late. name: American Action News
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqm1oqsacfoespfreh9n17he1166ktocfmjgo91g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uco62d3me8or6c34ssqj2dlgmmp78c33ccoecdjhe2rb0tlj65g68sdncdq6ec77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmsqradtie1j7coljcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c5jm6o70spj649fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0kd18if3tg1l01vl03ij1gg5j21pettpqakf6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o76cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj4asbsnqls5ok68cltgotn4rul1isteq37sqqd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o76cph2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za07ktl3rm74426qv5dlfslnqr89scnl6ifp84tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o76cph2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z23atp2mt3oj5coqugnbor1h101t274d431968ro).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeokshmfn8jqauakmvme8mgqmsmcgaa9388kp2g0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cthm1o76cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: BYE???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|

| | | I'll be blunt, Peter.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my goal, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* _Fox News_ said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* _CNN_ moved my race up on their list of Top 10 seats likely to flip and said my race is the "most important race for the Dems."
* My opponent outraised me FOUR QUARTERS in a row.
* _Roll Call_ labeled me the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for reelection.

I need you to listen to me, Peter. If Dems expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump's legacy goodbye! **[Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548322:6B-cR_oNZ:m:1:3317145305:962B53206EF815EB3913BBC13627CFD1:r "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>")**
**[<< RUSH IN $18 >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548322:6B-cR_oNZ:m:1:3317145305:962B53206EF815EB3913BBC13627CFD1:r "<< RUSH IN $18 >>")
[<< RUSH IN $35 >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548323:6B-cR_oNZ:m:1:3317145305:962B53206EF815EB3913BBC13627CFD1:r "<< RUSH IN $35 >>")

To make the stakes even more significant, a poll came out that separates me and my liberal opponent by only 2%, Peter. Only 2% -- that means **every single dollar counts.**

**[I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me, Peter?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548327:6B-cR_oNZ:m:1:3317145305:962B53206EF815EB3913BBC13627CFD1:r "I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me,

Marco Rubio

I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9117%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4OdxOgjF1maONO%2fE5lYy3w&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c24602%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5N4fgqW%2b5%2fBN3B5Qz36HiQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c24603%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uj691Xp4Kus7DKbD%2bJm6XA&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c24604%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D0JvGGWgEtFdFTwh7U4%2bng&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9117%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4OdxOgjF1maONO%2fE5lYy3w&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9117%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4OdxOgjF1maONO%2fE5lYy3w&sysid=1)

name: Great America Update
subject: Renowned Economist issues startling prediction | America's Future
body:
| **Renowned Economist issues startling prediction | America's Future** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62225%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nXafUu2BwnocWBEGub0AQA&sysid=1) **PhD Economist: “Don’t Bet on It”** According to former Goldman Sachs executive, Nomi Prins... Americans who are hoping for a ‘return to normal’ are going to be shocked when they see what happens next in America. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Planned Parenthood SUES DeSantis
body:
They want to keep painful late abortions legal in Florida.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548995:JM_3QxoNs:m:1:3253819041:864FA45777D78AD671D0931C39C05343:r)
---
Peter,
---
Governor DeSantis signed a bill into law that protects babies from PAINFUL late abortions at 15 weeks.
---
But Planned Parenthood is now SUING him to try and overturn this life-saving law.
---
[**Please make a contribution of $15 to help defend Governor DeSantis' law that protects babies 15 weeks in the womb.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548995:JM_3QxoNs:m:1:3253819041:864FA45777D78AD671D0931C39C05343:r)

---

---

Right now, the White House and its pro-abortion cronies are spreading lies and propaganda about abortion.
---
But here are the indisputable facts about Governor DeSantis' life-saving law.
---
At 15 weeks in the womb, a baby is able to:
---
**_Smile
Yawn
Feel pain
Respond to her mother's voice
...And even have a fully formed face_**
---
The Biden-Harris White House wants it to be LEGAL to kill those innocent babies.
---
But their extremism doesn't end there. They want it to be legal to kill babies up until the MOMENT OF BIRTH.
---
DeSantis' law provides a necessary check on the rampant abortion extremism coming out of the White House and Congress.
---
That's why we need to defend it as Planned Parenthood and other abortion groups go all in to sue the Governor.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of $15 to help defend Governor DeSantis' law that protects babies 15 weeks in the womb.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548995:JM_3QxoNs:m:1:3253819041:864FA45777D78AD671D0931C39C05343:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60548995:JM_3QxoNs:m:1:3253819041:864FA45777D78AD671D0931C39C05343:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---

## Tulsa County Republican Men's Club Straw Poll
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6367.1.19de89f22ca04f5da8fcd51e1e0eea6a)
---
Yesterday, the Tulsa County Men's Republican Club took a Straw Poll at their monthly meeting.
The results are the following: Lahmeyer 50%, Lankford 44%, Undecided 6%.
Normally, I would not put much weight behind a Straw Poll of 36 people.
However, this one is different. In years past this type of group would have been 100% with James Lankford. But not this year!
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6368.1.d4d10dec988e99b9a5a5f14c063c6d3d)
---
A new poll from **Just Oklahoma Data** has been released which surveyed **503 Likely Republican Primary Voters** in the State of Oklahoma.
The survey was conducted from _June 1-3, 2022_ about four of the statewide elections (US Senate, Governor & Attorney General).
The poll results concerning our race against RINO [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6369.1.ca256e02d62b17052086fa7299950943) are similar to the _internal polls_ we have ran since January of this year.
Here is what we know from every poll we conduct: [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6370.1.c699651694cceda347a72049dd98934b) cannot break 50% and each month we continue to gain ground among the undecideds.
Over the last 14 months I have been endorsed by **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** , **Sebastian Gorka** , **Oklahoma Second Amendment Association** , **Oklahomans For Health and Parental Rights** and many others.
We have raised nearly $1,000,000.00 in the campaign from around 10,000 individual donors and have held rallies all across the state of Oklahoma with thousands in attendance.
We have less than 21 days to go to close this gap. WE WILL!
---
## URGENT - Lahmeyer vs Lankford Debate
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6371.1.64584034afc7dbb87ed2651ef7b5a606)
---
**News on 6** & **News on 9** of **Griffin Communications** is hosting a series of debates in Oklahoma.
Such as the US Senate Race (Inhofe's Seat), Attorney General Race, School Superintendent Race and others.
BUT NOT A DEBATE FOR JAMES LANKFORD'S RACE.
Much of the Establishment Media in Oklahoma like **KRMG** and now **Griffin Communications** has made it very clear they are the _offensive line_ for [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6372.1.1e726c17036f3c98c85bbdaa75e24365) and will go to great lengths to protect him.
I need your help to put pressure on Griffin Communications to host a debate for the [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6373.1.6e36ae9b03e599eb6124fef5052b1c3b) seat as well. If [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6374.1.c2847e158db7d8e018589e148262a89b) refuses, I will be more than happy to bring a cardboard cutout of [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10595075.6375.1.c14347aaedc39ca369960eacf7ec946e)and News on 6 & News on 9 can moderate it.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Check out this new polling >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Floridians are absolutely fed up with Governor DeSantis' extreme agenda that focuses on his presidential aspirations, not our state. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46296843/349680264/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220609_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjA5N2FlZC1lZmU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyv97lMMAvp5qUtvusZHFrHbqyHVzgblgQORGizhy5I=)
---

Fantastic news, friend: A poll from The Listener Group shows me outright beating Ron DeSantis in the governor's race!

But we just got word that Republican leadership is lining up behind DeSantis and helping him amass a huge war chest. He's even dropped a whopping **_$5 million_** to blanket the airwaves with advertising — and that's just the start to what he and his billionaire backers have in store.

**_[Can you make a quick donation to make sure we can fight back against his allies' dark money attacks and keep our campaign in the lead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46296844/349680265/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220609_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjA5N2FlZC1lZmU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyv97lMMAvp5qUtvusZHFrHbqyHVzgblgQORGizhy5I=)_**

Floridians are absolutely fed up with Governor DeSantis' record of being asleep at the wheel. Instead of taking decisive action to protect reproductive freedoms or fight climate change, DeSantis' top priorities have been banning books in schools, scoring political points with right-wing extremists, and schmoozing with ideological billionaire donors who have very little, if anything, to do with Florida.

But here's the thing: Those wealthy donors are going to spend huge sums of money to try and buy DeSantis' re-election. In fact, dark money has _already_ been flooding into Florida in enormous quantities.

Why, you might ask? Because those special interest donors funding his campaign for governor ultimately want to see him run for president in 2024. They can't _wait_ to have DeSantis in the White House so he can take their disastrous policies nationwide.

We clearly cannot allow that to happen — which means we need to defeat DeSantis right here in Florida this November. But with less than five months until Election Day, we're running out of time to counter the dark money forces that are powering his campaign!

**And friend, that's why I'm writing to you right now. If we're going to win this race, we need everyone to do their part. Can you pitch in any amount right now to help us keep building the campaign we need to DEFEAT Governor DeSantis in November?**

body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Dear Friend,

On July 17, the debate between primary candidates for the U.S. Senate will appear on TMJ-4. However we need 5,000 contributors for Steven to participate – If everyone reading this email gave $3, Steven would immediately qualify.

Let's ensure the Wisconsin electorate has the opportunity to learn about Steven, the only candidate who supports and has a plan on Ending Legalized Bribery in Congress, Ranked Choice Voting, and Term Limits for Elected Officials.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara/afg22-web?express_lane=false&amount=3.00]

The time is now. 48% of Wisconsin voters have not decided who they will vote for. Steven has gained a variety of supporters including Democrats, Independents, and Republicans. With just $3 you can help guarantee Steven is included in the upcoming debate and we can ensure that his innovative ideas and strong passion are known to the public.

Thank you for supporting our campaign!

Team Olikara

Photo of Steven taking a selfie with volunteers holding clipboards:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Steven_DC_Congress.jpeg]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara/afg22-web?express_lane=false&amount=3.00]

Hi, friend, I’ll get right to it:
**The Senate is likely to become the next battleground for reproductive rights – so winning this race has never been more important.** But grassroots donations have drastically slowed just ahead of my weekly fundraising deadline.
My finance team says you're one of our biggest supporters. And with my Senate race shaping up to be the most expensive ever, I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. It means everything.
But the truth is, if I fall short on fundraising, the GOP and its allies will use their massive resources to destroy our momentum and take a lead that we won't be able to overcome. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, friend. Can you please make a donation right now to help get my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s fundraising back on track? I need to stay strong, and I'm counting on you.

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: RINO Rich Runs Away From the Fight, Refuses to Return Liberal Special Money
body:
RINO Rich Runs Away From the Fight, Refuses to Return Liberal Special Money
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DUThBgGLAfS2buf3odGVGCtrh1noa7-a3Be7Dkl8P3truuwx9hoX5ib23RlsSGPO2G7sLAC09_DBjzHtv9DcHueGF_q9eqtI73vSzG2pdu5d-n7IulFwZc0cZC1kITU9N9tizYZ5fJE=&c=-CQ-Y8g_6vef6zJiUoWcFb8R43nMqoyd98TDOW5oWaB2mjImwHkcrg==&ch=iXdLuUr1FU_iyVroP94T8txk1Y-YCinZicTMs1Z9kz7hddWbPvre3g==)
---
|
---
For immediate release June 9th, 2022 RINO Rich Runs Away From the Fight by Ignoring Debate Challenge
RINO Rich must explain what he promised for tens of thousands from liberal special interests. In Monday's Atlanta Press Club debate, RINO Rich McCormick blatantly ducked the questions that conservatives have about his campaign: are the liberal special interest group's principles, including abortion on demand, restricting gun rights and biological men competing in women's sports, consistent with his principles? And if not, would he return this dirty special interest group money?
On Monday,[ Jake challenged Rich to another debate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DUThBgGLAfS2buf3odGVGCtrh1noa7-a3Be7Dkl8P3truuwx9hoX5kFuPrwpbayuSAm-bat3zUeE3JZz0ZQ-8nPy8zVcwzE34R4YmIVEYeirsW_EoAP3TILJipH6zjlpzWm7UB4D6ocuELOg4donQa_MG2C3XyecrktEeWzno7ls7C8gkMXMh1CdzaUfFxEi&c=-CQ-Y8g_6vef6zJiUoWcFb8R43nMqoyd98TDOW5oWaB2mjImwHkcrg==&ch=iXdLuUr1FU_iyVroP94T8txk1Y-YCinZicTMs1Z9kz7hddWbPvre3g==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DUThBgGLAfS2buf3odGVGCtrh1noa7-a3Be7Dkl8P3truuwx9hoX5kFuPrwpbayuSAm-bat3zUeE3JZz0ZQ-8nPy8zVcwzE34R4YmIVEYeirsW_EoAP3TILJipH6zjlpzWm7UB4D6ocuELOg4donQa_MG2C3XyecrktEeWzno7ls7C8gkMXMh1CdzaUfFxEi&c=-CQ-Y8g_6vef6zJiUoWcFb8R43nMqoyd98TDOW5oWaB2mjImwHkcrg==&ch=iXdLuUr1FU_iyVroP94T8txk1Y-YCinZicTMs1Z9kz7hddWbPvre3g==)- hosted by conservative radio host John Fredericks - to give him the platform to explain why liberal groups are so anxious to see him elected. "In two straight debates, I've asked Rich pointblank to simply tell us the truth. What positions does he hold that have encouraged groups - publicly and actively in favor of abortion on demand, anti-gun measures and biological males in girls sports - to dig deep in their pockets and give to his campaign", Jake said. "His refusal to give a straight answer tells conservatives voters in this runoff all they need to know: liberal dark money groups and centrist PACs don't endorse and donate to candidates opposed to their policy goals. RINO Rich's strategy is to avoid and divert and hope voters don't hold him accountable." "I'm again challenging Rich to join me in a fair debate with a conservative moderator before a conservative audience. I hope voters will tune in if Rich mans up to do it, and I hope they take note if he doesn't. Either way, Republican voters will see why President Trump chose me and rejected RINO Rich." McCormick has repeatedly ducked forums where he can't just follow the talking points prepared by staff - like when he haltingly read from his notes during the Atlanta Press Club debate Monday. He skipped the Cherokee County GOP's debate and wouldn't participate in interviews with the 6th District Republican Party. "Americans deserve a fighter. Someone with the skills and courage to go into battle and win," Jake said. "RINO Rich lacks the toughness, skills and courage to fight the Democrats and win. The stakes for our nation are too high to elect a squish like RINO Rich."
---

clean_body: RINO Rich Runs Away From the Fight, Refuses to Return Liberal Special Money | | | | == | For immediate release June 9th, 2022 RINO Rich Runs Away From the Fight by Ignoring Debate Challenge RINO Rich must explain what he promised for tens of thousands from liberal special interests. In Monday's Atlanta Press Club debate, RINO Rich McCormick blatantly ducked the questions that conservatives have about his campaign: are the liberal special interest group's principles, including abortion on demand, restricting gun rights and biological men competing in women's sports, consistent with his principles? And if not, would he return this dirty special interest group money? On Monday,==- hosted by conservative radio host John Fredericks - to give him the platform to explain why liberal groups are so anxious to see him elected. "In two straight debates, I've asked Rich pointblank to simply tell us the truth. What positions does he hold that have encouraged groups - publicly and actively in favor of abortion on demand, anti-gun measures and biological males in girls sports - to dig deep in their pockets and give to his campaign", Jake said. "His refusal to give a straight answer tells conservatives voters in this runoff all they need to know: liberal dark money groups and centrist PACs don't endorse and donate to candidates opposed to their policy goals. RINO Rich's strategy is to avoid and divert and hope voters don't hold him accountable." "I'm again challenging Rich to join me in a fair debate with a conservative moderator before a conservative audience. I hope voters will tune in if Rich mans up to do it, and I hope they take note if he doesn't. Either way, Republican voters will see why President Trump chose me and rejected RINO Rich." McCormick has repeatedly ducked forums where he can't just follow the talking points prepared by staff - like when he haltingly read from his notes during the Atlanta Press Club debate Monday. He skipped the Cherokee County GOP's debate and wouldn't participate in interviews with the 6th District Republican Party. "Americans deserve a fighter. Someone with the skills and courage to go into battle and win," Jake said. "RINO Rich lacks the toughness, skills and courage to fight the Democrats and win. The stakes for our nation are too high to elect a squish like RINO Rich." | | | | == | == == | | | | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. body:
As House GOP leader, I meet a lot of dedicated Conservatives in Washington. But few I’ve seen have accomplished as much as Richard Hudson has for America in just a few years. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6024%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=pgA4%2bEmtsU6aWzpN7Ix5%2fg&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot,
---
As House GOP leader, I meet _a lot_ of dedicated Conservatives in Washington. But _few_ I’ve seen have accomplished as much as **Richard Hudson** has for America in just a few years. ** ** Rep. Richard Hudson has been one of the Conservative movement’s biggest champions, and he is now UNDER ATTACK from the Left for his hard work. Richard’s dedication to our movement has put a target on his back, and now Democrats are rearing to take his seat. **
**All eyes are on North Carolina this election season, and the Left thinks they can take it all away from us.** **That’s why [I’m asking EVERY North Carolina patriot to do their part](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62229%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zOOM1VnCJG1QKMrapZCvRQ&sysid=1) to keep **NC RED**. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62220%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jwg%2fVpLsf3ifVgN463VEOA&sysid=1)
---
[**KEEP NORTH CAROLINA RED**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62221%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=26KU5UoCZepS8DMgSGrMRg&sysid=1)
---
**I don’t want Democrats to think _they have a chance_ in North Carolina this election.** It’s nearly **end-of-quarter** for GOP fundraising and I want our reports to be so strong we take away the Left’s hope of ever flipping the Old North State.

[**Help me support Richard Hudson today and KEEP NORTH CAROLINA RED.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62222%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XeMRcey6Nxi904l1xL5%2fIw&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62220%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jwg%2fVpLsf3ifVgN463VEOA&sysid=1)

subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs0HRSkhN8

"The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest-with
an Ivy League degree-said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk
show.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os0HRSkhN8

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

"The
Constitution is kind of trash."

That's
what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a
highly-rated daytime talk show.

You've
likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of
limited government and personal liberty with outrageous
statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash."

And like
that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative
that our Constitution is flawed, outdated, and incapable of
dealing with the challenges of our time.

Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander
Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect
guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist
Papers.

Written
between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius,
The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper
editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas
Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the
principles of government which ever was written."

And these
documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If
we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we
shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them.

That's
why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The
Federalist Papers," on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible
donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

"The
Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for
viewing in your home or a small group.

You might
also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal
study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen
your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even
more.

These
DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our
nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family
member.

But
supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of
"The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people
have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last
long.

You can
use this secure link to receive your copy of "The Federalist
Papers" right now:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: John Papola
subject: There’s a problem facing fatherhood in America
body:
America is facing a systemic fatherhood crisis that is feeding an emergency among our kids (Gen Z), boys in particular, and the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbde5v99dd13lt3igf01sq4pkbejn8c73plbrcfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4cb6moqj8dpj6ooj4c3h65pj9o3lmir69d36mloj7cpgemomac5jelijacpim3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddl61p72pjh6sqrcdtgmlin49fg)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjfj2i6gvoqgkh6gq01ctk7aj3k7s2ab0lgkc2k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)

Friend,

There is a real problem.

America is facing a systemic fatherhood crisis that is feeding an emergency among our kids (Gen Z), boys in particular, and the future of freedom at large.

**According to the 2020 census, 1-in-4 American children live without a father of any kind in the home.** America tragically leads the world in fatherlessness, and is paying a heavy social cost for that leadership.

Our cultural institutions are at war with men and boys, declaring "the future is female" and masculinity is "toxic", which only magnifies the crisis. The result of all this is a culture succumbing to fear and anxiety and turning its back on freedom as a result.

Current and could-be fathers have very few places to turn for inspiration, motivation and trusted information.

We've surveyed the landscape and outside of Joe Rogan and Jordan Peterson, there aren't many major personalities or brands promoting American values for dads.

_**I created Dad Saves America to fill this critical missing form of entertainment for dads.**_

Dad Saves America believes the foundation of a free society is thriving families who raise resilient kids ready to push back against the Fear Industrial Complex and take on the challenges we all face together.

[_**I am looking to grow our channel to 100,000 subscribers and I am counting on your support. Can you donate $10, $35, or more to promote pro-Dad content online? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1mfmtdbsbv1ksci0a5us9gcnp8alcb5s4qpveeo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)

And we've already launched dozens of videos online! Please check us out below.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfo9t8frt5fov220l84d9v458qehg96q2910hhto_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)

We're on a mission to celebrate, empower, and entertain Dads, could-be Dads, and father-figures of all stripes.

We deliver powerful stories, exclusive interviews, mini- documentaries, and deep dives on a weekly basis to inform and inspire as we build a movement of dads who embrace their heroic calling.

**According to our own research, conducted by Horizon media over the course of 2021, our potential audience is over 20 million Americans.** Interestingly, our testing has shown that our potential audience is very diverse, and crosses the ideological spectrum.

**Put simply:** We are NOT preaching to the choir. _Our message is reaching new audiences and changing hearts and minds_.

This is where you can help us grow our audience into the millions.

**I am looking to raise $25,000 to grow our audience and produce more pro-dad content to save America. Please use a link below to support our journey.**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnlfh0oj89a77l2nrf1t6jh4e7t90ovjqgvjeb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfjiqstrcjlvr27oqpujc8mocmhas6b10e4878eo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv49mpl96aq46sq4po2t92rmccevehb6obqmsp9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmi5ff1ioqu79viu6o9h1glgmbh3ch0uf4irr4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zepobkr0qfqtuh0hebfadc0b7pivqpo5vqn1vapo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgg9f890psj4lb5kss7j0vpr5v6q2sa0utqfqkfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8dq9eioo88t8gh8kkqhpjbi55rbvms2g0c47r8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5a3n5n3ct1s5lf7p4ndl0l79obis4kkm7fbs18_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)

Much of our team has come out of the world of men's entertainment, including Spike TV, Bleacher Report, and Rooster Teeth.

Our team's work in this space has reached hundreds of millions of viewers. We are of the audience, we understand the audience, and we are facing the same challenges our audience faces every day. In today's landscape, authenticity is the #1 essential ingredient for success with any audience.

These elements set Dad Saves America up for huge potential success and high-impact over time. We believe that we can build a movement, or better yet, a tribe of MILLIONS of dads who embrace their roles as heroic on a national scale.

This is the BEST form of shared identity, built on shared values, and a positive growth mindset.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpgddfndo4pq6sf7d5qln4d6p6l6jmurkdsk0a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)

Since our launch earlier this year, we have raked up 11,000 hours watched, 265,000 views, and over 24 videos produced.

I want to share with you some of my favorite comments that really inspire me to produce more pro-dad content.

There is a big hunger for new pro-dad content. With the collapse of traditional media, families and fathers, in particular, are looking to the internet for new channels.

My team is producing quality content that is having an impact. However, we must continue to grow our online audience and that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

[_**Can you join Dad Saves America by making a generous contribution today? Please click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk0vv6i6kl49uj143bcr0nv4kitm61hd0cqpqbl0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs)

Thank you,

John Papola, Dad Saves America

P.S. - If you haven't seen our video, then [_**watch it here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqnpnkt0pl2oc8e2vsmagb99skh03at24upm8vro_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph2bs) I promise you'll be intrigued.

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zp7t3vsvanimf9idpidk85gfjb1qi0o72unkf77g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt41qm8lt07q4ld22s3d8ipvjlllmha6e166a5h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctjm9or1cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Our records show that you haven’t supported Governor DeSantis’s re-election campaign in almost two months.

Thanks to Governor DeSantis’s leadership, Florida is the best state to live, work, and raise a family. But if the Democrats had it their way, all of the commonsense policies that Governor DeSantis has enacted will be thrown to the wayside in the name of wokeness.

This is not the time to sit back, Peter. We need you to get off the sidelines and do your part to ensure that freedom prevails in November.

| St. Louis, MO-- Governor Eric Greitens proudly announced the formation of the Women for Greitens coalition with over 215 women representing over 61 counties.
Yesterday, [Fox 4 News reported](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eflmQ6gsAUPEBK_vAM0op--uGM8BLeA6WKuVZKoXgdieXP3YUrGez0Z8SdZZ44oyF0e4Zq05EF28_g7QfkrlwJNc99v1YYa7HUkmS7aCbGdydvBFXfhk3GnjCY-luM_0NvP_u5kgUD5X4gGFtJGptabdBU3FDnTXYyFk8PCA9Gxc3YwI0r-UYQp_HkQEqhrF8-VM5i0N9vb70lqvX0IlO_-JYw3swNoEKbShKVW-GX-X7rVFibBM_5DzNzhHSrfoexjtkfuuM92aHuURdjPR_BCIAfgZRhoqgS7Bqy82tMg2l1PCiXCSbrU66zm6US-gW6mtgC3ktyCzgk2VvN0VxVwNh4BiKnBX0OPre4_QRz20l2ZorKwT2ZWPJmXEebz19iuMEN-Fmis=&c=pVE-5FUsIjBCdxilckM5Gr84dWugOPhBN0MN9xlFCEzrBYxeHKMGDg==&ch=5YJFD5FAvR6_do04POopWmjR4kjgSrJ46oa_TR3ACDwEveicOQaKMg==) that Governor Greitens is far and away the top choice among conservative women in Missouri--holding a 9-point lead over his nearest opponent among women voters.
Women for Greitens Co-Chair Robbie Brouk released the following statement:
"Strong, patriotic women all across Missouri are supporting Governor Eric Greitens because he is the only candidate willing to fight the RINO establishment and the radical Left alike. As Governor--despite the RINO establishment, Governor Greitens achieved the Missouri Miracle, making Missouri the safest state in the country for the unborn."
The Women for Greitens coalition is proudly led by:
Kimberly Guilfoyle, Greitens for US Senate National Chair Senator Wendy Rogers, Retired Air Force Lt. Colonel Jessie Jane Duff, Co-Chair of Veterans for Trump Ann Dorn, Retired St. Louis police sergeant & widow of Captain David Dorn Robbie Brouk, Greitens for US Senate grassroots director Bridget Van Means, Missouri pro-life advocate Judy Henderson, Missouri business professional Jennifer McElfresh, Missouri business professional
---
|
---
| To join the Women for Greitens coalition, visit EricGreitens.com/women.

name: Republican Task Force
subject: Feds Seize Data From Retired Four Star General
body:
The FBI reportedly seized the electronic data from a retired four-star U.S. general who now works at a leftist think tank.

---

subject: We’re two months out from our next election, and I need your support.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| Hi folks,

**Today, we’re officially two months out from our next election on August 9th.** If we’re going to have the resources we need to stay competitive through this summer and beyond, we need to hit all our fundraising targets.

**That starts by meeting our $1,000 grassroots goal by midnight — and we’re not quite halfway there.

[Please, donate $5, $50, or an amount that’s right for you before time runs out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46303358/349708585/-1607675525?amount=50&refcode=ea.aed98c81-fce7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.aed98c81-fce7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ5OGM4MS1mY2U3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36NbFlx0LePYf7KQxwYF_BV7GFUtQCT2-Xel6jDeU0k=)**

I appreciate all your support,

Jeff |

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305400/349715663/1395796377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305402/349715665/1395796377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=)
Dear Peter,
The purpose of representing our state has always been listening to the needs of our community and finding solutions that benifit everyday Tennesseans. So the reality is, **it's time to legalize marijuana, now!**
**Here are three facts about marijuana legalization in Tennessee**. ✅
**Fact I:** The vast majority of Tennesseans want a form of legalized cannabis [(around 80%)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305403/349715666/-254443244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=&emci=4c87bbca-08d6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=14bfbf9a-fee7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16307894).
**Fact II:** Tennessee** ** House** ** Republicans are working to keep a $180M industry [in limbo](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305406/349715667/-965991214?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=&emci=4c87bbca-08d6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=14bfbf9a-fee7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16307894).
**Fact III:** When we legalize and regulate marijuana, we're doing more than just legitamizing a new substance. We're [**improving healthcare**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305407/349715668/160373497?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=&emci=4c87bbca-08d6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=14bfbf9a-fee7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16307894) by providing those with life-threatning and agonizing diseases an option to manage their pain. We're working towards better **[criminal justice reform](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305408/349715670/-1126300408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=&emci=4c87bbca-08d6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=14bfbf9a-fee7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16307894) **by not having our law enforcement fine or arrest non-violent offenders. And, we're providing [**good-paying jobs**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305409/349715672/439781089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=&emci=4c87bbca-08d6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=14bfbf9a-fee7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16307894) to Tennesseeans in the cannabis industry.
**Legalization is something that will benifit our state for years to come and push us further ahead!**

[Support our mission, so we can provide a better future for Tennessee!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305410/349715674/1395796377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=)
Thank you,

Caucus Chairman, Rep. Vincent Dixie
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305411/349715676/1395796377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odf3HhOYcNSKhoriT19D3s-K_o1xYUEECgmR3lQS1xs=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Al Gross for Congress Al Gross for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305447/349715801/67411685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3SB5JQ3iRssmDdoyYRXI2nqQiLwx67cFsIbKGk-PSc=&emci=ae9da812-b2e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=0dbfbf9a-fee7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=32238700)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46305449/349715803/-405614612?refcode=em22_220609_wherepalin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGJmYmY5YS1mZWU3LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3SB5JQ3iRssmDdoyYRXI2nqQiLwx67cFsIbKGk-PSc=)
---

Sarah, I just wanted to make sure we were clear here. You're claiming to have never left Alaska, but were seen on live television in a pink bear costume, singing “Baby Got Back.”

I get it. It's a good song, but how Sarah Palin thought she would get away with lying to voters while her actions are documented on television is beyond me. Does she think Alaskans aren't paying attention? We are.

And I'll be upfront. I left Alaska, but solely for my education. After obtaining my education, I came back to put it to use serving Alaska. I will never forget that my roots are planted right here.
