name: Nikki Fried
subject: Women protecting women
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
Before the Roe v. Wade news leaked last month, I talked a lot about what it would mean for Florida to have its first woman Governor.
But now that the stakes are clear — that Roe is all but overturned and abortion rights are hanging by a 15-week thread in Florida — it’s that much more important.
Women need a Governor who knows what it’s like to be overlooked and told what you can and can’t do by a room full of out-of-touch men. We need a Governor who will fight with everything she has to uphold our rights.
Once Roe is overturned, there’s no more room for hesitation. And I’m ready to act right now to protect Florida women. Will you stand with me and make a $10 donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=609roe]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=609roe] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=609roe] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=609roe] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=609roe] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=609roe] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=609roe]
“Pro-life” politicians have made it clear that they won’t lift a finger to protect abortion rights or keep Florida women safe.
They don’t get the urgency here, Peter. They don’t get that women will die if we don’t secure reproductive freedom.
Now more than ever, women in Florida deserve a Governor who gets it. Click here to make a donation and elect a woman who will fight to protect all women. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=609roe]
Thank you for being on my team.
— Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: A platform to believe in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
Dear Peter,
Throughout this campaign, I've made it my top priority to address the needs of every single Tennessean, regardless of where you live in our state.
I'm the only candidate who has been to all 95 counties in Tennessee, and here's what I can tell you from this expierence...to build a platform that works for ALL Tennesseeans, you have to meet people where they are.
My platform has been modeled around ways we can work to better the lives of working people while avoiding petty, partisan politics that do nothing but create noise. (you can view the whole platform here [https://martinfortn.com/issues/] ). I will be a governor who supports the rights of our LGBTQIA+ community, fights to raise the wages of working class Tennesseeans, and works to legalize marijuana from Johnson City to Memphis.
My goal as your governor is to create a future in which everyone from every single background can thrive, and when I'm elected the 51st Governor of Tennessee I will put YOU first!
I hope you consider supporting our campaign. To defeat Bill Lee we need as much help as we can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
All the best,
Dr. Jason Martin
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Throughout this campaign, I've made it my top priority to address the needs of every single Tennessean, regardless of where you live in our state. I'm the only candidate who has been to all 95 counties in Tennessee, and here's what I can tell you from this expierence...to build a platform that works for ALL Tennesseeans, you have to meet people where they are. My platform has been modeled around ways we can work to better the lives of working people while avoiding petty, partisan politics that do nothing but create noise. (you can view the whole platform here [] ). I will be a governor who supports the rights of our LGBTQIA+ community, fights to raise the wages of working class Tennesseeans, and works to legalize marijuana from Johnson City to Memphis. My goal as your governor is to create a future in which everyone from every single background can thrive, and when I'm elected the 51st Governor of Tennessee I will put YOU first! I hope you consider supporting our campaign. To defeat Bill Lee we need as much help as we can. [] All the best, Dr. Jason Martin DONATE [] [] [] www.martinfortn.com [] Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Eric (personal)
subject: 38 mass shootings since Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
We can no longer afford to wait for Republicans to have a change of heart.
Friend,
I’m writing you with a heartbreaking new statistic: almost every day since the tragedy in Uvalde, Texas, there has been a mass shooting in the United States. That’s 38 shootings in just over 2 weeks.
I’ve been working with my colleagues in the House to move Republican blockades against the gun reform we so desperately need. Still, their inaction speaks louder than their trite apologies and empty promises.
**We can no longer afford to wait for Republicans to have a change of heart. Every day, innocent lives are taken in preventable tragedies. We must act.**
Extremists in Congress who refuse popular, common-sense solutions — like an assault weapons ban, red flag laws, and increasing the legal age to buy a gun — are more vulnerable than they realize. _This November will be a referendum on Republican inaction on gun reform._
We’ve set a goal of raising an additional $10,000 in online, grassroots donations so we can continue this fight and we’re going to need your help. _We’re asking our gun-sense supporters to chip in $15, $25, or whatever they can afford so we can finally get this done.[**Can you rush a donation to help us fight these Republicans on the front lines in battleground states?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46306886/349721984/463182889?refcode=E16092-20220609-sinceuvalde-SL-GunViolence-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGVlOWJiNC0wMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyzgRtB1zS6F3sIblEmWnW3NobF7FHFyFez-KM9P_mk=)_

name: Future Forum PAC
subject: Peter, can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
You are receiving this email because you’ve supported great Democrats and causes in the past. Future Forum PAC is dedicated to engaging young Americans and solving the problems that affect them. We need you on our team in order to keep our leaders working for all Americans! But, if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/IQ5Gir8YBUiMbbxFx_JD8g2?unsubscribedata=BJbO89osIbDhC5OTz%2BJpb44dT1fDWN%2FAm8XVKOo1PFyOIP1QqCbFFy42LveVDhd247JZQRy3xijzYu8BJ8OR0Ejt9UXW94T97TiHnV0q0W1DRor0HSv9ZSRTD4BThFZmud8M%2BTYG6byrAIlt%2Bea67Yf3TW%2FZqRp2UFKPLIxUE4SzZymUYZaSSaYKcWfQIKHto89UAHslSRvppIlU7eZZXIM1r2WFzxfjOSYmUwHjH1j%2Bk%2Fr828l1H3GAU0j5LzppSKkUC1r5iyDSXZXYV29qmO%2FemD4KvDG0Nm%2FWXJmBfQGzsXP%2BRuvSjFLPHLkz8qWcuMJ6FX8eH5PToy9ftXjNjDC3NBh8GPhcRwDcHNSA6vjXGOZrX56HIGnmPzoDnkcMA%2BZYlCuMxC1RL%2F5W301CYtWHLydnh5fWnoryEem8ZN8%3D] .

[https://secure.everyaction.com/-3mjVoE-QEe1b4ZjTPKsSQ2]

Hey Peter,

Welcome to the team! We’re so honored and grateful to have you. If you’re new to our work, Future Forum focuses on engaging young Americans, bridging the divide between young Americans and their government, and inspiring the next generation of leaders.

Future Forum, founded in 2015 by Rep. Eric Swalwell, is now chaired by Rep. Darren Soto and our members include powerhouse Democrats like Seth Moulton and Haley Stevens. Our members are all young, hungry for change, and driven to work across the differences that seek to divide us in order to fix the problems plaguing young people.

Future Forum members have traveled to over 50 cities across the country and met with thousands of young people where they live, work, and go to school. Members have used feedback from these listening sessions to introduce legislation on issues like gun violence prevention, student debt, and entrepreneurship.

We strive to empower young Americans to have a seat at the table in the democratic process.

Peter, we can’t change our democracy without you. Can we count on you to be part of our work? [https://secure.everyaction.com/-3mjVoE-QEe1b4ZjTPKsSQ2]

I'M IN! [https://secure.everyaction.com/-3mjVoE-QEe1b4ZjTPKsSQ2]

While we know there is a lot of anxiety and rightly a lot of attention at this moment around COVID-19, we can’t lose sight of the important work we need to do to combat the climate crisis, get a handle on student loan debt, and put an end to gun violence -- while we work simultaneously to protect communities from COVID. All require a commitment to bettering our communities -- and both require investments in communities across the country.

If you don’t want to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/IQ5Gir8YBUiMbbxFx_JD8g2?unsubscribedata=BJbO89osIbDhC5OTz%2BJpb44dT1fDWN%2FAm8XVKOo1PFyOIP1QqCbFFy42LveVDhd247JZQRy3xijzYu8BJ8OR0Ejt9UXW94T97TiHnV0q0W1DRor0HSv9ZSRTD4BThFZmud8M%2BTYG6byrAIlt%2Bea67Yf3TW%2FZqRp2UFKPLIxUE4SzZymUYZaSSaYKcWfQIKHto89UAHslSRvppIlU7eZZXIM1r2WFzxfjOSYmUwHjH1j%2Bk%2Fr828l1H3GAU0j5LzppSKkUC1r5iyDSXZXYV29qmO%2FemD4KvDG0Nm%2FWXJmBfQGzsXP%2BRuvSjFLPHLkz8qWcuMJ6FX8eH5PToy9ftXjNjDC3NBh8GPhcRwDcHNSA6vjXGOZrX56HIGnmPzoDnkcMA%2BZYlCuMxC1RL%2F5W301CYtWHLydnh5fWnoryEem8ZN8%3D] here and we will remove your name from our list. But we’re glad you’re here, Peter, and we hope you choose to stay with us in this fight.

Thank you for your support,

-- The team at Future Forum PAC

YOU CAN COUNT ON ME [https://secure.everyaction.com/-3mjVoE-QEe1b4ZjTPKsSQ2]

Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. Hello,
Tonight, the January 6th Committee will begin holding its first public hearings.
One big question that remains unanswered: **What exactly was Chuck Grassley’s plan for January 6th?**
On January 5th, Chuck Grassley told reporters that he – not Mike Pence – would preside over the certification of the Electoral College votes. Grassley said of Pence: “We don’t expect him to be there."
It’s time to come clean, Senator. What was the plan for January 6th? Why did you not expect VP Pence to be there? Were you aware of – or even part of – the plot to overturn the 2020 election? What would you have done had Pence not shown up?
I served our country for over 36 years in the U.S. Navy. I repeatedly swore an oath to protect our nation from all threats, foreign and domestic. I am now running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I will not stand idly by while Donald Trump and his Republican lap dogs attack and whittle away at our democracy.
I’m now the Democratic nominee against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa, and the GOP attacks against me have already begun.
**In order to fight back against all of Grassley and McConnell’s Super PAC attack ads, we need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tonight – but right now we are still falling short. If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**Our very democracy is at stake. Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46307329/349723954/-42398318?refcode=em20220609am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ4M2YxZC0wMmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMRuRQGPJUJj8eltVn8fJ7-81TVBVjdx8KN9LXDOiek=)

clean_body: Hello, Tonight, the January 6th Committee will begin holding its first public hearings. One big question that remains unanswered: What exactly was Chuck Grassley’s plan for January 6th? On January 5th, Chuck Grassley told reporters that he – not Mike Pence – would preside over the certification of the Electoral College votes. Grassley said of Pence: “We don’t expect him to be there." It’s time to come clean, Senator. What was the plan for January 6th? Why did you not expect VP Pence to be there? Were you aware of – or even part of – the plot to overturn the 2020 election? What would you have done had Pence not shown up? I served our country for over 36 years in the U.S. Navy. I repeatedly swore an oath to protect our nation from all threats, foreign and domestic. I am now running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I will not stand idly by while Donald Trump and his Republican lap dogs attack and whittle away at our democracy. I’m now the Democratic nominee against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa, and the GOP attacks against me have already begun. In order to fight back against all of Grassley and McConnell’s Super PAC attack ads, we need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tonight – but right now we are still falling short. If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am honored and humbled to have won the Democratic nomination for Senate. Now it is time to win against Grassley. Thank you so much for your support, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Major endorsement alert – I’m honored to have received the endorsement of Prince George’s County’s Floyd E. Wilson, Jr. and Dorothy “Dot” Wilson! Floyd made history by becoming the first African-American to ever serve on the Prince George’s County Council, and has also served as its Chair. He’s been a consummate public servant and true community leader for residents of Prince George’s County. Floyd and Dot, I’m honored to have received your friendship and support!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/floydanddotendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/floydanddotendorsement?amount=20.22]
We’re closer to the finish line than any other candidate in the field – and with your help, we’re going to pull ahead even further in the home-run stretch of this race. Fresh off the heels of this endorsement alert, will you chip in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to gain 50 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight, and your support can help get us to our goal.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/floydanddotendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/floydanddotendorsement?amount=20.22]

CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/floydanddotendorsement?amount=100]

The Washington Post says that this election could be the most expensive in Maryland’s history – which means grassroots supporters like you can serve as a force-multiplier in our efforts to bring change to Maryland.

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Major endorsement alert – I’m honored to have received the endorsement of Prince George’s County’s Floyd E. Wilson, Jr. and Dorothy “Dot” Wilson! Floyd made history by becoming the first African-American to ever serve on the Prince George’s County Council, and has also served as its Chair. He’s been a consummate public servant and true community leader for residents of Prince George’s County. Floyd and Dot, I’m honored to have received your friendship and support! [] We’re closer to the finish line than any other candidate in the field – and with your help, we’re going to pull ahead even further in the home-run stretch of this race. Fresh off the heels of this endorsement alert, will you chip in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to gain 50 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight, and your support can help get us to our goal. CHIP IN $10 [] CHIP IN $20.22 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN $100 [] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [] The July 19 primary is just a few short weeks away, and any amount you can give will go a long way towards helping us reach out to voters in this home-run stretch. The Washington Post says that this election could be the most expensive in Maryland’s history – which means grassroots supporters like you can serve as a force-multiplier in our efforts to bring change to Maryland. Your contribution will help secure our victory by allowing us to: Print more yard signs, field literature, and mail pieces Run more ads online and on television Create more T-shirts, stickers and bumper magnets Open future field offices Hire more field organizers Recruit more volunteers * And so much more! We have a truly exciting opportunity to redefine the promise and possibility of state government in the years to come. With your support, we’re going to do it. Enough talk – let’s get it done! [] CHIP IN [] By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer. body:
Kat is leading the charge in the fight to secure our southern border. However, she needs you in the fight, too.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GTf0EfqXh8LDsNE4CthH1ioqVL1EAQwP_tv91uIuOr7QbHpbnRtm_FBMuyoQJ-dP-utVaR5yUoYLP7zVP-mIzH8GmlsuO9QZ0_ltJyCwW5RTQxOZN8zhYOer--vIIn3ML9xQv7hUwg-uVbHRGyn6IdDvQMy7xGdgx67GqVAN-7SjDm5Afy5CuaryKllsbtwAIAHqdHNcQBBEGLYb4wvGuo_JqpqdQpom&c=VBkgcej6eyjRw9MgGsKwg1qtp32osD_gAj8YX9SifX-lP8P-LX-pGA==&ch=YePK0B987YA2Scq7DoN7ivVe1PmPEF5UpStQ5b2ysNIg530sjnw3CQ==)

| Friend
ICYMI: a ruling by a Federal Judge has temporarily kept President Trump's Title 42 in place.
This is a big win for those of us fighting to secure our border and fix the crisis started by the Biden administration.
However, this ruling is not the silver bullet that will end the crisis - especially as Biden is still fighting to end Title 42 and let more illegal migrants across the border.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GTf0EfqXh8LDsNE4CthH1ioqVL1EAQwP_tv91uIuOr7QbHpbnRtm_FBMuyoQJ-dP-utVaR5yUoYLP7zVP-mIzH8GmlsuO9QZ0_ltJyCwW5RTQxOZN8zhYOer--vIIn3ML9xQv7hUwg-uVbHRGyn6IdDvQMy7xGdgx67GqVAN-7SjDm5Afy5CuaryKllsbtwAIAHqdHNcQBBEGLYb4wvGuo_JqpqdQpom&c=VBkgcej6eyjRw9MgGsKwg1qtp32osD_gAj8YX9SifX-lP8P-LX-pGA==&ch=YePK0B987YA2Scq7DoN7ivVe1PmPEF5UpStQ5b2ysNIg530sjnw3CQ==)
---
| From Biden's first day in office, his administration has done everything within its power to let lawlessness and chaos take over the southern border - and it worked out quite well. Illegal immigration numbers have been breaking records, several times over, in the number of crossings, encounters, and drugs seized.
Worst of all, the cartels are using Biden's open-border agenda to their advantage, flooding our communities with fentanyl, meth, and other dangerous narcotics.
Kat is leading the charge in the fight to secure our southern border. However, she needs you in the fight, too.
[Can Kat count on your support in her fight to take back the House and finally end the Biden Border Crisis?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GTf0EfqXh8LDsNE4CthH1ioqVL1EAQwP_tv91uIuOr7QbHpbnRtm_FBMuyoQJ-dP-utVaR5yUoYLP7zVP-mIzH8GmlsuO9QZ0_ltJyCwW5RTQxOZN8zhYOer--vIIn3ML9xQv7hUwg-uVbHRGyn6IdDvQMy7xGdgx67GqVAN-7SjDm5Afy5CuaryKllsbtwAIAHqdHNcQBBEGLYb4wvGuo_JqpqdQpom&c=VBkgcej6eyjRw9MgGsKwg1qtp32osD_gAj8YX9SifX-lP8P-LX-pGA==&ch=YePK0B987YA2Scq7DoN7ivVe1PmPEF5UpStQ5b2ysNIg530sjnw3CQ==)

clean_body: Kat is leading the charge in the fight to secure our southern border. However, she needs you in the fight, too. | | | | | | == | Friend ICYMI: a ruling by a Federal Judge has temporarily kept President Trump's Title 42 in place. This is a big win for those of us fighting to secure our border and fix the crisis started by the Biden administration. However, this ruling is not the silver bullet that will end the crisis - especially as Biden is still fighting to end Title 42 and let more illegal migrants across the border. | == | From Biden's first day in office, his administration has done everything within its power to let lawlessness and chaos take over the southern border - and it worked out quite well. Illegal immigration numbers have been breaking records, several times over, in the number of crossings, encounters, and drugs seized. Worst of all, the cartels are using Biden's open-border agenda to their advantage, flooding our communities with fentanyl, meth, and other dangerous narcotics. Kat is leading the charge in the fight to secure our southern border. However, she needs you in the fight, too. == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for supporting the fight, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign Now to urge Congress to Ban Assault Weapons >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-3]

Sign the Petition → [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-3]

This petition is for dpwillis67@gmail.com.

When America had an assault weapons ban from 1994-2004, mass shootings were down by over 40%.

This year alone, there have been over 230 mass shootings.

We need Congress to act immediately to pass an assault weapons ban.

Our nation is in the midst of a gun violence crisis. Every day, more than 110 Americans die from gun violence. We don’t have to be numb to this. We don’t have to live like this. We don’t have to die like this.

But without enough public support, Congress may not take this critical action on gun safety. So we’re gathering 15,000 Democrats to pressure Congress to Ban Assault Weapons. The petition closes at midnight. Please sign the petition immediately: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-3]

name: Bob Casey
subject: Living as your authentic self is an act of resistance.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
In a time where your existence is under attack, celebration is an act of resistance. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46310202/349737585/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTEyYWFiMC0wN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAGgMGr9fvmDkRHhoopjTv1JOBm47PyuJTvWIAVKFRU=&emci=c6f1b456-6be7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6512aab0-07e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

In a time where your existence is under attack, celebration is an act of resistance.

After years of progress, Republicans in states across the Nation have passed new laws to further restrict the rights of LGBTQ+ people, while others are attempting to erase their existence entirely.

I cannot know what it's like to live under constant threat of that kind of erasure, but I've witnessed friends and loved ones face that threat and still choose to come out. I admire their courage, but I also wish that it wasn't necessary. Everyone should have the right to live authentically and love whom they love.

So once again this month, I want to encourage you to celebrate pride with the LGBTQ+ people in your life and show care and compassion for yourselves.

I also want to ask you to take action. We stand at a critical moment where the rights that LGBTQ+ people have won in the courts could easily be erased. And today, too many still face the threat of being evicted or denied services for being gay, lesbian, bisexual, transgender, or queer.

**[It's time for federal legislation to end discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans. If you agree, will you stand with me and demand action this Pride Month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46310203/349737586/1206534142?ms=em22_220608_pride_adv_gq_act___bc_ettx&refcode=em22_220608_pride_adv_gq_act___bc_ettx&source=em22_220608_pride_adv_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220608_pride_adv_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTEyYWFiMC0wN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAGgMGr9fvmDkRHhoopjTv1JOBm47PyuJTvWIAVKFRU=&emci=c6f1b456-6be7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6512aab0-07e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

The House has already passed the Equality Act, but the Senate has not. I am proud to be a co-sponsor of this legislation, but I'll need your help to get it passed into law.

By showing your support for the Equality Act, you can help provide the momentum to ensure that LGBTQ+ Americans of all races no longer face the threat of losing their homes or being denied public accommodation because of their gender or whom they love.

Though we live in a challenging time, we cannot allow those who would erase LGBTQ+ people to win.

We must celebrate pride, and we must act. I look forward to debating, sponsoring, and passing more legislation to protect the civil rights of every American, and I'm glad to have you with me in this fight.

Thank you,

Bob Casey

| PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: In a time where your existence is under attack, celebration is an act of resistance. Peter, In a time where your existence is under attack, celebration is an act of resistance. After years of progress, Republicans in states across the Nation have passed new laws to further restrict the rights of LGBTQ+ people, while others are attempting to erase their existence entirely. I cannot know what it's like to live under constant threat of that kind of erasure, but I've witnessed friends and loved ones face that threat and still choose to come out. I admire their courage, but I also wish that it wasn't necessary. Everyone should have the right to live authentically and love whom they love. So once again this month, I want to encourage you to celebrate pride with the LGBTQ+ people in your life and show care and compassion for yourselves. I also want to ask you to take action. We stand at a critical moment where the rights that LGBTQ+ people have won in the courts could easily be erased. And today, too many still face the threat of being evicted or denied services for being gay, lesbian, bisexual, transgender, or queer. The House has already passed the Equality Act, but the Senate has not. I am proud to be a co-sponsor of this legislation, but I'll need your help to get it passed into law. By showing your support for the Equality Act, you can help provide the momentum to ensure that LGBTQ+ Americans of all races no longer face the threat of losing their homes or being denied public accommodation because of their gender or whom they love. Though we live in a challenging time, we cannot allow those who would erase LGBTQ+ people to win. We must celebrate pride, and we must act. I look forward to debating, sponsoring, and passing more legislation to protect the civil rights of every American, and I'm glad to have you with me in this fight. Thank you, Bob Casey | PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

clean_body: Tune in tonight at 7 pm to see me take on my opponents and make the case as to why I am the Proven Republican Fighter in this race who... | Peter, First and foremost, I wanted to thank you and everybody who helped me reach my quarterly goal. We exceeded expectations and are on track to CONQUER the polls on Tuesday, June 28th. Tune in tonight at 7 pm to see me on the debate stage and make the case as to why I am the Proven Republican Fighter in this race who has the courage and experience needed to take our country back and make America first again. I'm running on my record, Peter... not from it. I have served as an outspoken proponent for our conservative values since first being elected to the Oklahoma Senate, and I will continue to fight for our Constitutional rights in Washington. We need to elect a candidate who has a record of standing up to the corrupt political establishment, ignoring the noise from the Fake News mainstream media, and can do it all with grassroots supporters like you... My America-First grassroots campaign is committed to representing YOUR voice in Washington, Peter. We can't afford to elect people who will compromise away our freedoms the moment they swear in. Click an option below to help elect the Proven Republican Fighter in this race. For the first time in this election cycle, I will have the opportunity to showcase my record compared to the empty rhetoric from the other candidates. Tune in tonight at 7 pm to watch as I make the case for America's freedom. For Liberty, Senator Nathan Dahm Candidate for United States Senate Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335 P.S. We have two upcoming events this month and I would love to meet up and talk about the issues that matter to you most, Peter. Please RSVP today if any of these events fit your busy schedule. \- Comanche County Fundraiser - Monday, June 13th @ 5 PM -Edmond Reception - Wednesday, June 15th @ 6 PM | | Nathan Dahm, PO Box 2323, Broken Arrow, Oklahoma 74013

Friend,

The January 6 Committee’s public hearings start tonight at 8 PM Eastern, and the Republican Accountability Project has been hard at work trying to get as many eyes on their findings as possible. That’s why we’ve launched ads urging everyone to tune in. Conspiracy theories from the far right about what happened that day have run rampant. The MAGA GOP has blamed everyone from the FBI to Black Lives Matter to Antifa or have outright denied the attack happened at all. **But you and I know the truth. This was a direct attack on our democracy. The people involved in planning and executing the attack must be held accountable. ** The stakes are too high right now. The facts must drown out the conspiracy theories coming from Trump allies and the MAGA base—and to do that, awareness campaigns and loud calls for accountability will be critical. [That’s where you come in.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW-9zG1hyPqTN29C_cFc0dGWW3X6sTS4L4WYHN861KB33q90pV1-WJV7CgG_ZVrgtpl6CzDr6W9jfJxM60CTnHW8Pn3ln9fZzzwW1vfyd466qrw1W8yR73m6dl-LMW2xmZ8q5cTptNVBR09S1CCXbRW8gS6dv3WVnDMW94_92k60Tr3zW5yXhJ_87pj1QW8G8Wvh4bBZ2jVppZ6k9hc_G_W1vQ2nK2ZGYqFW1r6tPw40Yt83W725G7X6xX9zMW7bDWHj7trLpnN8vTkVH-MX_bW4kJfSt1QqsQxW7SXKSt2tdKG0W8w-Qmv3CtblGW5gL4Fm6M_KjdW92qcrH4FV28zW1gmD3x3N4vZ4W4rSTtv8K0_BkW44YmP49j2KY2W40t_GS5cQT913dyJ1) **Will you support RAP’s work to hold the insurrectionists accountable today?** By donating, you help make sure we have the resources to put [ads like this one](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW-9zG1hyPqTN29C_cFc0dGWW3X6sTS4L4WYHN861Kzt3q8_QV1-WJV7CgNzpW8RVSw27M5rH8VnLJbX2b_M_WW4bPQkN818103W1PvBg46xG_0hW7H_nw02MctmTVnyCxV3sVlCbW24cJfv32h5bTW98PK_y7JTQHzW12hM6l3sbSnTN3RbLm3jPvymVFJFgq85dnZyW2WQQmD2XGLg8W7pmXsC26mJymVN5FYY5_JhMpW5lgH4q7y7vWyW8npdjy2q7wFwW8P0ZZF9kwJZmW6MrSPJ6YnRppW1MQcwz3mbV-ZW6LzZXj5C1Sr7W7HqZpD2jpX73W36ZZ9b92vMgr36Dm1) on the air. It’s more important than ever that people hear what the committee and the witnesses they call have to say about the attack. [**Help us amplify the truth, and stand against the lies and conspiracy theories that threaten our democracy.**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW-9zG1hyPqTN29C_cFc0dGWW3X6sTS4L4WYHN861KB33q90pV1-WJV7Cg-jzW2Kmfbp6YmXBQW5MhHyS4MyL4MW3tSV_j1VrB94W8nYmMV1yw7bKW3KcWyH7VtLRQW1FZ2Jd1fy2qqW7MGZCm5X7T6-W2Gdz-l5Xpl0XW1QX6s47H_qZ0V8Hg9H1G-_dtW92N9yL5RdLTdW35pVvV83W1scW7thLHn3RRdLYW6qVHHp3xWKPyW4fPkxg88BKZsW7fdpQc93gZ7LW6x4Mw36bwp-dW4q4r8p72V6MDW8TTWdJ2Nz4q0W2XHxmj6gvlGxW61ZQsX3fRfjlW7fHsqT1tftsSW4CGPKl3SMM0zW1FCTD-5l2bYGVz2dx51yvTVyMlqnLks78VZ28v1) Thanks for everything.

My name is Peggy Wood, a deeply proud mother writing to you today about my daughter, Senator Maggie Hassan.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46313804/349745157/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk1123-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGFjOWVkZS0wYmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LZsiEYtt1NuWPPogc_eq86gr0hp37s-SCoI83ILXT7I=)
Hi there, friend, my name is Peggy Wood, a deeply proud mother writing to you today about my daughter, Senator Maggie Hassan.
When she was growing up, none of us knew that Maggie would make history as the second woman in America to be elected both Governor and United States Senator. But her father and I always encouraged her to make a real difference in the world, so I must admit that I'm not surprised.

A few years ago, I watched proudly from the Senate gallery as Maggie took her oath of office — and I’ve watched proudly every day as she takes on tough fights to make a real difference for our country. Whether it's working to lower prescription drug costs or saving the Affordable Care Act, Maggie's never stopped fighting for what matters most.
**[_Maggie really needs your help: Will you donate $3 right now to defend Maggie's seat and the Senate majority? name: Take Back Tennessee
subject: TN is bottom of the barrel when it comes to voter turnout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Our votes are being suppressed.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46314753/349748411/1141538894?refcode=EM_FR_220609VoteSup1_VR_TBT_30DO_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThkZTg0Mi0wZGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQ58I9r1HuOiU72X-cTA0hqSaXghSUyMpMel5AbxynM=) Did you know that Tennessee is 49th in the nation for voter turnout?

Does that mean people just don’t care about our government? It doesn’t seem like it. Maybe most voters are just uninformed and don’t know who to vote for? No more than voters in any other state. **So what is causing us to have such low turnout?** 🤔

**Turns out, it’s voter suppression.** [**_The Tennessee GOP has been adding more and more barriers to voting for years. We have a lot of work to do, but we’re fighting back against voter suppression and restoring our voting rights. Tennessee has some of the most egregious voting restrictions in the country. Strict voter ID laws, voter purging, complicated absentee voting rules, a 30-day registration cut-off, modern-day poll taxes, and outdated, glitchy voter machines all play a role in tarnishing the integrity of our state’s elections.

body:
The results may not have been what we hoped for, but I’m so proud of the campaign we built together. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46314971/349748859/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDA2ZmI0OC0wZGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOEY_GBi4CYhpxCFaT69mOKmAbuv-_2Z-WH78v563PM=) Thank you, friend. I am so proud of the team and campaign we built together, and I can’t put into words just how grateful I am for all of the hard work every single one of you put into this campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46314974/349748860/1801863858?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDA2ZmI0OC0wZGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOEY_GBi4CYhpxCFaT69mOKmAbuv-_2Z-WH78v563PM=&emci=00f02d9a-83e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7d06fb48-0de8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=37373330) **Against all odds, we built a grassroots coalition that accomplished so much, and I am proud of the integrity of the campaign we ran. ** We participated in over 100 events across the district and brought together over 50 endorsers from every background -- hunters and anglers, farmers and ranchers, labor leaders, first responders, Montana and Tribal leaders, and so many more. **I ran for Congress because I know that we deserve a representative in Washington who knows what workers and families in Montana go through.**_And I will continue to fight_ to make sure we have good jobs and wages, our small businesses can succeed, and families who have been here for years or generations can afford to stay. Whether you voted for me, donated, or simply cheered us on from afar, it was an honor to run for this Democratic seat. We left it all out on the field, and I couldn’t be prouder. Forever grateful, Cora Neumann
---
Paid for by Cora for Montana
---

These values are core for me, and they're what this campaign for our common good is all about.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46316740/349752198/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjZiNzk1YS0wZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bdb8VAI_j18G_4y-JKEN1rj2X5ZPukgOrlVmjeejdNE=) **Ship, Shipmate, Self.**

Derek, that’s one of the first lessons I learned at the Naval Academy. You put the mission first, and you put others before yourself. **These values are core for me, and they're what this campaign for our common good is all about.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46316744/349752199/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjZiNzk1YS0wZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bdb8VAI_j18G_4y-JKEN1rj2X5ZPukgOrlVmjeejdNE=) **Fighting for our common good means putting people first. And when I’m in Congress, you can count on me to never lose sight of that mission.**

I’ll never stop advocating for the union way of life, for our small businesses and bringing manufacturing back home, for our wives and daughters to have access to an abortion without fear of being thrown in jail, for our LGBTQ+ sisters and brothers to move freely through society rather than live in the shadows, and for the end of unnecessary wars.

You can’t count on the radical right to do any of that. **In fact, all you _can_ count on is that my opponent will side with huge corporations and right-wing extremists over working families in western Pennsylvania _every single time._** They care about power and profit at whatever cost.

**[Derek, we have a tough fight ahead of us. I know that we will defeat Jeremy Shaffer and the radical right this November, but I also know we can’t do it without you. subject: Our fundraising deadline is *tomorrow*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
I’m running to put an end to the corruption and politicking in Columbus and put Ohioans first.

Team,
Here’s the good news: We’ve just cracked $8,000 raised in our fundraising push ahead of tomorrow’s deadline.
Here’s the bad news: Our goal is $15,000 – so we’re still short.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46317282/349753467/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220609_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODljMTdhZC0wZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziGxPMeS2V1827UYNsL0Ii2y-GnuodrCTvs6RlIC3aU=)
**[There’s still time for us to catch up and meet this goal – but we need a big surge of grassroots donors to help us get there. Will you chip in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46317283/349753468/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220609_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODljMTdhZC0wZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziGxPMeS2V1827UYNsL0Ii2y-GnuodrCTvs6RlIC3aU=)**
Meeting this goal and showing a huge wave of support for our campaign is the next step to taking on Mike DeWine and his Republican cronies in the state legislature.
The timing couldn’t be more critical. As families struggle with rising costs and shortages of essentials like baby formula, Republicans are more concerned with regulating people’s bodies and putting guns in our schools – not to mention lining the pockets of their special-interest friends.
**It’s time for a change. I’m running to put an end to the rampant corruption in Columbus and put working Ohioans first.**
**[To do this, we need to reach our goal to stay on track and defeat Mike DeWine. Please, if you can, rush $5 to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46317284/349753469/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220609_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODljMTdhZC0wZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziGxPMeS2V1827UYNsL0Ii2y-GnuodrCTvs6RlIC3aU=)**

Nan Whaley

name: AZ Battleground HQ
subject: Democrat Greg Stanton faces a much closer race this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Politico just moved Greg Stanton's AZ-04 from Likely Democratic to Leans Democratic - a signal that redistricting has made this a much closer race.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7rkhrk86HCfsShtUJPOXOYEaCq29QHqC7GAUtmoRS4=/1iaYRkNcDgRkrJm-EOgweyBerMvfMCuQdDk3ha_SztI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_azbhq_all) Team, Politico just shifted Greg Stanton's AZ-04 from _Likely Democratic_ to _Leans Democratic_ - a signal that gerrymandering has made this district a much closer race. This has drawn the focus of National Republicans looking to flip seats red, and with that focus comes the support of their dark money backers for our opponents. [**Can you contribute today to help Greg Stanton get ready to fight the attacks to come?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7rkhrk86HCfsShtUJPOXOYEaCq29QHqC7GAUtmoRS4=/1iaYRkNcDgRkrJm-EOgweyBerMvfMCuQdDk3ha_SztI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_azbhq_all)
| [FIGHT BACK](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7rkhrk86HCfsShtUJPOXOYEaCq29QHqC7GAUtmoRS4=/1iaYRkNcDgRkrJm-EOgweyBerMvfMCuQdDk3ha_SztI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_azbhq_all)
---

MAGA Republicans have gerrymandered Greg into a district that has him facing one of the toughest races in the country. In a new AZ-04 that just barely leans in his favor, he can't afford to lose any ground - which is why he needs grassroots supporters like you to have his back.

In a race that will be decided by such a razor-thin margin, there's no time to lose getting ready for the fight. [**Will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now to stand with Greg Stanton and help keep AZ-04 blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7rkhrk86HCfsShtUJPOXOYEaCq29QHqC7GAUtmoRS4=/1iaYRkNcDgRkrJm-EOgweyBerMvfMCuQdDk3ha_SztI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_azbhq_all)

Thank you for being in this fight,

AZ Battleground HQ

**_A tireless advocate for Arizona, Greg was elected to Congress in 2018. Since then, he has built a reputation for working across the aisle and getting things done in Congress. As the former Mayor of Phoenix, he knows the issues of his state and district inside and out._

In 2022, Greg is running in one of the toughest races in the country. name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Campaign Alert: Dr. Martin endorsed by top Tennessee Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
Dear Peter,
I'm beyond excited to announce our first round of endorsements this campaign cycle.
Throughout this campaign, we have traveled to all 95 counties, listened to the voices of countless Tennesseeans, and have built an undeniable large-scale grassroots movement across our state. This campaign has never been and never will be about me. It is about women’s rights, protecting our children from gun violence, and electing a governor who will put people and their wellbeing over politics. I am honored to have top Democrats from all across Tennessee join our campaign in this fight.
“When we have a clear path to defeat a radical governor and restore decency to our state, the answer is very clear. That’s why I’m proud to support Dr. Jason Martin- he’s the best candidate to defeat Bill Lee. Dr. Martin has the ethic, the vision, and the progressive values that will ensure Tennessee gets back on track. When he’s elected we can work to create legislation that helps working families instead of hurting them.” - House Democratic Caucus Chair Vincent Dixie
Join in supporting our campaign, so we can defeat Gov. Bill Lee this November! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
All the best,
Dr. Jason Martin
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]

subject: Thank you

body:
All I can say is thank you. I am so grateful to all of the amazing grassroots donors who have stepped up over the last few days.

**FiveThirtyEight laid out the stakes: “Though Governors have always been important for their influence on health care, education, tax policy and more, the 2022 gubernatorial elections feel particularly urgent.”**
They’re urgent because our democracy is literally on the line. The ability to cast a vote, have that vote counted, and the truth about who wins elections is all at stake.
I will defend our democracy and our rights — because I’ve already done that as Attorney General. But I need to win this race to do it, and that means we’ve all got to fight like hell.
**[Derek, this race is going to be tough — and it’ll take everything we have to keep Pennsylvania in Democratic hands. Josh Shapiro

clean_body: Pennsylvania’s Governor’s race is rated a Toss Up according to FiveThirtyEight’s analysis. | | | = | | = = This is one of the most competitive races in the country, plain and simple. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016 and then Joe Biden flipped it blue in 2020 — both by the narrowest of margins. 80,000 votes in Pennsylvania stood between President Biden and four more years of Donald Trump. It’s going to take everything we have to win in November and keep the Governor’s office in Democratic hands. If we’re going to win this race and make history in Pennsylvania, we need every one of our supporters to take action — including you, Derek. = = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = FiveThirtyEight laid out the stakes: “Though Governors have always been important for their influence on health care, education, tax policy and more, the 2022 gubernatorial elections feel particularly urgent.” They’re urgent because our democracy is literally on the line. The ability to cast a vote, have that vote counted, and the truth about who wins elections is all at stake. I will defend our democracy and our rights — because I’ve already done that as Attorney General. But I need to win this race to do it, and that means we’ve all got to fight like hell. = Thank you, Josh Shapiro Democratic Nominee for Pennsylvania Governor This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country. name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6037%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7AefPPb5GyARwOWB%2fdBjfQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62353%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fTC53leLs5RnFH1tLEe%2bdw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62354%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ymxgxAFDTqg%2fWFiXbOpRRQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62365%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s%2b5JBkTcqA16Lupw2UoHfQ&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6037%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7AefPPb5GyARwOWB%2fdBjfQ&sysid=1)_

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Tucker's endorsement...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
And my plan to flip 300 school boards in the next 6 months.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbeudutqok7k2cgpgke63pr9p9ulc7rdugsb02fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaptncpi35d3imkor9cbkchqn9pdgmhoj2p3nckpn0p1ieaob4dhnm8p73d1l6urt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddl61rm4phmcipm8ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0v4b4ul4u4qqo996ggg9i1uvl7g6ike7226mo30_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Radical transgender activists pretending to be “teachers” are infecting the minds of our children... “grooming” them to accept lies about so-called “gender identity.” If that angers and sickens you, then you are exactly the right person for me to be writing to today. _We cannot wait we must take back our schools this November_ _!_ Together with the help of **Donald Trump Jr.** , **Tucker Carlson** , **Laura Ingraham** , **Ron DeSantis** and others we will defeat the Radical Left’s sick, perverted, and depraved plans to “groom” our children. Specifically, we will do this by flipping control of school boards by removing radical leftist Democrats and replacing them with pro-faith, pro-family, and pro-freedom conservatives. [**Will you join the 1776 Project PAC and FLIP OUR SCHOOL BOARDS before it’s too late?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlgqu0j2laudtcp0jo4tna66ih1l0o59gm76o7vg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs) By now you probably heard about Joe Biden telling teachers, children are _“like yours”_ when they step inside the classroom. But Biden isn’t on the ballot this year**...**** ****And the solution isn’t going to be found somewhere in the swamp of Washington, DC anyway!** _The real answer is just as our nation’s Founding Fathers intended it to be:_ close to home, where locally elected school board members make decisions that immediately make an impact. You know that children belong to their parents – not their activist teachers, not their far-left schools, and definitely not creepy Joe Biden. [**Will you take back our schools from the Radical Left?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr3n7r9e2m6q6tr333j9485oiqr91hfvi9o9udb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)
---
[**HELP US FLIP 300 SCHOOL BOARDS IN 2022!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvlc8ojlq994risas1p2a9sbpdab3sguv97vg60_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)
---
Every day you hear another outrageous story about teachers “grooming” young kids or see a newspaper headline that reads: **_*** “Teachers manipulated child to change gender identity”_**** _ _** **_*** “Schools Want To Talk to Kids About Sex - And Keep It a Secret”_**** _ _** **_*** “1st grade teacher tells students doctors 'make a guess' about gender when a baby is born”_** It’s revolting. It’s disgusting. And it’s totally unacceptable. Yet for decades the Radical Left has declared victory in the culture war by secretly stealing control over local school boards. But their reign of terror is coming to an end, my friend. So far, in less than 1 year our _1776 Project PAC_ has elected 57 conservative candidates, in mostly suburban school districts. We flipped a number of school boards from Left to Right, most noticeably Douglas County, Colorado; Center County, Pennsylvania; Leavenworth County, Kansas; and most recently Tarrant County, Texas --- _where we went a perfect 15-for-15 with winning candidates._ That’s why the _New York Post_ labeled us the **“Little PAC That Could”** having won all these races on a startlingly modest budget of only $150,000. We’ve been so effective because we are so efficient with every dollar of support, we’ve raised from conservatives like you. Now our sights are set on the fast-approaching school board elections this Fall where we plan to build on our winning strategy. Our goal is to **flip 300 school boards IN 2022** and deliver a game changing win for parents and grandparents who don’t want their children indoctrinated, brainwashed, or groomed by Radical Leftist activists posing as “teachers.” [**But we don’t stand a chance without you. Please let me know if I can count on your support to flip these school boards in 2022.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsm6itfnll5vbpjg2m0046b94mondvv8jtsiiad0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)
---
[**HELP US FLIP 300 SCHOOL BOARDS IN 2022!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcd9sgq30g85dsiu9c2keg56kung6777qm8h6neg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)
---
Specifically, I’m asking for your help with our **_“3R’s” conservative campaign battleplan_** : **_Resign_** : we’ll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far-left school board members to quit. **_Recall_** : we’ll help collect petition signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members. **_Replace_** : we’ll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against radical liberal activist school board members. With your support we will **flip 300 school boards IN 2022!**** ** [**So...are you in?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zett3557g7a6r5m1o27ha5134s6l41a4mgkd8ls8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs) As you know, School Boards control curriculums, hire school staff, and make decisions that directly impact our children. What you may not know, is when you add up every elementary, middle, and high school the average school district in America includes around 3,769 students. And so, by **flipping 300 school boards IN 2022** with your help**** we will be stop the Radical Left from corrupting the innocence of 1,130,687 schoolchildren. **Won’t you please help us save 1,130,687 children from the Radical Left’s poisonous transgender indoctrination today?**** ** Because for far too long too many conservatives didn’t care to get involved in “small” races for local school board. Now our children are stuck paying the price. It’s sad, but it’s the God honest truth. But not for much longer if I have anything to say about it! My name is Ryan Girdusky and if my name sounds familiar then you’ve probably seen me on TV talking with my friends on **_Fox News_** , **_NewsMax_** , or elsewhere about our work together at _1776 Project PAC_ : **> >> Donald Trump Jr.:** _“The battle to save our kids and our country is being won and lost on the local level... That’s why the 1776 Project PAC is different than any other group out there.”_ **> >> Tucker Carlson:** _“You’re basically counterbalancing what George Soros has been doing for 30 years influencing local elections.”_** ** **> >> Laura Ingraham:** _“For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists – help is on the way – a new political action committee called the 1776 Project is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids...”_ Conservatives can’t afford to look the other way, twiddle their thumbs or give these Left Wing extremists the benefit of the doubt. Every second we waste, we risk losing another innocent child to their sick, twisted indoctrination.
---
---
Ryan Girdusky, Founder _1776 Project PAC_ P.S. **[_Will you help us win 300 School Boards races this November?_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkt07ealf0fgqouhtrf6smdiqei08t9i3nk60l0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)** _It’s the only wa y to defeat the Radical Left’s sick, perverted, and depraved plans to “groom” our children._
---
[**DONATE TO THE**
**1776 PROJECT PAC >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc50nus0us89td448a90f5rnt5d9h1qv1061pkoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctie4o74c3h2bs)

body:
This is who we're up against.

| |
---
Hi friend – We're back with another Anna Paulina Luna update – she's keeping our team busy holding her accountable for some shockingly right-wing stances. **We shouldn't be surprised, since she seems to have spent more time with the Trump family than with her voters. But her recent interview took her Republican agenda to another level.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46321823/349760613/-651476063?refcode2=941ea208-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=220609_aplwatch_dontsaygay_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDFlYTIwOC0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7KbWKDBomg43-2Qmv0u_6JRpag8oSIwTgD88D3ogtM=) Luna called for national legislation akin to the Florida GOP's "Don't Say Gay Bill" during a One America News Network interview. Here's what she had to say: "Gov. DeSantis passed the parental rights bill and Disney, Hollywood, and the left tried to smear that. I think nationally we need to push for similar legislation because people are taking their political ideologies and grooming children in a sense." – _Anna Paulina Luna_ **She's right about one thing – Democrats did criticize the "Don't Say, Gay Bill". And we'd do it again, friend, and defeat any similar bill in Congress.** This bill made what should be a safe, inclusive learning environment into a fearful one. It made Florida schools into a place where students and families aren't allowed to express their true identities. Experts have concluded that this environment is harmful to students' education and mental health. So if Anna Paulina Luna wants to come at Democrats for trying to deny Republicans from discriminating against children in schools, let her do it. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322293/349762880/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2M2MmRhOC0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUwr038qZCCpN0kqUvNO4WszCz731DFxfm2QxjRreCY=&emci=f839e8d3-65e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=b7c62da8-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
---
Peter, this November, Oregon faces a choice that will decide the future of our state. And Tina Kotek is a leader head and shoulders above the rest.

Oregon faces huge challenges, and we need real leadership. That leader is Tina.

**Tina has proven time and time again that she gets things done. From housing to homelessness to education, Tina has led and made a big difference in Oregon.**

[**We _need_ that kind of leadership and action going forward. That’s why I’ve donated to her campaign, and it’s why I’m asking you to donate $10 today to help Tina become the next governor of Oregon.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322295/349762882/1485193592?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2M2MmRhOC0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUwr038qZCCpN0kqUvNO4WszCz731DFxfm2QxjRreCY=) ****[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322298/349762887/1485193592?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2M2MmRhOC0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUwr038qZCCpN0kqUvNO4WszCz731DFxfm2QxjRreCY=) **** Leadership in part is about being willing to make tough choices. Tina can do that. She’s focused on the needs of people all across the state.

Tina is a bold thinker on some of the issues I care most about: **addiction, housing and homelessness and the existential threat of climate change.**

She led the way in reducing zoning red tape to make it easier to build homes. She led in providing resources to Oregon schools. She brings the kind of focus and persistence that we need in Oregon’s next governor. **That’s why I am proud to endorse her.**

[**Tina’s opponents are all wrong for Oregon. One is from an Oregon Republican Party that has turned extremist: It claims that Jan. 6 was a “false flag” operation and it would undo a woman’s right to choose. The other candidate is a so-called “independent” who has blocked efforts to address gun violence and climate change and who fought efforts to raise the minimum wage._Their values are not Oregon’s values._ They would take our state backward. So let’s help Tina win this election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322301/349762928/1485193592?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2M2MmRhOC0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUwr038qZCCpN0kqUvNO4WszCz731DFxfm2QxjRreCY=) **[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322303/349762936/1485193592?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2M2MmRhOC0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUwr038qZCCpN0kqUvNO4WszCz731DFxfm2QxjRreCY=) ** Thank you.

Nicholas Kristof

name: Doug White
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
Happy Pride Month!

Every June, we celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and remember the Stonewall riots in 1969, which forever changed our nation’s history for the better.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322336/349763011/-1478273579?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220609_1_1&refcode2=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=JWaN7h8THUW7CkTpVoFNg45LClM64xyvI8CNwnV1HHi4y08agBwZPbPfqsONEOGr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVlMDNlZi0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlZr4dcegZi9zyvmyaBGSF0CKG_KJnw-6S4brKJo1p4=&emci=aee61d2b-14e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322337/349763017/-1478273579?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220609_1_1&refcode2=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=JWaN7h8THUW7CkTpVoFNg45LClM64xyvI8CNwnV1HHi4y08agBwZPbPfqsONEOGr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVlMDNlZi0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlZr4dcegZi9zyvmyaBGSF0CKG_KJnw-6S4brKJo1p4=&emci=aee61d2b-14e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)
---

I was 9 years old when Stonewall started a revolution, 12 when homosexuality was delisted as a mental disease, and 20 when the first AIDS case was diagnosed.

As time moved on, I was always uplifted by the spirit and strength of the gay community. Whenever life threw us lemons, we made margaritas. There was nothing that could hold us back or keep us down. That spirit has never been stronger, and I have been overjoyed seeing our district transform into such an open and accepting place compared to my youth.

**As a social force, we in the LGBTQ+ community have protected the disenfranchised and strengthened the constitution, getting ever closer to true equal rights for everyone.**

Today, LGBTQ+ rights are under assault in America. Right-wing legislators are targeting queer and trans children. Extremists are using hateful rhetoric to fearmonger. And the Supreme Court’s leaked opinion striking down Roe poses a serious threat to marriage equality and civil rights.

[It’s time to stand up and make our voices heard. Will you add your name to show you’re ready to fight back against homophobia and transphobia and ensure equality for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322338/349763018/-1478273579?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220609_1_1&refcode2=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=JWaN7h8THUW7CkTpVoFNg45LClM64xyvI8CNwnV1HHi4y08agBwZPbPfqsONEOGr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVlMDNlZi0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlZr4dcegZi9zyvmyaBGSF0CKG_KJnw-6S4brKJo1p4=&emci=aee61d2b-14e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322339/349763019/-1478273579?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220609_1_1&refcode2=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=JWaN7h8THUW7CkTpVoFNg45LClM64xyvI8CNwnV1HHi4y08agBwZPbPfqsONEOGr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVlMDNlZi0xNWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlZr4dcegZi9zyvmyaBGSF0CKG_KJnw-6S4brKJo1p4=&emci=aee61d2b-14e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=59ee03ef-15e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)**
---
This Pride, may we help to raise each other's voices. May we be loud. May we be joyful in our celebration of self, and each other. Together we can stand against those who wish to limit the freedom and autonomy of others.

Happy Pride!

– Doug

| PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
---

Yakima, WA 98909

clean_body: | | Happy Pride Month! Every June, we celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and remember the Stonewall riots in 1969, which forever changed our nation’s history for the better. | | | I was 9 years old when Stonewall started a revolution, 12 when homosexuality was delisted as a mental disease, and 20 when the first AIDS case was diagnosed. As time moved on, I was always uplifted by the spirit and strength of the gay community. Whenever life threw us lemons, we made margaritas. There was nothing that could hold us back or keep us down. That spirit has never been stronger, and I have been overjoyed seeing our district transform into such an open and accepting place compared to my youth. As a social force, we in the LGBTQ+ community have protected the disenfranchised and strengthened the constitution, getting ever closer to true equal rights for everyone. Today, LGBTQ+ rights are under assault in America. Right-wing legislators are targeting queer and trans children. Extremists are using hateful rhetoric to fearmonger. And the Supreme Court’s leaked opinion striking down Roe poses a serious threat to marriage equality and civil rights. | This Pride, may we help to raise each other's voices. May we be loud. May we be joyful in our celebration of self, and each other. Together we can stand against those who wish to limit the freedom and autonomy of others. Happy Pride! – Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. Peter, two months might seem like a long time, but on the campaign time flies. With just two months before our primary election, we have to make sure every voter in the district has the chance to hear our campaign’s message.

**Wisconsinites are eager for a representative who will stand up for their fundamental rights** \- from access to the ballot box to bodily autonomy. I will do just that in Congress.

**Wisconsinites deserve a leader who serves their interests, not partisan priorities.** My GOP opponent would be a hard-line vote for his party’s ultra-radical agenda. I will vote in for what’s best for Wisconsin and this country.

**Wisconsinites are ready to find solutions to the climate crisis and the lack of affordable healthcare, childcare, and housing.** In Congress, I will deliver real results by listening to experts, leading on policy, and working across the aisle.

Peter, a lifetime of public service has given me the experience and skill to represent WI-03 in Washington. **We have only 61 days to make sure every voter in our district knows that. clean_body: Our message for Wisconsin: | = | TWO MONTHS OUT TO PRIMARY ELECTION DAY! We’re running out of time to connect with Wisconsin voters and bring them onto our team. The earlier you can give, the greater an impact your contribution will have. = | **= Peter, two months might seem like a long time, but on the campaign time flies. With just two months before our primary election, we have to make sure every voter in the district has the chance to hear our campaign’s message. Wisconsinites are eager for a representative who will stand up for their fundamental rights \- from access to the ballot box to bodily autonomy. I will do just that in Congress. Wisconsinites deserve a leader who serves their interests, not partisan priorities. My GOP opponent would be a hard-line vote for his party’s ultra-radical agenda. I will vote in for what’s best for Wisconsin and this country. Wisconsinites are ready to find solutions to the climate crisis and the lack of affordable healthcare, childcare, and housing. In Congress, I will deliver real results by listening to experts, leading on policy, and working across the aisle. Peter, a lifetime of public service has given me the experience and skill to represent WI-03 in Washington. We have only 61 days to make sure every voter in our district knows that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thank you for everything, Deb | Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. | | Hey team – we think there are countless reasons why you should support Susie Lee, but we’ll start with five of the biggest:
1. _**This is one of the most competitive races in the country.**_ Susie won her race in 2020 by _just 3 points,_ and the GOP is banking on a red wave to make up the difference this year.

2. **Any of Susie’s GOP opponents would be a disaster for Nevada.** They’ll support Donald Trump’s radical, conspiracy-fueled agenda rather than fighting for what our district needs.

3. **Election forecasters have downgraded Susie’s race to a “toss-up.”** That means Republicans see NV-03 as theirs for the taking.

4. **Control of the House could come down to _this race._** If we can’t hold on to this seat come November, our Democratic majority will be in grave danger.

5. **Republicans are dumping millions in out-of-state dark money into this district.** They’ve already spent _over $2 million_ in misleading ads to unseat Susie and have reserved millions more in ad space!

[If you want to help keep Nevada – and the House – blue, will you chip in $5?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46323292/349767393/202043439?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220609_FR_5FOR5_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTcwMTYwNy0xOGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ulgb7QI1fiVQdwy45NnlLqBltO0pvHuQmbE2GgzGYPg=) | | | [Chip in $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46323293/349767394/202043439?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220609_FR_5FOR5_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTcwMTYwNy0xOGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ulgb7QI1fiVQdwy45NnlLqBltO0pvHuQmbE2GgzGYPg=)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Political prisoner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Dragged off a plane and shackled in leg irons by the FBI...
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---
Peter,
---
Many of President Trump's closest associates have been subpoenaed by Pelosi's Congress, _myself included._
---
One of those associates, Peter Navarro, the genius behind President Trump's America First trade deals, was just **_DRAGGED_ _OFF_ _A_ _PLANE_** and **_SHACKLED_ _IN_ _LEG_ _IRONS_** and denied food, water, and an attorney.
---
Navarro was treated like a political prisoner by the Biden-Harris FBI.
---
...**_The same FBI that launched a dawn raid on my apartment._**
---
After I just testified before Pelosi's Congress last month, the attacks against Trump associates are getting more and more intense. I need your help now more than ever before.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as the Biden-Harris FBI seeks to treat former Trump associates as political prisoners.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554028:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554029:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554030:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554031:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554032:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---

What I've described sounds like something you'd hear from the Soviet Union... not America.
---
Here's what Tucker Carlson had to say:
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---
The Biden-Harris Administration has thrown every old principle of justice and the rule of law straight out the window.
---
Worst of all, their attacks are getting nastier by the day, and I think we all know why...
---
...Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi know they're plummeting in the polls. 80% of Americans think our nation is on the wrong track. I'd love to meet the 20% of voters who think America is prospering, but I have a hunch they're mostly dead voters...
---
Suffice to say, Biden, Kamala, and Pelosi are expecting a BLOODBATH in the midterm elections this November.
---
_So, as a last-ditch effort to hold onto their power and exert their executive force, they've resorted to publicly turning former Trump associates into political enemies and have weaponized the FBI to carry out their plans._
---
Their displays of power are intended to _intimidate_ us.
---
**But as the man who served as President Trump's attorney and successfully fought for his freedom, I don't give in to intimidation tactics.**
---
Hear it from President Trump himself:
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---
While I fought for President Trump's freedom, I now have to humbly ask for your help fighting for _my_ freedom.
---
After seeing someone like Peter Navarro shackled in leg irons, I worry what's to come next.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as the Biden-Harris FBI seeks to treat former Trump associates as political prisoners.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554027:6Ct0CxokN:m:1:3253819041:FDB75B021F26877EBC7FDA5C3EF4F601:r)
