name: Presidential Alert
subject: re: Gallup poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**URGENT via Gallup: America’s standing abroad is SOARING thanks to President Biden’s leadership!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8137?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)

**Now, we need to know where you stand:****Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8137?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8137?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)
---

Team, **President Biden is showing us what real leadership looks like** \-- _and the world is taking notice._

A recent Gallup poll shows that after **_years_** of Trump undermining America's allies abroad, our country's standing in the world is finally SOARING again!

But while President Biden works to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are still slamming him and obstructing his agenda at every turn.**

We need to show President Biden that Democrats are standing with him during this pivotal moment -- _but we’re still missing 24 responses from Pennsylvania!_

**Please, lock in your response before midnight:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8137?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8137?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220609-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=4654_9716520_bAS3NR&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4654%2E9716520%2EbAS3NR)** to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtney=20Geels?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
Read more to find out what Courtney has been up to | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04915e81e506/campaign-update?e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [ ](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=9070443c43&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | Dear Peter, The Courtney Geels for Congress team is organizing and growing!! If you would like to join the team, we will need an army of Patriot's to promote truth and campaign for the November 2022 general election. If you would like to join us, you can click the volunteer link below, and we will be so excited to welcome you to the team.
---
| [Volunteer](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=36f26f9354&e=20ac8f046f "Volunteer")
---
| This week we had the privilege to serve the Boys and Girls Club of Durham and Orange Counties. Many of you already know I am pushing hard to raise money for my campaign, but over the past couple weeks, I have also asked many of you to donate to the Boys and Girls Club. I am proud to announce that we raised over _**$2,000**_ for the Boys and Girls Club of Durham and Orange County! I presented them with the checks when we were there this week, and they were so thankful for our support of their mission.
---
| I have been tutoring since the beginning of the year at the club, and this Club is doing wonderful things for the children of Durham, and it was fun to have my campaign volunteers with me to support their mission. We want to be respectful of the children and parents, so if we get some permissions, we may include more pictures with the children in later emails. Thank you to all of you who supported this club who does great work to support kids in our community.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| A big thank you to Simply Amazing Treats out of Mebane, NC for joining us at the Boys and Girls Club of Durham and Orange County and providing the beautiful, tasty cupcakes! If you need a baker for an upcoming event, the business information is here!
---
|
---
| For upcoming events, you can find more information on my website at this link: **[https://courtneygeelsforcongress.com/events/](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=7aaf3796e9&e=20ac8f046f)**

This upcoming week, we are looking forward to celebrating the Emancipation Proclamation from the efforts of the _**Republican Party**_ of 1863 to make sure every person made in the image of God is able to be FREE to experience the life, liberty, and pursuit of happiness of America. As current day Republicans, let's join our friends in Durham in celebrating this point in history, but also look forward to the efforts we will make to promote freedom for ALL Americans and see the thriving of every community in Durham in the upcoming years. I would love to see you all at my booth at this event with details below, next weekend June 18th!
---
|
---
| If you would like to donate to my campaign, you can click the button below to donate. We are so excited to bring positive change to our district and we need your continued support to get our message out.
---
| [Donate Now](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=ed907e7226&e=20ac8f046f "Donate Now")
---
| Thanks again, Peter. I appreciate your support of my campaign and I look forward to representing you well in Washington DC.
---
| |
---
---
| Courtney Geels
---
| | | | | | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=03cd813c14&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=1814b6b7af&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=85797a86ad&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=20d9f99a85&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| |
---
| _Paid for by**Courtney Geels for Congress**_

**Our mailing address is:**

**Courtney Geels for Congress**
PO Box 995
Hillsborough, NC 27278

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=8d4a8b36d2&e=20ac8f046f&c=461cabb75e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=8d4a8b36d2&e=20ac8f046f&c=461cabb75e).
---
|

name: Stop D.C. Statehood Petition -- House Republican Alerts (via Team Scalise)
subject: Patriot, we reached out not once,not twice....but THREE TIMES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It's filed, marked, and ready for Joe Biden signature
Patriot, we reached out not once, not twice... but THREE TIMES NOW asking you to stop the Democrats from making Washington D.C. the 51st State.
**H.R. 51 --_the D.C. statehood bill Nancy Pelosi has personally signed off on_ \-- is sitting on the tarmac ready for a final vote.**
[**Thousands of Conservatives went on the record to sign our petition to STOP the Democrats and H.R. 51, but you didn 't. _Why not?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60553378:661fYxoNV:m:1:3299561967:74FE7E05B57269A76BCA724614058B08:r)
**[Add My Name -> Stop D.C. Statehood](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60553378:661fYxoNV:m:1:3299561967:74FE7E05B57269A76BCA724614058B08:r)** Your Signature:**[ MISSING]** Deadline to Respond: **5 PM TODAY**
---
Elizabeth Warren, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Nancy Pelosi are all in agreement:
D.C. statehood means more power for Radical Leftists. They ALL signed their name to force through H.R. 51...
[**Sign the petition now to stop the Democrats and H.R. 51 before it 's passed and signed into law! >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60553378:661fYxoNV:m:1:3299561967:74FE7E05B57269A76BCA724614058B08:r)

Official House Republican Alerts

body:

| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zisbd2v4pen386h0a83rs8q257mol71oothb95j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieao72cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhgejr5i9g1i82g2mungjlqmmfltltdhqgqb0s4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieao72cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ln89651ure57t6voueohvafd4150of5tp8bq8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieao72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttnm1pr0t5h64qj7c31ekpb5ctn65hj7c5gs3g66cb5cqqj7c34meqj4pr2mso6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplmko7epb66pgb6p9nm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zltqlihiuko2qc2nqesa9e85m8c6g2rc5o6k3tjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieao72cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjenh4olv9qjkt51bl2gnafi81pi6d4glq7k1ebo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieao72cth2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z53ciukkg403nfsj92v9tpvailo3gb5t27p0gkk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieao72cth2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

Progressive politicians everywhere are on high alert right now because even the most liberal voters are rejecting policies that prioritize:

Trump and his MAGA allies planned, promoted, and paid for a criminal conspiracy to overturn the election they lost.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46324737/349773923/-774467154?refcode=abd_em_fr_2022_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.06.09_b1_jan6-2-pc_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzI1ODUwNi0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uA-yfwPhAq0SrnVhpI9y44wwb5JRNFYriRAZCo6z_v4=)

Team,

subject: Pledge to vote for Pride month!
body:
| | Dear Friend, **Happy Pride month!** My name is Rebby (they/them), I’m 33, and I’m a biracial nonbinary person. I’m a long-time organizer and educator hailing from Charlotte, North Carolina. As the Director of Education Policy at Equality NC, an organization dedicated to securing rights and protections for the LGBTQ+ community, I oversee the development of youth organizing in rural areas and help young adults understand their power. **I’m also a volunteer at NextGen America and I’m here to tell you the story of why I organize.** It all started when I attempted to create a gay-straight alliance on my college campus. The group was denied by school administration. >From that moment, I knew I wanted to dedicate myself to activism and building collective power to fight discrimination and create change. **As a NextGen volunteer, I’m able to do just that.** I’m able to follow my passions, and bring my expertise and experience organizing LGBTQ+ youth to voter registration efforts in North Carolina. **Young people are our walking future and have more political power than any other group of folks right now. ** I believe in the power of voting because I know that everyday Black trans people are fighting for basic rights, and when young people vote, it ensures that the LGTBQ+ community is able to thrive. Most of all, I’m fighting to increase representation of trans and non-binary experiences in our society, and that starts with the democratic process. [**This Pride month, will you take just one minute to pledge to vote with NextGen America?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46325021/349774566/244836386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjAwNjYzMS0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bW2uZ4Se_HgBZILQaSSuh9ADNCNU652rFlJBaSL8nMQ=&emci=ef006631-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f2006631-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) **A pledge is a commitment you make to vote on Election Day.** We know that we’re more likely to stick to a plan when we make a promise to complete it. | [Pledge to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46325023/349774567/-1321247555?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjAwNjYzMS0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bW2uZ4Se_HgBZILQaSSuh9ADNCNU652rFlJBaSL8nMQ=&emci=ef006631-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f2006631-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

Last week, President Biden made an urgent plea for Congress to reinstate the ban on assault weapons, strengthen background checks, pass red flag laws, and raise the age for buying semi automatic rifles to 21.
But here’s the problem: greedy GOP lawmakers are beholden to the NRA and gun lobbyists’ money. They would rather stand in the way of progress than fight to protect our communities.

clean_body: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. | = | We want to take this moment to join President Biden and voice our frustration with the lack of progress from Congress in the gun violence epidemic. We need to make sure Washington hears our voices loud and clear. When will enough be enough, Peter? Last week, President Biden made an urgent plea for Congress to reinstate the ban on assault weapons, strengthen background checks, pass red flag laws, and raise the age for buying semi automatic rifles to 21. But here’s the problem: greedy GOP lawmakers are beholden to the NRA and gun lobbyists’ money. They would rather stand in the way of progress than fight to protect our communities. President Biden made it clear that he would follow through on his promise to combat this epidemic and make our communities safer. But no amount of effort will end this crisis until CONGRESS takes action. Thanks for your support, Unite the Country = = * Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: A new enemy has emerged
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs7FV0khNr

Our country is currently facing a great threat. A new enemy has
emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate
their way to a transform
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7FV0khNr

Friend,

Our
country is currently facing a great threat. A new enemy has
emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate
their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I
would hardly recognize.

This
enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll
anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the
American way of life are clear and intensifying: stifling
dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted
version of history.

A group
that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but -
perhaps in an even more sinister way - tear down the American
spirit itself. They go after the family unit, parental rights,
traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education.

Over the
past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has
attempted to brainwash our children into thinking we live in an
evil, racist, irredeemable country.

We
listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater
all the while trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the
Constitution.

We saw
them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws
burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being
told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate."

We
watched Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of
truth - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through
the digital public square.

We
listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news
stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to
watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically
expedient time.

Well,
Friend, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines
is over.

This
enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate
boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional
institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched.
But all hope is not lost.

We The
People still have a say. We know the truth, you and I, about
America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to
defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives.

I am
choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with
freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen
to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it
down.

Together
we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in
the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the
world, and that they have an opportunity to continue making them
even greater.

If you've
been waiting for the right time to get off the sidelines and
fight for the rights you know were given to man by God Himself -
the time is NOW.

If you're
with me, Friend, chip in any amount to help me defeat this
enemy. I can't do it without you. I promise you; I will never
stop fighting.

Sincerely,
Ron
DeSantis

CHIP IN
NOW

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp4e118fgsc6mjb4bhoe8hckmep4s28hqk5iraqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieeor2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3gcar3bc74cprm1dtgshi62tr3e8o7as30e5obaslgc3ieec74emq71c70e1o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phheiqjadtie9j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5220qn51q5dvhaaiv2l2ltr1k1ka0v7ndrtg2g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieeor2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc85ocm3kpo0h0snn94krdd0idpq60rq1djf0ab8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieeor2c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6g423ad4o8fajie9bemed0vmsvengm1sbde8rv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1ctieeor2c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

| | Peter, As Andy’s Communications Director, I spend a lot of reading what folks have to say about him — both good and bad! — online. Most of the time, people have great things to say about Andy, and the work he’s done for Michigan, for the planet, for the labor movement, and on and on. But every day lately, there’s one account consistently fueling the flames of right-wing outrage and lies with their posts. And that’s AIPAC. The same group that’s funding Andy’s primary opponent (and hundreds of insurrectionists, too) posts incendiary lies online about Andy. They’re trying to intimidate us, and we have to come together to show them it’s not working. And while our opponent can rely on them for funds, we can’t and we won’t. We’re not taking any money from corporate PACs, and our most common contribution is $10. These are the building blocks for our campaign, and that means we need this team of grassroots folks like you joining together and supporting Andy. [_**It’s up to us to get a real progressive champion reelected to Congress who won’t be intimidated out of doing what’s right. Can you chip in $10 — or whatever you can — right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325732/349777717/478999150?refcode=em_20220609_f_j_fight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTExOWExZC0xZmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LysXAG29ZZcUFa7OUhc2WK0qOy98Fz-Cqc1oprAdAU=) There’s so much we’re fighting for that terrifies special interest groups — things like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a real plan on gun control, human rights for all — which is why they spend so much time and energy lying about Andy. It’s going to take all of us to come together and win — and we’re so glad to have you on this team. [_**If you can, chip in $10 right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325733/349777718/478999150?refcode=em_20220609_f_j_fight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTExOWExZC0xZmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LysXAG29ZZcUFa7OUhc2WK0qOy98Fz-Cqc1oprAdAU=) Thank you, and let’s go! Jenny Byer
Communications Director
Andy Levin for Congress

clean_body: We need this team to come together to show your support of Andy, and fast. | | | | | Peter, As Andy’s Communications Director, I spend a lot of reading what folks have to say about him — both good and bad! — online. Most of the time, people have great things to say about Andy, and the work he’s done for Michigan, for the planet, for the labor movement, and on and on. But every day lately, there’s one account consistently fueling the flames of right-wing outrage and lies with their posts. And that’s AIPAC. The same group that’s funding Andy’s primary opponent (and hundreds of insurrectionists, too) posts incendiary lies online about Andy. They’re trying to intimidate us, and we have to come together to show them it’s not working. And while our opponent can rely on them for funds, we can’t and we won’t. We’re not taking any money from corporate PACs, and our most common contribution is $10. These are the building blocks for our campaign, and that means we need this team of grassroots folks like you joining together and supporting Andy. = There’s so much we’re fighting for that terrifies special interest groups — things like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a real plan on gun control, human rights for all — which is why they spend so much time and energy lying about Andy. It’s going to take all of us to come together and win — and we’re so glad to have you on this team. = Thank you, and let’s go! Jenny Byer Communications Director Andy Levin for Congress | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Oz is the Republican candidate for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

With nearly 1,000 votes between them, a recount in progress, and claims of victory from both campaigns, former hedge fund CEO David McCormick conceded to Dr. Mehmet Oz. Now Oprah's most loathsome former-protégé is the Republican Pennsylvania candidate for Senate.

And you know who else has backed Dr. Oz? The 45th president of the United States.

This news has us feeling like we need to work double time to make sure this Trump-endorsed New Jersey resident does not have a seat in the Senate. We simply cannot have Dr. Oz making decisions about whether or not Americans can access legal abortion or if teenagers can buy automatic weapons.

We are fighting back against candidates with backwards conservative values like never before. Stand with us NOW to turn out the progressive vote and ensure we don't end up with Oz "representing" us in Washington.

Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=060922]

For years now, democracy in Pennsylvania has been under relentless attack by Trump lackeys trying to corrupt our fair elections with unfounded audits, anti-voter rights legislation, and by sowing doubt in voters.

We have to work together now to push back and protect our rights and our democracy.

Are you with us?

Over the last year-and-half, we’ve learned that our democracy is fragile and that our institutions do not defend themselves. **_We count on people to defend them._**

That starts with the men and women in uniform and in law enforcement who, generation after generation, have risked – and in some instances, given – their lives in defense of our nation. That obligation to defend the institutions that were passed down by those who came before us runs through every citizen.

**_As Americans_** , we each have a duty to uphold and preserve what we have been given. We can never forget that people – ordinary Americans – have fought and have died for this constitutional Republic.

They made the ultimate sacrifice so that our way of life and our freedom can endure, and we can pass on a better and more prosperous country to future generations. We can only do that by remaining faithful and loyal to the Constitution.

**_We must preserve the greatest constitutional Republic that has ever existed,_[and that is the fight we are asking you to join today. ](http://links.cheneyforwyoming.com/u/click?_t=4f637ae49cf94cbc8b14f320a8cb09ea&_m=a8299b9ef6654e44965874949024c236&_e=E7ByiUc6TdrTOCnwkvIh3ij9NCWYOe4FY1xOmTeyTFSndOHFN4d9QH5_89X_518WGUToes6MQrXsmKCFkcQkw6us305EM3G0bn2jSlUHi7hgiij6fFKIKzjwjeVRxN-F9-k5VWLmsf8It5XKKJNUqaUU7c7mXRytpUhVSaVk_woZEZZUt9nZNH4g6ruvahALFrUaIw6y1HIySQnHLdBl5kkaqOYBBmB8w7yTRxYb09tStImaqWcefeuzYjPgtJ7XYBFXz6ELm70ssu5kwCVItFTR5Nt6vXWAoGbypjh-gp1YiK_M_0oW-5FcDb6UDfunPVSYnqo5M3QhHM3jt0NkvVHPLMt2N1d6SaNIFhXsqHraFVaEDBChCQjpFsrX8ZXObpSYIJq1BmKKK8BMdEpUW-oZEd4Vipcp1-IjQV7tUPJCQ0w8_Cbl-nA_-2w5LrS2DM8dAsYIbe5XVebyAJ2CehoVqfwRuGm3131WOOXZ-uGxvzZMTUho2pBi8M2ZM74bypPu3wvw_WtiLtw-TIepGQ%3D%3D)**

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325847/349778072/-890400302?recurring=0&code=jtk3439-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyOWViZC0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vvf1nXra_sLYOR9wf-7kR3VZBIaoroGSz4h7Ye3hqyM=)

You're a key part of this campaign, friend, so I wanted to make sure you heard the exciting news: I filed to officially put my name on the ballot for U.S. Senate!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325848/349778073/167068810?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3439-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyOWViZC0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vvf1nXra_sLYOR9wf-7kR3VZBIaoroGSz4h7Ye3hqyM=&emci=5b4e9c9a-33e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=4e829ebd-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
This journey is so special to me, friend. Growing up, we didn't have much: Mom was a maid and Dad was a janitor. My mom always told me I was destined for _something special_ – but running for U.S. Senate was beyond my wildest childhood dreams. Mom saw something in me, though.
**I believe that only in America could a little Black girl growing up poor in the South in the 1960s end up having such an incredible story of opportunity. **
**[I'm running to expand my story of opportunity to more Americans – and to give Floridians the representation they deserve. If you believe in our historic campaign – in our movement to help working families get ahead – will you add your name to endorse my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325849/349778074/167068810?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3439-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyOWViZC0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vvf1nXra_sLYOR9wf-7kR3VZBIaoroGSz4h7Ye3hqyM=&emci=5b4e9c9a-33e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=4e829ebd-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325850/349778075/167068810?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3439-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyOWViZC0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vvf1nXra_sLYOR9wf-7kR3VZBIaoroGSz4h7Ye3hqyM=&emci=5b4e9c9a-33e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=4e829ebd-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)

I'm so proud of what our historic grassroots movement has accomplished so far. Because hundreds of thousands of people like you, friend, have joined this team, I'm _neck and neck_ with Marco Rubio in the polls, and James Carville has "ZERO DOUBT" that I can win.
**But this race is no cakewalk – and it's going to take all hands on deck to go up against Marco Rubio's dark-money machine.** **[Please, will you confirm your support by personally endorsing this campaign? It would mean so much to me to see your name on my list of supporters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46325851/349778076/167068810?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3439-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyOWViZC0xZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vvf1nXra_sLYOR9wf-7kR3VZBIaoroGSz4h7Ye3hqyM=&emci=5b4e9c9a-33e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=4e829ebd-1ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)**

clean_body: This is a special moment for me | | | = You're a key part of this campaign, friend, so I wanted to make sure you heard the exciting news: I filed to officially put my name on the ballot for U.S. Senate! This journey is so special to me, friend. Growing up, we didn't have much: Mom was a maid and Dad was a janitor. My mom always told me I was destined for something special – but running for U.S. Senate was beyond my wildest childhood dreams. Mom saw something in me, though. I believe that only in America could a little Black girl growing up poor in the South in the 1960s end up having such an incredible story of opportunity. | | I'm so proud of what our historic grassroots movement has accomplished so far. Because hundreds of thousands of people like you, friend, have joined this team, I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the polls, and James Carville has "ZERO DOUBT" that I can win. But this race is no cakewalk – and it's going to take all hands on deck to go up against Marco Rubio's dark-money machine. | | Thanks again for your support. If we keep up the good work, I know we can deliver better leadership to the people of Florida. – Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. body:
I’ve seen too many politicians whose votes don’t line up with their promises to the voters.| | | Fellow American, I’ve seen too many politicians whose votes don’t line up with their promises to the voters. **That’s not who I am, and it’s never who I’ll be.** **I’m a Christian, husband, father, Green beret, conservative, and a business owner.**

If we put in the work, we can bring this country back to prosperity. But if we sit by idly, we will NEVER reach our full potential. clean_body: I’ve seen too many politicians whose votes don’t line up with their promises to the voters.| | | Fellow American, I’ve seen too many politicians whose votes don’t line up with their promises to the voters. That’s not who I am, and it’s never who I’ll be. I’m a Christian, husband, father, Green beret, conservative, and a business owner. From fighting in Afghanistan to graduating West Point with a degree in nuclear engineering, I’ve always faced challenges head-on. While I was still on active duty, my wife and I started our business out of a double-wide trailer. Now, we work out of a 120,000 square foot facility. When I look at the current state of America, I’m reminded of my own story. If we put in the work, we can bring this country back to prosperity. But if we sit by idly, we will NEVER reach our full potential. I was inspired to run for Congress because the policies of the far-left are wrecking our economy, endangering Americans and our allies, and reducing opportunity for our children. I didn’t put my life on the line as a Green Beret to watch radical liberals cast aside our troops, bow down to our enemies, and lay waste to our economy. I want to bring the same spirit I brought to the battlefield as a Green Beret to Congress, Fellow American. Honesty. Patriotism. Grit. Those are the attributes I lived by every day as a Green Beret and I’ll do the same as a member of Congress. Thank you for support, Pat Harrigan Special Forces Green Beret | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Tom Fitton
subject: We’re Suing for Honest Elections!
body:
Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I ask you for your **personal approval** of our election integrity work because Judicial Watch has filed a federal lawsuit against Illinois to prevent state election officials from _extending_ _Election Day for 14 days_ beyond the date established by federal law.
We are arguing that that _Illinois election law violates federal laws_ , which define Election Day as "_the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November of every even-numbered year_."
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59098&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

In our complaint, we point out that the current Illinois election law allows vote-by-mail ballots received up to 14 days "after the polls close on Election Day" _to be counted as if they_ _were cast and received on or before Election Day_.

And, we argue:

"_By counting untimely and illegal ballots received after Election Day and diluting Plaintiff 's timely cast and received ballots, Defendants, acting under color of Illinois law, have deprived and are depriving Plaintiffs of rights, protected under the First Amendment and 14th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution_..."

We are supposed to have _Election Day_ , not _Election Weeks_ - or _months_!

We believe that Illinois' 14-day extension of Election Day beyond the date set by Congress _is illegal, violates the civil rights of voters, and encourages fraud_.

**That is why we are suing the Illinois State Board of Elections!**

**So I ask you again:**

**Do you support Judicial Watch continuing to fight for honest elections?**

**[And will you back up your approval by giving us your extra support with a _special tax-deductible contribution_?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59098&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59098&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

We note in our complaint that in 2020, _Illinois ' own data indicates that Illinois received 266,417 ballots statewide during the period from November 3rd through November 17th_ and that number "_could materially affect the unofficial election results_."

Extending Election Day not only violates federal law...it also opens the door to massive voter fraud, just like when states fail to clean their voter rolls between elections!

**[Will you give us your _personal approval_ and join us today by making a generous special tax-deductible contribution for honest elections**?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59098&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59098&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Thank you in advance for helping Judicial Watch advance all our programs and litigation to support the rule of law!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59098&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: DeSantis has amassed $100 MILLION for his campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
It’s all thanks to the far-right billionaires in his pocket. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46326050/349778822/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220609_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWZiMmUyMy0yMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8pxmpyyPE03mQRns1VLMLkHk-D9qnKSpIqZiObpLTw=)
---
Friend,

During his time in Tallahassee, Governor Ron DeSantis has failed Floridians time and time again. And if we don’t do everything we can to defeat him this November, the failures are only going to keep stacking up — both for Florida and for our entire country.
**FIRST,** DeSantis rejected any and every common sense reform that could help save lives and mitigate gun violence, instead prioritizing things like banning books and making it _easier_ to get and carry a gun.

**THEN,** his campaign launched a $5.3 million ad buy, attempting to drown our campaign out on the airwaves and buy his way to re-election.

**NOW,** thanks to the far-right billionaires he has in his pocket — who are also working to clear his path to the Republican nomination for president — **DeSantis has amassed $100 MILLION for his re-election campaign.**
**_[All that money is going to go straight to more misleading attack ads, and I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back. Will you pitch in $5 or more right now to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46326051/349778823/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220609_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWZiMmUyMy0yMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8pxmpyyPE03mQRns1VLMLkHk-D9qnKSpIqZiObpLTw=)_**

If we don’t stop DeSantis here in Florida this November, his next stop will be the White House. And from there he’ll be able to take his extreme, far-right agenda all across the country.

The good news is polling currently shows me either neck-and-neck or even slightly _ahead_ of DeSantis in a two-way matchup. But with all that billionaire money propping him up, a lot could change between now and Election Day.

**That’s why I need your support today, friend. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or more to help us defeat Ron DeSantis and finally build a Florida for _all_ Floridians?**

clean_body: It’s all thanks to the far-right billionaires in his pocket. | | | | = Friend, During his time in Tallahassee, Governor Ron DeSantis has failed Floridians time and time again. And if we don’t do everything we can to defeat him this November, the failures are only going to keep stacking up — both for Florida and for our entire country. FIRST, DeSantis rejected any and every common sense reform that could help save lives and mitigate gun violence, instead prioritizing things like banning books and making it easier to get and carry a gun. THEN, his campaign launched a $5.3 million ad buy, attempting to drown our campaign out on the airwaves and buy his way to re-election. NOW, thanks to the far-right billionaires he has in his pocket — who are also working to clear his path to the Republican nomination for president — DeSantis has amassed $100 MILLION for his re-election campaign. = If we don’t stop DeSantis here in Florida this November, his next stop will be the White House. And from there he’ll be able to take his extreme, far-right agenda all across the country. The good news is polling currently shows me either neck-and-neck or even slightly ahead of DeSantis in a two-way matchup. But with all that billionaire money propping him up, a lot could change between now and Election Day. That’s why I need your support today, friend. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or more to help us defeat Ron DeSantis and finally build a Florida for all Floridians? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Six steps the Biden administration can start taking right now to defend abortion rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We’re calling on the administration to develop a national plan to defend the right to an abortion. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46326184/349779362/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJmMjUyZi0yMWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UL_wMi3GasDB9VSEO2sPngW2ImjJ24CmcsHU2m-eMM=&emci=cd2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=cf2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
When it comes to abortion rights, we’ve got a five-alarm fire on our hands — and our entire federal government needs to act accordingly. I’m going to keep fighting to end the filibuster so we can pass a law codifying Roe. The Women’s Health Protection Act has already gotten through the House, and President Biden is ready to sign it into law. But I’m not stopping there. **Senator Patty Murray and I have led a group of senators calling on President Biden to immediately issue an executive order directing the federal government to develop a national plan defending the right to an abortion.** Here are six initial steps that federal agencies can consider:
1. Increase access to medication abortion and make sure people can get accurate information about their options there.
2. Provide resources for people who need to travel for abortions in other states — which could include vouchers for travel, child care services, and other forms of support.
3. Establish a reproductive health ombudsman at the Department of Health and Human Services who could gather and share information on how people can access reproductive health services.
4. Enforce the rules more aggressively to make sure that people getting their health care from Medicaid are able to get family planning services from the provider of their choice.
5. Clarify how websites or apps like period trackers that collect information related to reproductive health should protect sensitive health and location data — especially with the risks of selling this data in states that criminalize reproductive decision-making.
6. Explore ways to provide reproductive health services on federal property — especially in states with restricted access — and use federal resources to increase access, which could include paid time off and expense reimbursement for federal employees who are getting abortion care.

That’s just a starting point for what a whole-of-government response could look like. [_**If you agree that President Biden must take immediate executive action to defend abortion rights, add your name here. Let’s call for action as a grassroots movement, side by side.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46326185/349779363/-1231806869?refcode=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&ms=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJmMjUyZi0yMWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UL_wMi3GasDB9VSEO2sPngW2ImjJ24CmcsHU2m-eMM=&emci=cd2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=cf2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) We can’t wait. Abortion access is already completely eliminated in swaths of the country. The Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade, which could lead to 26 states instantly moving to ban abortion. And Republicans are already scheming to pass a nationwide ban if they take back Congress. As extremist judges and GOP politicians go all out to strip Americans of basic freedoms, President Biden can show that he’s doing everything in his power to fight back. He’s already issued executive orders to mobilize the full weight of the federal government on key priorities like advancing equity and racial justice, promoting voter registration and participation, and increasing competition in our economy. Now is the time for equally bold action to protect the right to an abortion. [_**Add your name if you agree: President Biden must use the power he has to put the whole federal government on the side of protecting abortion rights.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46326186/349779364/-1231806869?refcode=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&ms=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJmMjUyZi0yMWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UL_wMi3GasDB9VSEO2sPngW2ImjJ24CmcsHU2m-eMM=&emci=cd2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=cf2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46326187/349779365/-1231806869?refcode=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&ms=EMZ5T_E_ROE_20220609_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJmMjUyZi0yMWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UL_wMi3GasDB9VSEO2sPngW2ImjJ24CmcsHU2m-eMM=&emci=cd2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=cf2f252f-21e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are absolute _TRAIL‐BLAZERS_ , Peter:

**JOE BIDEN** is pushing for the BEST progressive policies to get this country back on track -- and he’s EXCEEDING expectations time and time again!

**KAMALA HARRIS** made history as the first woman Vice President -- and she’s bringing her incredible experience to make lasting change in Washington.

| | Peter - **Matthew DePerno is a fearless conservative patriot who has been leading the fight for election integrity in Michigan.**

| Matt has fought alongside our movement to end Governor Whitmer's tyrannical lockdowns and defend small businesses that kept their doors open.

_**President Trump endorsed Matt DePerno because he trusts him to Drain the Lansing Swamp and do what's right for We the People.**_

Matt and I are both political outsiders up against career politicians bankrolled by Hollywood elites and left-wing special interests. George Soros and his liberal allies are all-in on keeping Gretchen Whitmer and Dana Nessel in power - **and we need your help to fuel our grassroots campaigns to victory.**

Peter, can you rush a donation to send me and Matt to Lansing? Every contribution at this link will be split 50-50 between our two conservative campaigns --> [https://secure.winred.com/garrett-for-michigan/deperno](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=77cd171091&e=fe4b890356)

The Supreme Court’s draft decision would overturn the basic right to abortion and bodily autonomy. **I won’t mince words: a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions is under a full-fledged attack at the Supreme Court — and in states like New Hampshire.** Anticipating the end of Roe, partisan politicians across the country are launching unprecedented efforts to eviscerate reproductive rights. In state legislatures, Republicans have passed legislation defunding Planned Parenthood, banning abortion, and mandating unnecessary ultrasounds. **Republicans are also fighting harder than ever to flip swing seats like mine in New Hampshire to pack the Senate with anti-choice policymakers.** As a senator, I will always keep fighting to protect reproductive rights—no matter what attacks come my way—but New Hampshire is shaping up to be one of the top Senate battlegrounds in the country and I need your support. subject: Let’s start strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:

| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=a6bc0be1ec&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,
I just overcame a huge battle by winning the Republican nomination for California’s 47th Congressional District (one of the top targets nationwide for Republicans).

Now, we need to get back to work to beat the Democrat incumbent - Katie Porter - and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!
---
| [DONATE NOW TO BUILD ON THE MOMENTUM](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=83249dacdb&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO BUILD ON THE MOMENTUM")
---
| If we haven’t had the chance to meet yet, _**I’m Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare.**_** ** Here’s why...

I’m a staunch Republican who has fought back against the liberal California agenda my entire life. I’m building a movement for freedom in this liberal bastion, and _**huge momentum is on our campaign’s side. **_

Check it out:
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=ef3b4f4b77&e=8a657725d1)
---
| _“Orange County is looking like a potential problem for Democrats... Former state Assembly Minority Leader Scott Baugh would be a credible challenger for Republicans. The rating of the 47th District race has changed in the GOP’s favor.” _ The Democrat incumbent in the race, Katie Porter, is one of the leaders of the out-of-touch Progressive Caucus. Her sky-high spending is the reason we’re suffering under the weight of inflation right now. To make matters even worse, she recently suggested more abortion was the solution to keep costs down for families.

We cannot allow someone so cruel to win re-election.

But the truth is, Katie Porter is well funded. I mean, really well funded. She has nearly $20 million on hand to defend her seat, making her one of the best-funded Democrats in the entire country.

So, in order for us to win, we need to jump-start our campaign ASAP.

**That’s why today I’m announcing a 3-week effort to[ raise $100,000 from grassroots patriots across the country.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=99caacd1dc&e=8a657725d1) Will you be a founding donor of this new effort?**
---
| [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=0dfc6b455c&e=8a657725d1 "BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR")
---
| [HELP DEFEAT KATIE PORTER](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=46d9f90783&e=8a657725d1 "HELP DEFEAT KATIE PORTER")

| Your support is critically needed to take back the House and greatly appreciated! Let’s do this!

Sincerely,
Scott Baugh

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Control of Congress could be decided by these pro-choice women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We have just over five months until Election Day, and we're shifting Kim's campaign into high gear!With the Supreme Court poised to overturn Roe v. Wade, it’s never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46308277/349729381/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzYyNDVlNi0wNGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyWWcSTZmP97bfgLXvwBbRb0uB9XL55SHiEQhBr4nmk=&emci=d9a421c0-32e7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=336245e6-04e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, With the Supreme Court poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , it’s never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office. The same Republicans who championed overturning _Roe_ and defunding Planned Parenthood are just five seats shy of winning a majority in the House this November.

The Republicans’ position on abortion isn't just a threat to red states. Members of the Congressional GOP have called for federal bans that would make abortion illegal nationwide – without exception.

That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign, Lauren Underwood’s in Illinois' 14th District, Dr. Annie Andrews’ in South Carolina’s 1st Congressional District, Dr. Yadira Caraveo’s in Colorado’s 8th Congressional District, and 314 Action Fund – the only group working to elect Democratic scientists like us to office at all levels.

name: BilldeBlasio.com
subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?
body:
What if we told you Bill was out on the streets and in neighborhoods daily campaigning hard but we start at a significant resource disadvantage?
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/201?t=1&akid=162%2E39519%2EAn2m0Y)

Friends -
We are writing to ask if there is ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Bill de Blasio’s campaign for Congress in New York’s 10th Congressional District?
What if we told you Bill was out on the streets and in neighborhoods daily campaigning hard but we start at a significant resource disadvantage?
What if you knew that in Congress Bill would be one of the most effective advocates for our communities because he is from here, talks to people, and listens to their needs?
And what if you knew this was an FEC deadline month, which means when it’s over we’re legally required to report how much we’ve raised, and the number of donations we’ve received will be public as well?
Now we know that $3 doesn’t seem like an election-winning amount of money. But lots and lots of people are chipping in to this campaign and now they’re hoping you’ll do the same.
Today’s the day. Please:
[**Use this link to make a $3 contribution — or any amount you can afford — before Bill de Blasio’s FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close and we’re legally required to report our numbers.**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220609&t=2&akid=162%2E39519%2EAn2m0Y)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220609&t=3&akid=162%2E39519%2EAn2m0Y)**
Thank you,
De Blasio for Congress

De Blasio for Congress
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=162%2E39519%2EAn2m0Y). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.

# Telephone Town Hall Meeting Number 3
---
|
---
|
---
| On Tuesday Jun 7th, Erik hosted his third Telephone Town Hall Meeting. Erik was joined by phone with over nine thousand of our neighbors in Congressional District 7 to talk about the burning issues, and about the campaign to make Erik our representative in the U.S. House If you couldn't join us, you can listen to all the questions asked and answers given through the recording at the link below
Remember that primary voting is underway now and Erik would like to help you decide in his favor with your vote.
Click the button to hear more about Erik Aadland

# Who is formally endorsing Erik

| |
---
| Rick Perry--Former Governor of Texas and Former Secretary of Energy (Trump Administration) Ryan Zinke--Former Secretary of Interior (Trump Administration) and Chair of SEAL PAC Jack Bergman--Congressman/Lieutenant General (retired) Don Bacon--3-Term U. S. Congressman Nebraska Robert Simmons--3-Term U. S. Congressman Connecticut Paul Broun--4-Term U. S. Congressman Georgia Kerry Bentivolio--1-Term U. S. Congressman Michigan Fred Padilla--USMC Major General (retired) Anders Aadland--U. S. Army Major General (retired) Tom Duhs--U. S. Marine Colonel (retired) Combat Veterans for Congress--PAC Organization Sheriff Allen Cooper--Fremont County Sheriff Andres Pico--Colorado HD16 State Representative Rob Fairbank--3-Term Colorado State Representative Steve Schuck-- Colorado businessman and founder of Parents Challenge nonprofit scholarship foundation
Rob Witwer--Former Colorado State Representative and co-author of "The Blueprint"
Ted Nugent--Rock-N-Roll Legend and United States Patriot
Robert Wilkie--Former U.S. Secretary of Veterans Affairs and Assistant Secretary of Defense
Greg Moore --Former U.S. Senatorial Candidate
Gino Campana--Former U.S. Senatorial Candidate
Eli Bremer--Former U.S. Senatorial Candidate
Kevin Grantham--Fremont County Commissioner and former Colorado State Senator
Greg Brophy--Former Colorado House of Representatives & Colorado Senate Member
Bob Campbell--Teller County Commissioner
Dan Williams--Teller County Commissioner
Jason Mikesel--Teller County Sheriff
Mark Czelusta--Teller County Treasurer
Rachel Keane--"Conservative Momma" Vlogger, Blogger and Political Strategist

Denny Gillem-- Lt. Col. U.S. Army (retired) and host of "Frontlines of Freedom"
Lt. Col Lohmeier/SAMPAC-- SAMPAC Founder and Former Space Force Lt. Col.
---
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
|
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.

body:
|
---

| | I just received an emergency phone call that made my heart sink.

National Republicans just bought a shocking [**$1.6 MILLION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46327891/349786353/1129282168?refcode=20220609_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlkYzIxZi0yN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWwj1uRS-ElMvgjOMVt6pknrRNv6I6ExX7D4URCqLWI=) in TV airtime to sabotage my chances of unseating Don Bacon [**_\-- they’re terrified of the strong campaign we’ve built._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46327893/349786355/1129282168?refcode=20220609_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlkYzIxZi0yN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWwj1uRS-ElMvgjOMVt6pknrRNv6I6ExX7D4URCqLWI=) [**I’ll repeat that: Unless I can respond ASAP, our chance to kick Don Bacon out of office and hold the Democratic House will be ripped away in an instant.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46327895/349786357/1129282168?refcode=20220609_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlkYzIxZi0yN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWwj1uRS-ElMvgjOMVt6pknrRNv6I6ExX7D4URCqLWI=) [**_I hate to alarm you, but this $1.6M is the kind of money that decides elections. I refuse to let Republicans buy Don Bacon another term in power. But I only have until midnight to raise $1,270 to counter their attacks. So I’m asking: Is there any way I could count on your immediate $14 to rescue our historic chance to win this race? I have never needed your help more than I do in this moment >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46327897/349786359/1129282168?refcode=20220609_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlkYzIxZi0yN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWwj1uRS-ElMvgjOMVt6pknrRNv6I6ExX7D4URCqLWI=) I can’t overstate how important your support is. I’m running an honest grassroots campaign, and the next 9 hours will determine if I can fight back. At this very moment, National Republicans are devising a plan to spread lies about me to voters across Nebraska. [**_If I let these ads go unanswered, I will lose this race. I can’t do this alone, so I’m humbly asking: Can you rush $14 now, before it’s too late? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46327898/349786361/1129282168?refcode=20220609_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlkYzIxZi0yN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWwj1uRS-ElMvgjOMVt6pknrRNv6I6ExX7D4URCqLWI=) Every dollar spent now is critical in determining who will win this race.

The GOP isn’t wasting a second -- and we can’t either. I need you to chip in $14 now and I know we can catch up: | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46327899/349786363/1129282168?refcode=20220609_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlkYzIxZi0yN2U4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWwj1uRS-ElMvgjOMVt6pknrRNv6I6ExX7D4URCqLWI=)

Peter -

Let's all get on the same page about this week's _primetime, professionally produced, highly publicized,_ January 6th commission hearing; It's a fruitless dog and pony show to distract you from what is really important.

When 13 American service members lost their lives in Bidens botched Afghanistan withdrawal, where was the primetime hearing about that?

Where's the primetime hearing about insane gas prices? Or grocery prices? Or the formula shortage?

**I guess none of these are important enough to Democrats! All they are trying to do is distract you from the real issues at hand that they created!**

They know they don't have solutions to the real problems facing Americans, so they are wasting time! True leaders wouldn't waste time and tax dollars when there are real problems to solve. Or grocery prices? Or the formula shortage? I guess none of these are important enough to Democrats! All they are trying to do is distract you from the real issues at hand that they created! They know they don't have solutions to the real problems facing Americans, so they are wasting time! True leaders wouldn't waste time and tax dollars when there are real problems to solve. Republicans want to flip this seat. We’re fighting back.
#
Peter,
Republicans in Washington state and across the country think they have a chance to flip this Senate seat. They are strategizing at statewide events, investing in a field operation for the first time in recent memory, and taking money from national GOP megadonors.
**[The Washington State Republican Party – and their top-of-the-ticket candidate Tiffany Smiley – are out of touch with our state and our values. Contribute to Patty Murray now to help make sure she stays on track to reach voters and keep this seat blue. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328089/349787428/-212199872?refcode=pm_em_220609_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWYyMmJmYy0yOGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asY_918Y3ug2wg-IQLLIsZ75sWlgpf0FoQ7IhA8TlhQ=)**

That includes working to lower costs on everything from health care and child care to gas and housing–and protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions without interference from extreme politicians.
Tiffany Smiley is leading the Republican ticket in Washington state because she believes in their MAGA Republican agenda. That means raising taxes on workers and retirees, ending Social Security and Medicare, and pushing for a national abortion ban.
**[Republicans are trying to build momentum to flip this Senate seat – and with it, the U.S. Senate. We have to come out strong now and make sure that doesn’t happen. Patty Murray HQ

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: 2000 Mules Free Movie Night in Goochland
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
With Delegate John McGuire
---
| | | | | |
VA Delegate John McGuire
(Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)
---
| In May 2022, Dinesh D'Souza released 2000 Mules to expose voter fraud that threatens our republic. I received direct permission from Dinesh D'Souza himself to show you this film. We must educate fellow citizens.
---
|
---
| I invite you, your family, and your friends to join me with fellow patriots for a special showing of the movie 2000 Mules. This event is free. Registration at the door is required. Please RSVP to john@mcguireforvirginia.com
For those who cannot attend I strongly urge you to go to [www.2000mules.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QGs0ZyjmI3rDOiVbAmGMbS7w132nWw4uQEMwl0RbwmgaBU5q0hFn3kyfgIwd4RmYAjykJlr3Oa160tjdBCYQmokSoKLfjHg3JRBxGzdyAkdP24bJ7loHpLGlspC-KI1_PqLJiexzUVXEXTCMsw2mag==&c=7e0qi_WXArNWnZGlJuh1Ny9vNgpHv4j108MUmRLaRffdosnjvqWerQ==&ch=9AUzYiUkt5AN1A3Qok7pbeipzxkhSxXOU5qyeZrSSdcKV5MeXD9XYA==) and watch this movie.
Because of decisions made by the previous Democrat Governor Northam (who believed criminals are good and police are bad) crime is at an all time high. Thanks to Governor Northam, on July 1 close to 4,000 criminals will be released back onto our streets. In addition to rising gas prices, everything is more expensive in Virginia. Farmers and the working class are being crushed due to bad policy decisions. The democrats wanted to make our Virginia children less competitive by eliminating advanced classes. Governor Glenn Youngkin and the Republican majority House of Delegates are doing everything we can to fix these problems but Democrat senator Louise Lucas and the Democrat-controlled State Senate are trying to stop our agenda.
I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. We should be doing whatever we can to ensure our elections are SECURE AND SAFE! The media has nothing to say about the film 2000 Mules because they are just as corrupt as the politicians.
This year in the General Assembly we got rid of "Zuck Bucks", voting results will now be reported by precinct ,and we passed a law to update voter roles if you die or move. But my voter ID bill and other critical voter integrity bills are not making it through the Democrat State Senate.
For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
SD10 Counties: Hanover Powhatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland
---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: 5 very good reasons to chip in today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend —
Today, we have FIVE reasons you should chip in $5 to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our June FEC deadline.
Check it out:
1. Donald Trump just endorsed one of Mark’s opponents, MAGA-extremist Blake Masters.
2. Masters supports cutting taxes for billionaires so they don't have to pay their fair share, all while increasing the retirement age.
3. Masters supports a national abortion ban that would criminalize abortion entirely in this country and imprison abortion providers.
4. Masters has said it’s not true that women are paid less than men in this country, and that men are the only ones who work dangerous jobs.
5. And if Mark misses his fundraising goal this month, we could end up with an extremist like Masters representing Arizona in the Senate.

If Mark is going to have the resources he needs to win, then it’s going to take all of us chipping in what we can, when we can. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today? He needs your help to reach our goals and defend this seat from Trump and Masters.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220609-1-15&t=1&akid=3021%2E6688874%2EH3RNas)
We can’t afford to lose Mark’s voice in the Senate. Donating $5 is the most impactful thing you can do today to make sure he can keep on fighting the good fight.
