name: Seth Magaziner
subject: June is Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fifty-two years ago this month, the first Pride march was held to commemorate the Stonewall riots in New York City the year prior. Now, every June we celebrate LGBTQ+ Americans and recommit ourselves to the fight for equality.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328551/349789428/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0ZWE5Yi0yYWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6rv3fyFJVeTxLb1_r5j21rLlT9PUyO7kKQzIZRq3Ho=&emci=7a726576-99e6-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9b74ea9b-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Fifty-two years ago this month, the first Pride march was held to commemorate the Stonewall riots in New York City the year prior. Now, every June we celebrate LGBTQ+ Americans and recommit ourselves to the fight for equality.

I was proud to serve as the treasurer for the successful campaign for marriage equality in Rhode Island in 2013. But I know that Republicans in Congress are continuing their fight to undermine rights for LGBTQ+ Americans.

While I joined the fight for equality, my Republican opponent, Allan Fung, opposed marriage equality for same-sex couples. If we're going to continue to make progress for LGBTQ+ Americans, we can't afford to elect Allan Fung to Congress.

We've made progress in the decades since the Stonewall riots in 1969, but we still have a long way to go for true equality in our country. Dozens of states still don't have laws protecting the LGBTQ+ community from discrimination. And we've seen a rise in anti-transgender legislation being introduced in state legislatures across the country – including here in Rhode Island.

In Congress, I'll support legislation that protects the rights of all LGBTQ+ people and work to ensure that all Americans – regardless of who they love or how they identify – are given the same rights and protections.

**[This Pride Month, add your name to join me in recommitting to the fight for LGBTQ+ equality>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328553/349789451/1860232265?ms=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&refcode=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&source=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7UkmmexPXPweB3bkoZq%2Bbee8gi9xFTu3qpQB06uLZLt5spRl4NvyBjGV7pYR0tp1xus5Uz%2FqJTXAWrrqi0QK2Ng1JaLUJCjUTOP2MsV8KycYjdAmsdqH%2FarZFLtAwMiA2rzz4%2FHciYo1nBTmwkWXp8cFlPbzDxBa%2FB3T%2BqjDIEs%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0ZWE5Yi0yYWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6rv3fyFJVeTxLb1_r5j21rLlT9PUyO7kKQzIZRq3Ho=&emci=7a726576-99e6-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9b74ea9b-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328554/349789458/1860232265?ms=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&refcode=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&source=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220610_pride_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7UkmmexPXPweB3bkoZq%2Bbee8gi9xFTu3qpQB06uLZLt5spRl4NvyBjGV7pYR0tp1xus5Uz%2FqJTXAWrrqi0QK2Ng1JaLUJCjUTOP2MsV8KycYjdAmsdqH%2FarZFLtAwMiA2rzz4%2FHciYo1nBTmwkWXp8cFlPbzDxBa%2FB3T%2BqjDIEs%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0ZWE5Yi0yYWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6rv3fyFJVeTxLb1_r5j21rLlT9PUyO7kKQzIZRq3Ho=&emci=7a726576-99e6-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9b74ea9b-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)

Thanks,

Seth

Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combatting the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue?

But I know that Republicans in Congress are continuing their fight to undermine rights for LGBTQ+ Americans. While I joined the fight for equality, my Republican opponent, Allan Fung, opposed marriage equality for same-sex couples. If we're going to continue to make progress for LGBTQ+ Americans, we can't afford to elect Allan Fung to Congress. We've made progress in the decades since the Stonewall riots in 1969, but we still have a long way to go for true equality in our country. Dozens of states still don't have laws protecting the LGBTQ+ community from discrimination. And we've seen a rise in anti-transgender legislation being introduced in state legislatures across the country – including here in Rhode Island. In Congress, I'll support legislation that protects the rights of all LGBTQ+ people and work to ensure that all Americans – regardless of who they love or how they identify – are given the same rights and protections. Thanks, Seth Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combatting the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue? = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States

name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Geoff and Leah support a ballot question to repeal the bill giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
Plus... did you see the latest poll in the race for Governor?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BFLr1MJULQVKogA4yrJUkksC9Q-1PooLu9WLSWnjcmDjDWGqYYOjApp7nNQ-2_ASUR06tQmQmiYO5TUfZ9bxg0ZGz6WSO0QHRz6Z3lPO2XR0IBbB5yJC5qF2yTqxCRBUKDtt1doNkfNH1DrgEQcNPU95XmhUU0tQr_GnD55rKwvZQS5jpu3q_A==&c=9-bawPuvAsIu8J00LNUSOY4NVhzmfwWPe1OmMStjgXW5oDAeKDb1_g==&ch=tQ_bGAkDZR-KbFKynnTwfvbbPVcWME90TKR3MIYBn2bkn1isVDmbXQ==)
---
| Geoff Diehl and Leah Allen, the Republican party's endorsed candidates for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Massachusetts, said today that they will support a ballot question to repeal legislation giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants.
"This bill is a bad bill. It's not what I want, it's not what Leah Allen wants, and it's not what the people of Massachusetts want," Diehl said. "Governor Baker himself has noted concern about public safety and electoral security if the bill is passed. Leah and I will not sit by idly and watch the consequences of this bill take away the safety and democratic rights of Massachusetts residents. We fully support submitting this question to the people to give them a direct say in their future."
---
| [Show Your Support for Geoff'sCampaign for Governor!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BFLr1MJULQVKogA4yrJUkksC9Q-1PooLu9WLSWnjcmDjDWGqYYOjApp7nNQ-2_ASUR06tQmQmiYO5TUfZ9bxg0ZGz6WSO0QHRz6Z3lPO2XR0IBbB5yJC5qF2yTqxCRBUKDtt1doNkfNH1DrgEQcNPU95XmhUU0tQr_GnD55rKwvZQS5jpu3q_A==&c=9-bawPuvAsIu8J00LNUSOY4NVhzmfwWPe1OmMStjgXW5oDAeKDb1_g==&ch=tQ_bGAkDZR-KbFKynnTwfvbbPVcWME90TKR3MIYBn2bkn1isVDmbXQ==)

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BFLr1MJULQVKogA4yrJUkksC9Q-1PooLu9WLSWnjcmDjDWGqYYOjApp7nNQ-2_ASUR06tQmQmiYO5TUfZ9bxg0ZGz6WSO0QHRz6Z3lPO2XR0IBbB5yJC5qF2yTqxCRBUKDtt1doNkfNH1DrgEQcNPU95XmhUU0tQr_GnD55rKwvZQS5jpu3q_A==&c=9-bawPuvAsIu8J00LNUSOY4NVhzmfwWPe1OmMStjgXW5oDAeKDb1_g==&ch=tQ_bGAkDZR-KbFKynnTwfvbbPVcWME90TKR3MIYBn2bkn1isVDmbXQ==)
---
|
---
| The announcement comes as members of the House and Senate voted this week to override Governor Baker's veto of legislation to provide driver's licenses to illegal immigrants in Massachusetts. In his veto message, Governor Baker specifically indicated that the Registry of Motor Vehicles lacks the "expertise or ability" to accurately determine the identity of those who seek to obtain a driver's license based on foreign documentation. As a consequence, according to the Governor, "a standard driver's license will no longer confirm that a person is who they say they are." Governor Baker also confirmed that the bill "significantly increases the risk that noncitizens will be registered to vote" in Massachusetts elections. Diehl and Allen have been vocal critics of the bill throughout its consideration by the Legislature.
"Leah Allen and I are unwilling to accept the consequences of this bill, which based on all available evidence, will be to seriously undermine the safety and security of Massachusetts residents and to threaten the integrity of our elections," Diehl said. "We must exercise all available options to make sure this bill does not become law."
Diehl is no stranger to the ballot question process. In 2014, Diehl led the "Tank the Gas Tax" campaign in Massachusetts to oppose a bill that would have established permanent increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation. Allen was also a supporter of the effort at the time. The group collected over 100,000 signatures from voters in opposition to the tax increases, and as a result the tax increases were rejected by voters at the ballot box that fall. As a result of Diehl and Allen's efforts, drivers across Massachusetts have saved money every time they have filled up at the gas pumps since then.
---
|

**Harriet Hageman endorsed by Gun Owners of America**
---
Gun Owners of America (GOA), a non-profit organization representing two million Americans and dedicated to preserving and defending 2nd Amendment rights, today announced its endorsement of Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming. Hageman is challenging incumbent Rep. Liz Cheney, who has stopped representing Wyoming and focused all her energies on her personal war on President Donald Trump and working for Nancy Pelosi on the illegitimate January 6th Committee.
Mark Jones, GOA National Director of Hunter’s Programs, issued the following statement:
“Hageman earned GOA’s support because of a 100% score on our Second Amendment rights survey and her long history of standing against federal over-reach through her work as a constitutional attorney. She has a track record of fighting for Wyoming against an out-of-control Federal Government, and those qualities have never been more important than now given the threats we face from the Biden Administration.”
Hageman issued the following statement:
“It is an honor to receive the support of such a stalwart organization as Gun Owners of America, who are tireless advocates for the constitutional rights of Wyoming residents and all Americans. The 2nd Amendment is about more than just hunting – it’s about the ability of law-abiding people to protect themselves and their families. In Wyoming, we understand and revere these rights, and as a constitutional attorney I know they are under greater assault today than perhaps at any other point in our history.
“By doing Nancy Pelosi’s political dirty work on the January 6th Committee, Liz Cheney has entered a partnership with the very people who are trying to strip these rights away. She has completely lost the respect and trust of Republicans in Congress, and the Democrats will discard her as soon as she’s no longer useful, so she can never be effective for Wyoming again. When I am the next congresswoman from Wyoming, I will fight against government intrusion and defend all the God-given rights we’re born with as free people under our Constitution.”
###

clean_body: | | | | Harriet Hageman endorsed by Gun Owners of America Gun Owners of America (GOA), a non-profit organization representing two million Americans and dedicated to preserving and defending 2nd Amendment rights, today announced its endorsement of Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming. Hageman is challenging incumbent Rep. Liz Cheney, who has stopped representing Wyoming and focused all her energies on her personal war on President Donald Trump and working for Nancy Pelosi on the illegitimate January 6th Committee. Mark Jones, GOA National Director of Hunter’s Programs, issued the following statement: “Hageman earned GOA’s support because of a 100% score on our Second Amendment rights survey and her long history of standing against federal over-reach through her work as a constitutional attorney. She has a track record of fighting for Wyoming against an out-of-control Federal Government, and those qualities have never been more important than now given the threats we face from the Biden Administration.” Hageman issued the following statement: “It is an honor to receive the support of such a stalwart organization as Gun Owners of America, who are tireless advocates for the constitutional rights of Wyoming residents and all Americans. The 2nd Amendment is about more than just hunting – it’s about the ability of law-abiding people to protect themselves and their families. In Wyoming, we understand and revere these rights, and as a constitutional attorney I know they are under greater assault today than perhaps at any other point in our history. “By doing Nancy Pelosi’s political dirty work on the January 6th Committee, Liz Cheney has entered a partnership with the very people who are trying to strip these rights away. She has completely lost the respect and trust of Republicans in Congress, and the Democrats will discard her as soon as she’s no longer useful, so she can never be effective for Wyoming again. When I am the next congresswoman from Wyoming, I will fight against government intrusion and defend all the God-given rights we’re born with as free people under our Constitution.” | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I humbly ask for your help fighthing for my freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Dragged off a plane and shackled in leg irons by the FBI...
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
Peter,
---
Many of President Trump's closest associates have been subpoenaed by Pelosi's Congress, _myself included._
---
One of those associates, Peter Navarro, the genius behind President Trump's America First trade deals, was just **_DRAGGED_ _OFF_ _A_ _PLANE_** and **_SHACKLED_ _IN_ _LEG_ _IRONS_** and denied food, water, and an attorney.
---
Navarro was treated like a political prisoner by the Biden-Harris FBI.
---
...**_The same FBI that launched a dawn raid on my apartment._**
---
After I just testified before Pelosi's Congress last month, the attacks against Trump associates are getting more and more intense. I need your help now more than ever before.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as the Biden-Harris FBI seeks to treat former Trump associates as political prisoners.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554076:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554077:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554078:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554079:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554080:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---

What I've described sounds like something you'd hear from the Soviet Union... not America.
---
Here's what Tucker Carlson had to say:
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
The Biden-Harris Administration has thrown every old principle of justice and the rule of law straight out the window.
---
Worst of all, their attacks are getting nastier by the day, and I think we all know why...
---
...Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi know they're plummeting in the polls. 80% of Americans think our nation is on the wrong track. I'd love to meet the 20% of voters who think America is prospering, but I have a hunch they're mostly dead voters...
---
Suffice to say, Biden, Kamala, and Pelosi are expecting a BLOODBATH in the midterm elections this November.
---
_So, as a last-ditch effort to hold onto their power and exert their executive force, they've resorted to publicly turning former Trump associates into political enemies and have weaponized the FBI to carry out their plans._
---
Their displays of power are intended to _intimidate_ us.
---
**But as the man who served as President Trump's attorney and successfully fought for his freedom, I don't give in to intimidation tactics.**
---
Hear it from President Trump himself:
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
While I fought for President Trump's freedom, I now have to humbly ask for your help fighting for _my_ freedom.
---
After seeing someone like Peter Navarro shackled in leg irons, I worry what's to come next.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as the Biden-Harris FBI seeks to treat former Trump associates as political prisoners.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
[CONTRIBUTE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554075:6kYooxoLN:m:1:3317145305:B25EE543557CBC615ED0208EC1647CF3:r)
---
---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Friend,
Based on a recent Arizona Auditor General's report, Arizona misappropriated more that $20 million in federal COVID-19 relief and gave away another $1.6 billion to fraudulent claims.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_060922_AuditorReport [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_060922_AuditorReport]
When COVID-19 hit, Kirsten was focused on how we could provide relief to working families, keep our communities safe, and best support small businesses.
Based on this auditor's report, it seemed like Governor Ducey and his right-hand man Juan Ciscomani were more concerned about how the federal relief could solve their OWN problems.
Arizona deserves representatives who fight for THEM. That's exactly who Kirsten is. Will you support her campaign by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_060922_AuditorReport]

name: Dale Wilcox
subject: This is still your country
body:
If Joe Biden and the mass immigration lobby get their way, the most dangerous border crisis in American history is about to go f
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoruigrbg1j3v9h2r3i709l1jnomgpa87b34gje0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tblcmpn5dj1m1r75d73csp62dpmmdg64t5gs5pm1obnmqo6eotledg70ohicdrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplmhjrcor664pb6o37m2qmash5u)
You won't hear about this on the 5 o'clock news...

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqnv3flb0jh3074ja08ddrib2plk2fnp9b5c3588_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h2bs) Fellow American,

If Joe Biden and the mass immigration lobby get their way, the most dangerous border crisis in American history is about to go from bad to worse.

As you may have heard, Joe Biden repealed the Title 42 order: the Trump-era order that allowed border and immigration officials to immediately deport illegal immigrants to curb the spread of COVID.

It was set to expire May 23rd, and thanks to intervention from the Louisiana federal court, it's still in place for the time being.

But the final decision hasn't been made – and with your help, we can stop the America Last agenda in its tracks and keep President Trump's Title 42 order in place.

My name is Dale Wilcox, and I'm Executive Director & General Counsel of the Immigration Reform Law Institute (IRLI).

**We're representing the Texas Attorney General in his lawsuit against the administration, and we need your help right away.**

[**Will you donate $42 or more to IRLI right away and give us the ammunition we need to reinstate the Title 42 order, and protect our borders?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdn19qpjevcieadrmik14mgiu1rll7rq4h2k1ar8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h2bs)

**We're already living through the worst border crisis in American history thanks to Joe Biden, and the system is about to break.**

The last thing this country needs is an influx of illegal immigrants, when we're already running low on the crucial supplies Americans need.

In fact, in the face of a baby formula shortage, Joe Biden's administration turned around and sent formula to illegal immigrants at the border.

We can't sustain a system that rewards lawbreakers while citizens suffer.

[**That's why I hope I can count on your generous donation of $42 or more to IRLI right away, and help us save the Title 42 order and stop the Biden administration in its tracks.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztjr9b7njb87h854f7fmhnoee2lqs4pibdoc7pu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h2bs)

I've wanted our border secured and our laws enforced for a long time – and I'm sure you have too.

IRLI is one of the few organizations doing real work with real world consequences to secure our borders and restore the rule of law.

We take immigration battles to court, and fight for the American people.

Just this past December, we forced the Biden administration to reinstate Donald Trump's Remain in Mexico policy – so instead of being released into the United States and skipping their court dates, illegal immigrants must stay in Mexico while our government processes their cases.

This was a HUGE win for the American people that made us all much safer.

Our work has never been more important, but nothing we do is possible without patriots like you.

We have 120 active cases – and we're 5-0 against the Biden administration.

[**Will you donate to IRLI today, and help us claim our sixth victory?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znkvaukuhr09ukmtu23jog7iddutulfhhqvjjsd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h2bs)

Joe Biden's own Department of Homeland Security estimates the number of border crossers will at least triple without the Title 42 order – and you know what that means.

The real numbers will be much, much higher.

The Title 42 order was one of the most effective deterrents at our border, and without it, we might as well not have one at all.

I hope I can count on your support today, and that you'll stand alongside the attorneys at IRLI and Texas's Attorney General to save this crucial policy and restore our country's rule of law.

Sincerely,

**Dale Wilcox**
Executive Director, & General Counsel

P.S. This is still your country, and you can still protect it. [**Please make a generous donation of $10, $25, $42 or more to the Immigration Reform Law Institute, and help us save the Title 42 order before Joe Biden takes a wrecking ball to our border.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zku98ui16psf77ta5be67nmd4ic5tjsb59m0ocg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h2bs)
[Donate to IRLI ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z86ad12fcv147lkm37lueijqnjb0920mhniif8r0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g6cor6c1h2bs)

clean_body: If Joe Biden and the mass immigration lobby get their way, the most dangerous border crisis in American history is about to go f You won't hear about this on the 5 o'clock news... | Fellow American, If Joe Biden and the mass immigration lobby get their way, the most dangerous border crisis in American history is about to go from bad to worse. As you may have heard, Joe Biden repealed the Title 42 order: the Trump-era order that allowed border and immigration officials to immediately deport illegal immigrants to curb the spread of COVID. It was set to expire May 23rd, and thanks to intervention from the Louisiana federal court, it's still in place for the time being. But the final decision hasn't been made – and with your help, we can stop the America Last agenda in its tracks and keep President Trump's Title 42 order in place. My name is Dale Wilcox, and I'm Executive Director & General Counsel of the Immigration Reform Law Institute (IRLI). We're representing the Texas Attorney General in his lawsuit against the administration, and we need your help right away. We're already living through the worst border crisis in American history thanks to Joe Biden, and the system is about to break. The last thing this country needs is an influx of illegal immigrants, when we're already running low on the crucial supplies Americans need. In fact, in the face of a baby formula shortage, Joe Biden's administration turned around and sent formula to illegal immigrants at the border. We can't sustain a system that rewards lawbreakers while citizens suffer. I've wanted our border secured and our laws enforced for a long time – and I'm sure you have too. IRLI is one of the few organizations doing real work with real world consequences to secure our borders and restore the rule of law. We take immigration battles to court, and fight for the American people. Just this past December, we forced the Biden administration to reinstate Donald Trump's Remain in Mexico policy – so instead of being released into the United States and skipping their court dates, illegal immigrants must stay in Mexico while our government processes their cases. This was a HUGE win for the American people that made us all much safer. Our work has never been more important, but nothing we do is possible without patriots like you. We have 120 active cases – and we're 5-0 against the Biden administration. Joe Biden's own Department of Homeland Security estimates the number of border crossers will at least triple without the Title 42 order – and you know what that means. The real numbers will be much, much higher. The Title 42 order was one of the most effective deterrents at our border, and without it, we might as well not have one at all. I hope I can count on your support today, and that you'll stand alongside the attorneys at IRLI and Texas's Attorney General to save this crucial policy and restore our country's rule of law. Sincerely, Dale Wilcox Executive Director, & General Counsel P.S. This is still your country, and you can still protect it. | | (C) Immigration Reform Law Institute | 25 Massachusetts Ave NW UNIT 330, Washington, DC 20001 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

Thanks to you, I am pleased to announce I was the top vote-getter in Tuesday's election and will be advancing to the General election in November. Thank you for your support!
I am excited to kick-off my General campaign and continue to talk about the critical issues and challenges that face our nation, like passing commonsense gun safety legislation, protecting a woman's right to make her own reproductive choices, and combating climate change, to name a few.
[**_Will you help us start off strong by contributing today?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xQw0a_weB_YdIVGa0PPpHzSt6b_iHMgviwcfbkBv5mE=/gjSitz00AacYLRa8YI2nz6TEUFwzY8o1JGjbuC_7mGI=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
I will be facing a right-wing opponent this November, who would like nothing more than to flip our district and add one more Republican seat to the House. With so much on the line, we can't afford to lose even one Democratic seat this fall. [**_You can do your part to save our Majority by chipping in today._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xQw0a_weB_YdIVGa0PPpHzSt6b_iHMgviwcfbkBv5mE=/gjSitz00AacYLRa8YI2nz6TEUFwzY8o1JGjbuC_7mGI=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Thank you again to everyone who volunteered, contributed, or voted last Tuesday. You are doing your part to keep our democracy strong, and I appreciate your support. I look forward to staying in touch as we continue on to November.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Donald Trump, his allies, and FOX News hosts have continuously tried to dissolve the January 6th committee, intimidate members, and spread slanderous lies. So we’re polling 20 Pennsylvania supporters to show public support for Liz Cheney and other members of the Jan. 6 Committee. Please submit your grade below: | | | | | Listen – Liz Cheney, Bennie Thompson, Jamie Raskin, and the entire January 6th Committee are getting close to holding Trump and his allies accountable for their role in inciting a riot at the Capitol. But far-right Republicans are attacking them left and right. Even Fox News Host Tucker Carlson has labeled the committee “illegitimate” several times. | | | | | Your input is valuable, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. **With your support, we can elect these two real, proven environmentalists as our next Governor and Lt. Governor and make Maryland a national leader in tackling the climate crisis.**
Thank you for your support,
Team King

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: John King <info@johnkingforgovernor.com>
Date: Thu, Jun 9, 2022 at 12:17 PM
Subject: Thank You
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Peter,
All I can say is thank you. I am so grateful to all of the amazing grassroots donors who have stepped up over the last few days. Whether you gave for the first time, pitched in again, or shared a donation link, my team and I are humbled by the support we have received.
I also wanted to let you know about a brand new major development: **Sierra Club Maryland just endorsed our campaign!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46329931/349796574/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220609-fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220609-fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220609&&&&utm_content=fr_nd&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=1f8b50cb-2ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhiNTBjYi0yZWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FMef_nwOiz5Z9mGBiul3UNPrkKgg8sLamJWzPosM9Bo=)
**This is a huge deal, Peter — this endorsement confirms that we truly are the environmental ticket in this race.** And unlike most politicians, our bold ideas aren’t just promises.
I plan to tackle the challenges of climate change as governor with a whole of government approach that includes creating good green jobs while shifting to renewable energy, achieving net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2035, and more.
Thank you again for all of your support before Tuesday night’s deadline. I look forward to what else this team will accomplish in the next few weeks, and I’m honored to have you on our team.
John King
P.S. clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw John’s message: Sierra Club Maryland just endorsed our campaign! = | Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw John’s message: Sierra Club Maryland just endorsed our campaign! This is a massive endorsement for us, and proof that John’s message is resonating across the state. Now we need YOU to join us as a green-grassroots supporter as well, Peter! | | With your support, we can elect these two real, proven environmentalists as our next Governor and Lt. Governor and make Maryland a national leader in tackling the climate crisis. Thank you for your support, Team King \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: John King <info@johnkingforgovernor.com> Date: Thu, Jun 9, 2022 at 12:17 PM Subject: Thank You To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter, All I can say is thank you. I am so grateful to all of the amazing grassroots donors who have stepped up over the last few days. Whether you gave for the first time, pitched in again, or shared a donation link, my team and I are humbled by the support we have received. I also wanted to let you know about a brand new major development: Sierra Club Maryland just endorsed our campaign! = This is a huge deal, Peter — this endorsement confirms that we truly are the environmental ticket in this race. And unlike most politicians, our bold ideas aren’t just promises. I plan to tackle the challenges of climate change as governor with a whole of government approach that includes creating good green jobs while shifting to renewable energy, achieving net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2035, and more. Thank you again for all of your support before Tuesday night’s deadline. I look forward to what else this team will accomplish in the next few weeks, and I’m honored to have you on our team. John King P.S. subject: Democrats have turned our country into a laughingstock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
But restoring Republican control in the United States Senate will put us on a path to prosperity once again | Friend,

What the progressive Left has done to our country is a shame.

**_Under President Trump and Senate Republican Leadership_** , our country was winning like never before, our southern border was the most secure it’s been in history, and authoritarian regimes and Communist nations __FEARED__ us.

But, in two short years, Biden and his radical Left-wing handlers in Washington have destroyed our economy, flung our southern border open to violent criminals and drug dealers, and have allowed international chaos to erupt throughout the world.

The ONLY way we can save our country from the incompetence of the Left is by **restoring Republican control of the United States Senate** THIS November.

My team told me I should specifically reach out to you before anyone else because **_you’re a true America First patriot_** dedicated to beating the Left this November. _Will you stand with Senate Republicans to SAVE our great nation from the Left?_

**[Please contribute $35 or more AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to restore our Republican Majority in the United States Senate.>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f51f2d62cbcb4574b13de28461efe971&_e=cQZfRUMzMdSQ-W2qqouMd9EPqO2AQbgaYN8aubyq5z962j52k9btdNjlLQeTlmACoVuECiqJYv88HQC-UJkc18SIlEqmqNiZ4RofrWQ147mp5g8AFWWkXFmcrNQzcGUmFYqK6h5oi3vMnQsN56ci0dQupumD01mdz32wIH7IjKSf4m8B6KBRdkNGQTASO9bGz1ASUKzIOeqO0CKgQ_fJvbElL6NOxomSFVqSfLToAqcXZY-AmBGI2vOk2x7urATBJ_-K3mSpeDaECR_PJwAOrwCjok7pcheJ1hZ9eZWqj5PQxR3R23nJW1MwV5RjRIZ_9_QpfPGHCKHtDBzix1kBP4t6-6By2L-LUKmJ3NQqtXCuaf9sNsuhaK9mgKSB_GERphMfxTgplTa4kFtGzHK2lgaywxzq9nfgDmUdgXkwSvn2Y0F9e_0pPQFjZ7BlB_hApqy2aVJZg7kcozZzeKiYtw5tAyT54jYty_GrIfKMYbsdiA5QvLcyV0qoXL2C2K6F)**

name: Will- Campaign Manager to Marc Molinaro
subject: Marc needs your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
Peter, will you endorse Marc for the #1 race in the country?

---
| Good afternoon, Peter,

With the special election finally called for August 23rd, we need to rally behind Marc Molinaro and [**it starts with your endorsement.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=0354bc32a3fd467e9605c0ad6a20f233&_e=S4se22kBYaV0eLp-cpzS4N3b-SXf1XBpuWkvNnYsZSHTuY7TuxBo12eI8bgi-jJ9T0s_l9qQlXH0-X_DXm3J0EdZe8jrKUdKHd-Ht4USDv_fRtFg38sq_0hCn_D01XsiW8qBKMpeCNUgUTV7dOt7nA1DdtL8Fc9a81fY6GpAWPfD4LJubksYATsr5reGBHTmBPj5eUUCzMGHtBY2jMsL6yo8_ReyTJrPVxg4P49yaRtF0xUBfRKviR7aIxlYCO4jBCSJKSFFbccLt7dKz4XxMoistlT8DUgnbnmj9YFXGvPBc34RreJFZhjfS_DCS6DrixSFnjDtAsiEZwHVEfxx_LpSX_vcuDRo7UxHPzQK6p6DQDlPZ4lYVsqP7-aPZIGKm-LfVflUJ_4PRYonyJzfdBIPEn0IxsBWP5e5LqIuEBcO4CnLzNbvK47F09nvbiyjXhkWSbFeFNdr8Ru0bRYVX3tO2zz7wVUYkeqjsaH35z37HJs_b6C-myhwdQ1tEjoi4MKps-SUfJVJtkt7m1d7MA1Tk9Q-V3W8zIpVtZK7sD-LtWG8l_ec1FiO-2e-5Hv3)

name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: 🤬 NRSC is back up with false attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to share a quick update with you after the NRSC was forced to pull down their ad for lying about Cheri.
#

Hey team, I wanted to share a quick update with you after the NRSC was forced to pull down their ad for lying about Cheri.
This week they’re back on the air with a new version that’s just as misleading and deceptive. They refuse to be honest because Republicans know their only chance of winning is with dark money and dirty tactics.
Cheri’s made it clear that this campaign will not back down from a tough fight and will stand up for what’s right -- working to earn every vote, from the mountains to the coast in all 100 counties.
[**But we need you to help us fight back. So will you please pitch in $3 for Cheri today to make sure we have the resources to set the record straight and flip this seat?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=1&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=2&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
Thanks! Means a lot to have you on the team!
\- Travis Brimm
Campaign manager
* * *
Huge news: The NRSC was just caught lying about my record on the air, and in response, TV stations across North Carolina pulled down their attack ad against me.
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=3&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)
This is extremely rare in campaigns, but it speaks to how dirty the NRSC is going to play to try to win this seat. So we must continue to fight back.
[**Please make a $3 donation to our campaign right away to fight back against our opponents’ misleading smears and make sure voters know the truth.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=4&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)
We said from the start that these attacks were false and that we would not stand down and allow them to lie about me or my record of upholding our Constitution and keeping North Carolinians safe.
Fortunately, in this case, the TV stations agreed and pulled the ad for having “false statement and language about North Carolina Democratic candidate Cheri Beasley.”
We are the only Senate challenger they are attacking, and they’ve already crossed the line with these false attacks about my record.
Truthfully, this will not stop the NRSC. Another misleading attack ad is undoubtedly in the works — with a real chance they try to attack me even harder.
But let me be clear: We are going to fight harder than you’ve ever seen from a Senate campaign in North Carolina. I’ve never backed down just because the challenges are steep or hard.
We’re going to need you to have our back every step of the way. So I urgently need to ask for your help to make sure we’re ready to fight against whatever Republicans throw at us next.
[**Please rush a $3 donation to our campaign today to make sure we can fight back and set the record straight.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=5&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2574?c0=cb-em-june22.k8UGZr&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=24&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2575?c0=cb-em-june22.3JVybC&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=25&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-june22.76_gl_&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=26&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-june22.j6DaSN&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=27&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-june22.f1GelR&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=28&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-june22.kRUvwA&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=29&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**
---
****
We have Republicans scared. That’s why they’re coming at us so hard and so early. Their super PACs are willing to say WHATEVER it takes to try to defeat us.
Thank you so much for standing with us.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220609-1-t1&refcode2=1023.357359.P7Zk3V&t=30&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V)**

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=32&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=33&refcode2=1023_357359_P7Zk3V&akid=1023%2E357359%2EP7Zk3V) today to help us make history.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: the importance of accountability
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330805/349800479/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=82462fc2-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=KlJs2a8jWnZPF8NP4IPZqBqNFnrA2AYmM47S%2FFvk9tGxq1cDxPLqRnNk3Dj3PDGc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQ2MmZjMi0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNev27yGCZKsEfkcIri65npFJ8rFaHExDjTl4Zy7l5E=)
As the January 6th Committee begins its public hearings this evening American viewers will see widely different realities depending on what channel they turn to. Right-wing cable networks like Fox don’t plan to cover the hearings at all — or only as a prop to reinforce their own line that the 1/6 attack on our democracy was an “insignificant” event.
Each day that goes by we drift further apart — and it gets harder for our political system to address the challenges we are facing.
But the biggest danger today is that Americans will get so frustrated and depressed that they “check out” and stop participating in our electoral system. That is something Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans would like to see happen — and we need to make sure it doesn’t.
That is why it's more important than ever that we engage every voter in this 2022 election.
**[But I can’t do this without you: will you consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can right now to send me back to the Senate this fall and support our work to help elect Democratic candidates in tough fights across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330806/349800480/-16251802?refcode=&refcode2=82462fc2-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=KlJs2a8jWnZPF8NP4IPZqBqNFnrA2AYmM47S%2FFvk9tGxq1cDxPLqRnNk3Dj3PDGc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQ2MmZjMi0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNev27yGCZKsEfkcIri65npFJ8rFaHExDjTl4Zy7l5E=)**
I disagree with those claiming that “most Americans have moved on” and are no longer interested in the January 6th attack on our democracy.
While Americans are rightly focused on kitchen table issues, health care, COVID, their kids' schooling, and more, the hearings on the conspiracy to overturn our legitimate election results are vital to getting accountability and purging violent extremists from our politics.
I'll be watching tonight — and am so proud of all those serving on the Jan. 6 Select Committee, especially our own MD representative, Jamie Raskin.
Onwards,
Chris
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330807/349800481/-16251802?refcode=&refcode2=82462fc2-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=KlJs2a8jWnZPF8NP4IPZqBqNFnrA2AYmM47S%2FFvk9tGxq1cDxPLqRnNk3Dj3PDGc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQ2MmZjMi0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNev27yGCZKsEfkcIri65npFJ8rFaHExDjTl4Zy7l5E=)**

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord St. Ste 202
Kensington, MD 20895
[www.vanhollen.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330808/349800482/-1239931627?refcode=em220609ext&refcode2=82462fc2-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=KlJs2a8jWnZPF8NP4IPZqBqNFnrA2AYmM47S%2FFvk9tGxq1cDxPLqRnNk3Dj3PDGc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQ2MmZjMi0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNev27yGCZKsEfkcIri65npFJ8rFaHExDjTl4Zy7l5E=&emci=13d1598e-1de8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=82462fc2-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/TEA1Q9xCUkuy1_rSEP0JMQ2?unsubscribedata=g74kFjMe74sAAWQTTQSk7%2FlW%2BpEjN7wi%2F4dgmtrU3KsIcTZ2z1ilV67Ktgd%2BrNvGIc%2B7eD185d56vZmkRcneD%2BvAtIHVUdcWdicDjgYBDPnstoGpxNzyjW8yJUNJRmsbBn8FxFy2CCviZ9LLWhYHwm0gOnCDYuIl%2B%2BQq5sjJbMnGG95JC5C%2FhSpaETlE4f%2BZI4%2F%2BW5npytBbVEzG3GiKI%2B0iFtq5oD1lHO5qKXEPpZvngbN1vVEctc24Fav2iQMXKKVKRJJSXM3NWJbv%2BRoMlBIB5zk%2BLewOw9UWSe20ox%2FTHmjIFPrdpq7CxIWn2MiTilACSDn2Q3WTMjFJAY5BhcCI%2B%2F3WgasMNr%2BCBwwb1AR%2BYfeuKgsFpzh7g%2FO5D1IF1eCKHt7QzovXG14Zt1oSOo3matAWoHw%2B7qq7PoUlBUU%3D), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: Why I left the Republican Party (a Pride story)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I walked away from bigotry and didn’t look back

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330863/349800684/333259033?refcode=em_220609_pridestory&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220609_pridestory&refcode2=7839d1e5-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM5ZDFlNS0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ak03QUjoblAKgvJwfx8R6JTmDXwt48c1RlEGSZwzlu4=)
---
| | Dear friend, You might not know this, but I was co-chair of the Lancaster County _Republican_ Party in the 1980s. I was energized by the opportunity to make a difference in the lives of working families, small business owners, and neighbors who needed a helping hand. It was a role I gratefully accepted because I love Nebraska, and I thought it was the best way to use my voice for good. **But when my nephew came out as gay in 1989 — and I had the audacity to love him anyway — I was ostracized by some of my fellow Republicans.** It was a wake-up call I couldn’t ignore. _How could we claim to serve _all_ Nebraskans, yet believe that simply loving someone of the same gender makes a person unworthy of support from their own family?_ These were people I once called friends — but they turned their backs on me for _refusing to turn my back_ on a family member. **It was then that I decided: No matter the party, and no matter the person, I would always fight with every bone in my body for _every_ Nebraskan’s right to have a voice and to live authentically.** I changed my party affiliation because I couldn’t support the marginalization of people like my nephew. And despite the different letter behind my name, my commitment to equality before the law has remained steadfast. Years later, when my oldest son came out, there was never a question in my mind that I would unconditionally love and celebrate the person he is. My son Taylor inspires me to work even harder for the rights of all LGBTQ+ Americans — I’m fighting as fiercely as only a mom can. **I walked away from bigotry and didn’t look back. I know I’m not the only Nebraskan who has made that journey.** **_I’m running for Congress to represent the current reality of our communities:_ Nebraskans are warm, diverse, and open-minded. It’s time we had a representative who reflects our values.** You can use your vote — and your voice — to stand up for equality. **[Join our winning coalition to elect a Congresswoman who knows that pride always has a home in our beautiful state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330864/349800685/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220609_pridestory&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220609_pridestory&refcode2=7839d1e5-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM5ZDFlNS0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ak03QUjoblAKgvJwfx8R6JTmDXwt48c1RlEGSZwzlu4=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly._ | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330865/349800686/333259033?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_220609_pridestory&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220609_pridestory&refcode2=7839d1e5-30e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM5ZDFlNS0zMGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ak03QUjoblAKgvJwfx8R6JTmDXwt48c1RlEGSZwzlu4=)

| | Let's cut to the chase: **Patty Murray, my friend, and colleague who represents Washington State, is one of the Senate's most powerful advocates for reproductive rights and women's health care.** It should come as no surprise that Mitch McConnell and his wealthy GOP donors have made Patty a top target in this fall's election. **[We need to stand with Patty if we're going to hold our pro-choice leadership in the U.S. Senate. Please chip in $3 now to make sure we can stop McConnell's attacks on her.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330884/349800763/-1190358442?refcode=2022-06-09-pattymurray&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=afd24618-31e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmQyNDYxOC0zMWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2pUELuqyQYkYUJ5XU5mmVNE2pwAD_XkCTYGyRCL7nY=)** Like you, I was devastated to read the leaked Supreme Court opinion that would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ this year. And I was _livid_ when I heard Mitch McConnell casually talking about how, if Republicans take over Congress, Republicans plan on doing everything in their power to implement a nationwide abortion ban. **This isn't a drill.** Congressional Republicans have announced, in no uncertain terms, that the heartless draft decision doesn't go far enough, and promised to take it further. We should believe them. Patty understands what is at stake. She is a staunch defender of women's health care and reproductive rights and fights tirelessly each day to level the playing field for working families in Washington and nationwide. I've seen her commitment and passion for public service firsthand while serving alongside her in the Senate. **[We can't afford to lose her in this fight. Will you chip in $3 to support Murray and me this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46330885/349800764/-1190358442?refcode=2022-06-09-pattymurray&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=afd24618-31e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmQyNDYxOC0zMWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2pUELuqyQYkYUJ5XU5mmVNE2pwAD_XkCTYGyRCL7nY=)** With the Court decision due any day, we have only one option this year: do _everything we can_ to elect a pro-choice majority in November, so we can finally pass a definitive law protecting the right name: Team Kilmer
subject: We only get one 🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

This week, we celebrated World Oceans Day and World Environment Day.

Being born and raised on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek has seen first-hand the value of our fragile ecosystem and the natural resources that we rely on. Our livelihoods depend on the health of our environment, and we must take every measure to protect it - not just one week out of the year - but every day.

Last year, Derek relaunched the Puget Sound Recovery Caucus to ensure that the federal government steps up to support regional efforts to protect our Sound, restore populations of endangered species, and uphold Tribal treaty rights. This partnership has enabled recovery efforts like:

✅ Preventing pollution from stormwater runoff;
✅ Protecting and restoring biodiversity and;
✅ Restoring and re-opening shellfish beds.

As a father, Derek wants to make sure that the future brings a robust environment where the next generations will be able to thrive and enjoy the same economic opportunities that were afforded to past generations. The battle against the climate crisis has never been more pressing, which is why he's pushed for increased funding for clean energy and is advocating for a bipartisan solution to the acidification of our oceans.

**We only get one Earth, and we have a moral obligation to keep fighting for real solutions that protect the environment and its inhabitants.**

clean_body: Peter, This week, we celebrated World Oceans Day and World Environment Day. Being born and raised on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek has seen first-hand the value of our fragile ecosystem and the natural resources that we rely on. Our livelihoods depend on the health of our environment, and we must take every measure to protect it - not just one week out of the year - but every day. Last year, Derek relaunched the Puget Sound Recovery Caucus to ensure that the federal government steps up to support regional efforts to protect our Sound, restore populations of endangered species, and uphold Tribal treaty rights. This partnership has enabled recovery efforts like: ✅ Preventing pollution from stormwater runoff; ✅ Protecting and restoring biodiversity and; ✅ Restoring and re-opening shellfish beds. As a father, Derek wants to make sure that the future brings a robust environment where the next generations will be able to thrive and enjoy the same economic opportunities that were afforded to past generations. The battle against the climate crisis has never been more pressing, which is why he's pushed for increased funding for clean energy and is advocating for a bipartisan solution to the acidification of our oceans. We only get one Earth, and we have a moral obligation to keep fighting for real solutions that protect the environment and its inhabitants. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. body:
Mastriano’s vile comparison is blatantly false

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331040/349801406/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=)
| **[Fellow activist, we need to talk about Doug Mastriano’s statement on the prevention of gun violence. It’s exactly the kind of far-right extremism we’ve been warning could take over in Pennsylvania if we don’t expand and mobilize the electorate for this election and beyond. More on his statement in a moment — but first, will you consider making a donation to help us register and mobilize the Commonwealth’s Black, brown, and young voters? →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331041/349801407/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331042/349801435/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=) Following the recent massacre in Uvalde, Texas, a video surfaced from 2018 of Doug Mastriano comparing advocacy of common-sense gun violence prevention to Nazi Germany. This is a false comparison similar to one previously declared historically inaccurate by the Anti-Defamation League. Mastriano’s response? He doubled down, shared the video himself, and called it historically accurate.

Gun violence and white supremacy have had a long history together in our country. So when far-right extremists make false comparisons between the prevention of gun violence and Nazi Germany’s confiscation of guns from Jewish people and other political opponents, it’s important to be clear:

**They’re certainly not trying to protect our youth,** for whom guns are now the number one cause of death. In Uvalde, a single man, armed with an AR-15, massacred 19 children and 2 school teachers, making it the second-deadliest school shooting. **It was after this massacre that Mastriano doubled down on his statement.**

**They’re not trying to protect Black and brown people,** who are a majority of the victims of gun violence, whose children are 14 times more likely to be murdered with a gun than white children of the same age, and for whom “gun rights” only exist in theory. An explicit white supremacist armed with an AR-15 recently massacred ten Black people in Buffalo. And when the “justice system” looks the other way while Black and brown people are murdered for the suspicion of simply having a gun, these self-described “gun rights advocates” are overwhelmingly on the side of the murderer. If they truly believed all Americans have a right to be armed, they would be outraged by every single one of those murders. Clearly, it’s not just about guns.

Senator Doug Mastriano is the Republican nominee for governor in the upcoming November general election in Pennsylvania. Our work in expanding the electorate and engaging and empowering communities of color and the youth to not only register to vote but to vote in every election is now more important than ever. We must work hard to register communities who have historically been left out of the political process, vote our values and elect the legislators that reflect the change we want to see in Pennsylvania.

**[Will you join us today in standing up against white supremacy by making a contribution to our work to expand the electorate and give equal representation to Black, brown, and young voters?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331043/349801436/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331044/349801437/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=)
In solidarity,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331045/349801438/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331051/349801443/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331054/349801447/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220609MastGuns_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H68l7q2naBtjRFLGGEEqhsoacTf5jMi8CiLU8QU0skE=)**_

name: Fight for Progress
subject: Help re-elect Sarah McBride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Sarah McBride is a true trailblazer.

|
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331062/349801483/-160320121?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220609-em-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0NA27qx1hW-JG-Ag-CrJIqOQzx8S74bwv8k25JixHG8=)
---
| Sarah McBride is a true trailblazer. She made history as the first openly transgender person to address a major political party convention in 2016, and her wins did not end there. In 2020, Sarah became Senator McBride, marking her the first openly transgender State Senator in the country.

Among her many victories include:
1. Passing a landmark non-discrimination law in Delaware
2. Working with state leaders to expand healthcare covered by Medicaid
3. Championing legislation protecting vulnerable youth from child abuse

She is a true leader that stands by the people. [_**That is why we are asking you to split a donation to State Senator McBride’s campaign today to ensure she continues to serve Delaware.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46331063/349801487/-160320121?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220609-em-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhY2Q2YjI1LTMyZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0NA27qx1hW-JG-Ag-CrJIqOQzx8S74bwv8k25JixHG8=)

clean_body: Sarah McBride is a true trailblazer. | = | Sarah McBride is a true trailblazer. She made history as the first openly transgender person to address a major political party convention in 2016, and her wins did not end there. In 2020, Sarah became Senator McBride, marking her the first openly transgender State Senator in the country. Among her many victories include: 1. Passing a landmark non-discrimination law in Delaware 2. Working with state leaders to expand healthcare covered by Medicaid 3. Championing legislation protecting vulnerable youth from child abuse She is a true leader that stands by the people. = Sarah continues to do the work necessary every day in the hope of making history for every working family in her community. And it is finally happening | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk4o_6uN7d9QQqRiBnUaBRZyzzc_vujmnjNXeNeoUlWxCIMM4h7732foBsAb428AHZTV253rFCuFyUI3IMRh48AAgn3LooSzKBFHW4VoMtglkolnaQqlfvD571kGIJlKe4LWRlU-z4uv7TpxqW0THXNnOnyCNbwQWzlrUr9FpKtnphDj2llRPQ1myjjzfrDEI1YePlCqTKh8J1r6jjnm5Tw3/3mr/7GYvYGK4RNyXrbdtBPEy2Q/h0/CAUVU65lUljfd5ujkNy6o-UAIAJs0dLRaQmPbCC54to) Dear Team, The West Side of Chicago has been left behind over and over and over again. The elected officials representing these communities take us, the voters, for granted, and national politicians use our neighborhoods as punching bags. But after years of fighting and organizing, people are finally listening:
* “What we’re dealing with in the district is everyday gun violence. The root cause of that is poverty. clean_body: And it is finally happening | | | Dear Team, The West Side of Chicago has been left behind over and over and over again. The elected officials representing these communities take us, the voters, for granted, and national politicians use our neighborhoods as punching bags. But after years of fighting and organizing, people are finally listening: “What we’re dealing with in the district is everyday gun violence. The root cause of that is poverty. Until we start striking at the root cause of that and investing in prevention, we’re going to continue to see this everyday gun violence.” - Kina Collins, “I think that change happens at the intersection of public policy and activism. I want to tell that story of the everyday working-class people in the Illinois 7th, but I also want to make sure that I’m informing policy and shifting the way that we write policy to include those voices.” - Kina Collins, The fight we are waging is for the people closest to the pain all across IL-7, and I am so proud that our organizing work is shining a light bright enough to force the largest newspapers in Chicago to shift their focus in our direction. If you walk the streets of our communities you can see what’s at stake. Schools are closed, hospitals are underfunded, gun violence is ever-present. The West Side of Chicago has been left behind for decades. On June 28th, that is going to change. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: The madness ends when WE stop it

body:
The far-Left and Biden have destroyed President Trump’s historic America First agenda, and we must win this November to save our country | Peter,

What the progressive Left has done to our country is a shame.

**_Under President Trump and Senate Republican Leadership_** , our country was winning like never before, our southern border was the most secure it’s been in history, and authoritarian regimes and Communist nations __FEARED__ us.

But, in two short years, Biden and his radical Left-wing handlers in Washington have destroyed our economy, flung our southern border open to violent criminals and drug dealers, and have allowed international chaos to erupt throughout the world.

The ONLY way we can save our country from the incompetence of the Left is by **restoring Republican control of the United States Senate** THIS November.

My team told me I should specifically reach out to you before anyone else because **_you’re a true America First patriot_** dedicated to beating the Left this November. _Will you stand with Senate Republicans to SAVE our great nation from the Left?_

name: Ben Carson
subject: Conservative solutions to the racial divide in America
body:
Racial tensions have certainly been on the rise in recent years. And unfortunately, it has led to a growing divide in America.

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=b6662185b91f406fad206ab40130eed5&_t=DpCUZei02Qv092dBL3skbrAgb8J_NAFhgjYk-N2MU9IeTKtyB85dZSB9r1c4mvjCHj0uQIoyOcuDCTafV_2bigm973JFggU3uyqtsB1ILto3GxtH9RUmiJq2r9mGqw8waarvCfNNNnk89qf3Mwo751nlFaaCKILj-A8FAM4ehqZZVFZQr4NvthRyO0iQKwhAuBU1dvluHmjlRHdIHF-8ErjeJAXJEnAif5bauMQxJ_g%3D)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, Racial tensions have certainly been on the rise in recent years. And unfortunately, it has led to a growing divide in America.

But it doesn't have to be this way.

Many of the arguments made in support of ideas like Critical Race Theory (CRT) ignore reality. They promote victimhood and perpetuate the divide that has already gripped our nation. We all need to push back against these divisive and harmful beliefs.

To better equip you, we've created a new eBook that provides answers to many of the "questions" that those promoting CRT like to use. Please get your copy of _5 Answers to Critical Race Theory._

I'm emailing because I really want to make sure that you get your free copy today. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b6662185b91f406fad206ab40130eed5&_e=66tyAhMZI0EXlHRN2xflc8XyH2in-YkV3e3YFmeNVXxyMSxcStjkq2vd2NEhVGc-4Z8NE-xUcORxMs2cTrm-aosencMbu296KeH0dDVu9ntlZNDSDJ06wTFkyZePtaLXpWsfSYGAdt4Lgh_LKHp72mBe81_99nmVb5f7JE1zxd5k1g13UFwDVhHVPJnc2mJ7IY4a7xH5rmILu7Q8uMsoTPpe7LDtjuZl6Hl0mVXF0Yt8mXgRA2WeVWP3UrOI3GwMcWfcbMQ2D5KA4Aj3ZmLPiGI-757ev-u1rJcmzNAB5i5G6WToaM4c97EEuetd_SQguRe7NkJJfn-RWXLu2STA26k4tz2LcLr0ak6OAtuRpfF2EcuUrUbjeo_pM73XMSKXJ5gC-8r47nNMd1G_CzwPxX59mMLNp1HzqwTguiFadrrbVCaALeaOAobHAWDIA-2-AXavPUcKEzxdH3LeEG8epQ%3D%3D) Inside, you'll learn some of the history and solutions to
* Racial disparities of the wealth gap
* Criminal justice biases
* And housing issues

We also take some time to provide common sense, conservative solutions to many of the issues related to the racial divide in America.

Please be sure to get your free copy of this important eBook right now. I really think you'll find the information valuable. You can access it using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/5-answers-to-crt/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b6662185b91f406fad206ab40130eed5&_e=66tyAhMZI0EXlHRN2xflc8XyH2in-YkV3e3YFmeNVXxyMSxcStjkq2vd2NEhVGc-4Z8NE-xUcORxMs2cTrm-aosencMbu296KeH0dDVu9ntlZNDSDJ06wTFkyZePtaLXpWsfSYGAdt4Lgh_LKHp72mBe81_99nmVb5f7JE1zxd5k1g13UFwDVhHVPJnc2mJ7IY4a7xH5rmILu7Q8uMsoTPpe7LDtjuZl6Hl0mVXF0Yt8mXgRA2WeVWP3UrOI3GwMOV4xsAwkj2ozJsrm8H8vAXqrB7iWXvfAgZe1vGoHKIv038dB4dw1nhBxaWXCRxGtGEGK8DzjndBGGLL0M4EpVRAsY_zgacMztwz5w4n1tsczvgakZUGHa7tiTuQnrm5PtQfjmpIb9I5Mhneqy-fS7vU6V1IQshl1SQjmQyFaZSu2CpvOyCJn5T2BvdOp5XRSzqFd5hR0t8Rup6aMFyRjRA%3D%3D) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I’m assembling an A-Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
I am a proud Florida native, Colonel in the National Guard, former White House and Pentagon policy advisor, small business owner, and proud dad.| | | [](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=3526ae73d20141a0ad093ac795f509a6&_e=mjEPlv6qEd1YwVzl5y8NUpYvl3z66m32Dk6BzYolHftTqd9n1Lnrt6deMBtKMj8NJTGnbEoAoVDCGSMnpUxBwtG6zasiEyqLBYaRZ9hnxateJ6dGj4ab415G6eHsIceR0W44QsMbY5AY87C_7jITPq5UHI-cTN0iBvOE6V0pgISLDAC3JPyloQScHE3HiUi6igz0cBC47mjwFpAHDWOoOgapbgSarO71bXctQsKyRDYcWiknLocdMrP5TYcfAV-TDZm7Cm91c2t-Wxw9XALztUHGyMTNF75z6eiB4c4wL8PvTb33sxMAGv-91qiltqQ83iu9xzSzP32ea2ErJ_MTacmZQpt327XeVLTG3VCTIC5kR797V9quWaREEyhAHe4YOtM7lJ-MIy4VJEUw08noew%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,
---
I’m a proud Florida native, a combat decorated Green Beret, a former Fox News Contributor, and a small business owner.

Serving my country is all I’ve ever really wanted to do. I’m the son and grandson of Navy chiefs, and I want to create the same great great future for my daughter that their hard work and courage created for me.

Today, Congress fails to get enough done because it’s filled with too many career politicians - they haven’t built a business from scratch or fought terrorists on the ground.

We need a new generation of leadership in Washington of servant leaders who lead by example with their values and deliver results, not excuses.

My commitment to you now is the same as it was to my fellow soldiers in combat: **I will serve with everything I have, and I will do it honor and duty**.

But just like in the battlefield on the Middle East, I know that no great challenge can be met alone.

**[That’s why I’m assembling an A-Team of patriots to help bring CHANGE to Congress and preserve the freedoms that so many generations have fought for.](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=3526ae73d20141a0ad093ac795f509a6&_e=mjEPlv6qEd1YwVzl5y8NUpYvl3z66m32Dk6BzYolHftTqd9n1Lnrt6deMBtKMj8NJTGnbEoAoVDCGSMnpUxBwtG6zasiEyqLBYaRZ9hnxateJ6dGj4ab415G6eHsIceR0W44QsMbY5AY87C_7jITPq5UHI-cTN0iBvOE6V0pgISLDAC3JPyloQScHE3HiUi6Lr1IjoiF3bKe1BUezghkjJFlKc81oPJOoBiilKRxWsXarBM8DmkwFTu9sW-fEL1OWJz9rAm6tatq4J_xmDBNAn2fqMVFxxoCA6J7DO7OHe0KMfyWAlIMNkzCzUw-4t8KepsTCXzFFO1N0EOpnhOgUjRFJYtP_IeTkCv2Nzrlc-CdFILud0S_F2Ij9oiCM7ZDuxjRAJeN41DttM8DA1rsBQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**< < JOIN THE A-TEAM >>**](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=3526ae73d20141a0ad093ac795f509a6&_e=mjEPlv6qEd1YwVzl5y8NUpYvl3z66m32Dk6BzYolHftTqd9n1Lnrt6deMBtKMj8NJTGnbEoAoVDCGSMnpUxBwtG6zasiEyqLBYaRZ9hnxateJ6dGj4ab415G6eHsIceR0W44QsMbY5AY87C_7jITPq5UHI-cTN0iBvOE6V0pgISLDAC3JPyloQScHE3HiUi6WcL-o6clszH93cTOC86_HY9EqtqkztCL4vswjQU0zYDPlVzXSWUvPmfOyOBwQbwfoEFPomtHbi3ofukEKGLLxIS43KbmAR4_cq5rZJxmmC-NWC0R-ONSdQEqFLZVlcrL4g9zzTXDbhuEFLCBPcHzkwudCrIQUD-XewbwFc9lxHfWsm-34tagQ8LLb_52LWKwX3usNGrKo7d40Pj8YrX6BQ%3D%3D)

Together, we can take on our enemies and continue to make America the greatest nation on earth.

In Service,

name: Beto HQ
subject: What we need done by June 30
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We wanted to make sure that you heard about the voter contact goals our
campaign has set for June. Keep in mind that our organizing team is
ultimately in charge of building the movement of Texans needed to elect
Beto in November.

* 100,000 doors knocked
* 100,000 letters written
* 1,000,000 calls made

These are BIG goals. But we’ve built one of the biggest teams of
volunteers Texas has ever seen. If we have the resources to equip them
with the tools and training, we’ll be able to reach at least a million
Texas voters before July 1.

Election Day is officially
less than five months away. We need to reach our June goals to put
ourselves in a winning position, and we need your support to get that
critical work done on schedule.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220609-1.wGW2CV&refcode=ema20220609-193153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=193153%2E444211%2Ed-vJEe ]Will you donate $3 today to fund our June organizing
plans and help elect Beto? If you and just a few others from
18326 pitch in, we’ll be closer to fully funding an entire
month of door-knocking, letter-writing, and phone banks.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220609-1.wGW2CV&refcode=ema20220609-193153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=193153%2E444211%2Ed-vJEe ]Contribute $3

This is a highly competitive election that could come down to a margin of
just 1 or 2 percent, which means we need to organize across all 254
counties of Texas and reach every voter we can.

Every single day, we’re putting in the work and making direct contact with
tens of thousands of voters. But it takes a LOT of resources, and we can
only keep this work going until Election Day if grassroots donors like you
continue to invest in our statewide organizing program.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220609-1.wGW2CV&refcode=ema20220609-193153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=193153%2E444211%2Ed-vJEe ]Please be one of the donors we need to fund our June organizing work
and help elect Beto as the next governor of Texas.

Thank you for your support,

Beto HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=193153%2E444211%2Ed-vJEe

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
