name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd60g1kdiv6f1bm8cvrosggg279r0r9tk746hhqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe0sji61ie9cb0s9jm9d3gcgrm4c9lm9hr8sjicqp62d74edircsr3mgpncorgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj3cppjcdjr4sb66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgm1o33cdi62oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm6llktsdt71cqugm3p58s6luc9la3p7lgmk62q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zojuefvpvmm2mtehlndr0rinrcqmpn0novt8k4mg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvo6mqj7iemk34j97fl2bfj2r24f1imkbr1c5ni8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgn18d5k49ccqsol2niumsq98tajjqik3ve5k8jg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z603lma2lh6he1mqd8gf45lmr96ctgj0q6bbvct0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuho5nud7u7ba7kqfbigj93ojtn0r3369jo1t1hg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqrf9846ogve00t6itbnmr86kigjrb10c0qdb2k8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkt32ujf0a5s6oknr4fuajm5hpjcmi52jec8u4gg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zkpcjpihjl05ds2nb01u494u7q6hggkc3o017nt0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3bcb3gmq2eb8cqqefe8ec7edqptv2hq7mnsc73g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g66or4c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: January 6th: The committee hearings tonight are a political witch hunt.
body:
January 6th: The committee hearings tonight are a political witch hunt.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BVH-6B77OR74LcsTN0k1xhkqdL1jb0CinMHnRK1C8RJaSjNrMq43DEkQBCZjIlUh3ojwxQBlkQxRjIgs7P0ZXTe6jMdYQokTQQpbQemSHN7qQt-4NBuZSO67fI-Mx0yNPMt4WP66wA0=&c=CjvUqySsB23ifTHGJ-EUIf0K5hMSExmPpYxivciekYNSxutHbGXMdw==&ch=tNNU-hwXIbTQi8akryUDjY-LG2RfAHkW0dd_OYzdcKkdIqIbnzjQ6g==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: June 9, 2022 January 6th: The committee hearings tonight are a political witch hunt.
Joe Biden is well into his second year as President, and Democrats still have nothing to talk about other than President Trump and the January 6th Witch Hunt. "The hearings tonight are theater to change the topic from their flailing agenda", said Jake Evans, the America First candidate endorsed by President Donald Trump for Georgia's 6th Congressional District. "The Democrats, with their allies in the national media, are seizing the airwaves during primetime to drive a one-sided message resulting from a one-sided investigation led by a one-sided committee," Jake said. "As Democrats fail to tame inflation and high gas prices, and as Americans continue to rebel against wacky leftist policies that have given free reign to violent criminals, they are unable to provide a vision for the future. So, what do they do? They focus on the past. This is a phony hearing just like the Russia Hoax and sham impeachments on President Trump." Campaign Manager, John Mason Long followed with "Rich McCormick has embraced the endorsement and support of the group that represents the most liberal Republicans, like Adam Kinzinger, who's happily playing the Democrats' game." "Republicans in the 6th District have a special opportunity this month to reject weak-kneed RINOs and elect Constitutional Representatives. As a member of the new majority in January, I'll fight to disband this show trial and get to work on the issues that are putting a squeeze on hard working Americans." \- Jake Evans

clean_body: January 6th: The committee hearings tonight are a political witch hunt. | | | | == | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: June 9, 2022 January 6th: The committee hearings tonight are a political witch hunt. Joe Biden is well into his second year as President, and Democrats still have nothing to talk about other than President Trump and the January 6th Witch Hunt. "The hearings tonight are theater to change the topic from their flailing agenda", said Jake Evans, the America First candidate endorsed by President Donald Trump for Georgia's 6th Congressional District. "The Democrats, with their allies in the national media, are seizing the airwaves during primetime to drive a one-sided message resulting from a one-sided investigation led by a one-sided committee," Jake said. "As Democrats fail to tame inflation and high gas prices, and as Americans continue to rebel against wacky leftist policies that have given free reign to violent criminals, they are unable to provide a vision for the future. So, what do they do? They focus on the past. This is a phony hearing just like the Russia Hoax and sham impeachments on President Trump." Campaign Manager, John Mason Long followed with "Rich McCormick has embraced the endorsement and support of the group that represents the most liberal Republicans, like Adam Kinzinger, who's happily playing the Democrats' game." "Republicans in the 6th District have a special opportunity this month to reject weak-kneed RINOs and elect Constitutional Representatives. As a member of the new majority in January, I'll fight to disband this show trial and get to work on the issues that are putting a squeeze on hard working Americans." \- Jake Evans | | == | == == | | | | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. name: United Rural Democrats
subject: We called on Dem candidates, and they answered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
They're up against the GOP in less than 5 months | | | Hi Peter – We're less than five months away from the start of early voting, and Democrats in rural communities are up against a tidal wave of GOP resources. Our organization is all about giving Democrats a boost and a fighting chance in frontline districts. So we called on Democrats running in those communities, and they answered our call. **_[But before we introduce you to these incredible Democratic candidates, we also want to ask if you'll join us in helping their campaigns. Will you chip in $5 or more here to support rural Democrats?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc0zZXQuP5iaFLRM2K0eGWMqPn05zKC-tjXxdHtEF6gXAlKT7rCj0q_T30-k8qRESQBAo_FI_mtc-O3-nwOWY76h_e8fj7UU-UJI1m6_kso9eoQGLW2VzNwfSizYzOO18h7WfI2bFRYqHCZjIoqquUAN59uuDgtdKV470XV5BRNgECdrZOgytMJSSpM4rebYnp450ubM0h1CsPPo7LzWmPkA-ZikaqW5vvZBoAmzy9qAHsomHrkwGQV25xMfcLll3HKJk-Vd7bXa8hHeMQfKrkQfjknAUtLidkG56rzird2dqMnAgIbwkbDnBkrlomWMjid6ODnVdG93HG_Juo3P0zbmTM2vxYOyhkqTNtbDkCp_-s7iKFepa4376tgpVgNUB_/3mr/Q4D4KZHnRk2WNJSIA2Plsw/h0/GlTPrxuy6N7UbCAiAfro0R457sijVPTwVtXLu3jDZdc)_** We heard from Kevin Eckert, who's running for South Carolina's 5th Congressional District in large part because of infrastructure issues. Kevin told us that "The roads stink, a lot of places don't have internet access and there are water and air quality issues. We need better." We also heard from Mark Pinsley. Mark is running for Pennsylvania State Senate, and he's worried about our democracy. He told us that "Pennsylvania gave birth to American democracy. I want to make sure that Pennsylvania isn't where it dies." And here's one more for you. We heard from Chad Harmon, running for Indiana's 69th House District. Chad is running "to bring proper representation for the people of my district and other small-town districts in Indiana." He's fighting for "improved access to mental health, addiction, education, and other vital government services." **The road to a Democratic majority in Congress and in many state legislatures runs right through rural and small-town America.** That's why supporting these candidates is _so_ crucial, Peter. **[Democratic candidates answered our call – will you join United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?**

clean_body: They're up against the GOP in less than 5 months | | | Hi Peter – We're less than five months away from the start of early voting, and Democrats in rural communities are up against a tidal wave of GOP resources. Our organization is all about giving Democrats a boost and a fighting chance in frontline districts. So we called on Democrats running in those communities, and they answered our call. We heard from Kevin Eckert, who's running for South Carolina's 5th Congressional District in large part because of infrastructure issues. Kevin told us that "The roads stink, a lot of places don't have internet access and there are water and air quality issues. We need better." We also heard from Mark Pinsley. Mark is running for Pennsylvania State Senate, and he's worried about our democracy. He told us that "Pennsylvania gave birth to American democracy. I want to make sure that Pennsylvania isn't where it dies." And here's one more for you. We heard from Chad Harmon, running for Indiana's 69th House District. Chad is running "to bring proper representation for the people of my district and other small-town districts in Indiana." He's fighting for "improved access to mental health, addiction, education, and other vital government services." The road to a Democratic majority in Congress and in many state legislatures runs right through rural and small-town America. That's why supporting these candidates is so crucial, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support. – United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

body:

Did you see what Obama's Ohio Senior Advisor, Aaron Pickrell, said about
our battleground race?

“If the national Republicans are in 100 percent and the national Democrats
are in 20 percent, that obviously makes it a really challenging ordeal.”

National Republicans are giving Ohio their all—and pundits are quick to
dismiss our chances of winning here. That means we're especially counting
on your support.

There is too much at stake to cede any ground to the GOP, folks.

name: John Lira
subject: Who votes against protecting our kids? Tony Gonzales
body:
| Peter, what can I say: this week TX-23 has once again been abandoned by Rep. Tony Gonzales. Gonzales makes a big show of being “pro-life” but yesterday, he voted against HR 7910, the Protecting Our Kids Bill — a bill that would raise the minimum purchasing age for semi-automatic rifles from 18 to 21, bar large-capacity magazines, incentivize safe firearm storage and more. Not only did he vote against the bill, he actually _bragged_ about it. Texas is still reeling from the Uvalde shooting and murders of 21 elementary school students and teachers by an 18 year old shooter with two AR-15- style weapons and over 1,500 rounds of ammunition. Yet Gonzales continues to say “no” to common sense gun safety measures that are supported by the majority of Texans and Americans. **It’s votes like this that prove that Tony Gonzales is unqualified to be a member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the voice of Texas families.** [**Can you make a donation right now to power our fight to kick Tony Gonzales out of office so I can get to Washington and actually do the work of protecting the kids and families in our district, Texas, and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46332151/349804895/-341460045?refcode=em20220609&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEzMDc3Zi0zNmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvlh90cS7ZBcEcGO_f_ScEVBEv5kkAAq52cSK9fMfxQ=) **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46332152/349804896/-341460045?refcode=em20220609&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEzMDc3Zi0zNmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvlh90cS7ZBcEcGO_f_ScEVBEv5kkAAq52cSK9fMfxQ=)** Peter, I am not surprised — Tony Gonzales and other corrupt, hypocritical GOP politicians have sold their votes to gun lobbyists. **The lives of those that have been gunned down and murdered by mass shooters in Uvalde and El Paso mean nothing to him. He will continue to vote “no” on gun reform as long as the money keeps coming in.** Texans deserve a representative who will bring real leadership to Congress. Someone who will fight to protect, support, and represent our families, not line their pockets with NRA money. I’m ready to get to Washington and get things done. I’m ready to vote yes on bills like HR 7910 and fight for sensible gun reforms — universal background checks, Red Flag laws, and responsible gun ownership through mandatory training and licensing to keep firearms out of the hands of those who aim to do harm. **[Make a donation right now to help power this campaign so I can get to Congress and do what Gonzales won’t — fight for the people of TX-23.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46332153/349804897/-341460045?refcode=em20220609&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEzMDc3Zi0zNmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvlh90cS7ZBcEcGO_f_ScEVBEv5kkAAq52cSK9fMfxQ=)** Let’s get to work, John Lira **[Donate name: The Prickly Pear
subject: TONIGHT: Liz Cheney & Co. Go Primetime...
body:
The Jan 6th Committee is a farce and Liz Cheney does not deserve to represent the Republican Party or the state of Wyoming.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/08b6d3a96731501d/35693/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693)

The January 6 House Committee inquisition will be featured on American primetime television Thursday evening, June, 9th. It will be as carefully choreographed as a Super Bowl half-time show. **Wyoming "Republican" Representative Liz Cheney will be front and center.**

As you read news about and/or watch the coverage, consider whether people like Liz Cheney share your values. Should she represent her constituents with an (R) next to her name? **If you conclude (like we have) she is an embarrassment to the conservative movement and to the Republican party,[please support Liz Cheney's primary opponent, Harriet Hageman.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/08b6d3a96731501d/5444851c1bb477bcc3d6b838967d376c/35693)

**We know Harriet. She is a natural leader and fearless American patriot. Please consider supporting Harriet in her effort to represent Wyoming and all Americans in the U.S. House of Representatives. Retire Liz Cheney for good... support Harriet Hageman to represent the state of Wyoming in the U.S. House of Representatives.

body:
But restoring Republican control in the United States Senate will put us on a path to prosperity once again | Friend,

What the progressive Left has done to our country is a shame.

**_Under President Trump and Senate Republican Leadership_** , our country was winning like never before, our southern border was the most secure it’s been in history, and authoritarian regimes and Communist nations __FEARED__ us.

But, in two short years, Biden and his radical Left-wing handlers in Washington have destroyed our economy, flung our southern border open to violent criminals and drug dealers, and have allowed international chaos to erupt throughout the world.

The ONLY way we can save our country from the incompetence of the Left is by **restoring Republican control of the United States Senate** THIS November.

My team told me I should specifically reach out to you before anyone else because **_you’re a true America First patriot_** dedicated to beating the Left this November. _Will you stand with Senate Republicans to SAVE our great nation from the Left?_

name: Roger Marshall
subject: My thoughts on the January 6th hearings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/59fc8b028b06094d/e842cbe423059f41c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — The Democrats’ sham primetime January 6th “hearings” are nothing but a political smokescreen.**

---
The only reason they’re being put in primetime is because Democrats have nothing else to talk about. They can’t talk about the economy. They can’t talk about the border. And they can’t talk about the safety and security of our families. **One of the first things I did in the Senate was stand with then-President Trump for election integrity.** I haven’t regretted it for a second, even though big corporations attacked me and the media tried to cancel me. [**Before their sham hearing tonight — which we know is going to flop in the ratings — will you stand with me again to send Democrats a message? Chip in now >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/59fc8b028b06094d/efb824f244f33888c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---

---
Kansans and Americans care about getting the cost of gas and groceries down, securing our border, and keeping our streets safe. They don’t care about desperate political stunts from the Democrats, and they sure don’t support liberal power grabs like ending the Electoral College or packing the Supreme Court. **I’ll never bend a knee to their political games, and I hope you’ll stand with me. Let’s keep up the fight to hold Democrats accountable and take back the Senate.[Chip in now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/59fc8b028b06094d/f17064826a74b946c3d6b838967d376c/37973) **

name: Dan Goldman
subject: TONIGHT: the January 6th Committee hearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
body:
Peter —

Tonight the January 6th Committee holds their first televised hearing. We will learn more details about the depths that Donald Trump and many Republicans went to in order to overturn the 2020 election. But we will also hear this month that January 6th was the start, not the end, of their efforts to undermine democracy and steal the 2024 election.

As lead counsel during Donald Trump’s first impeachment, I stood up to Trump and the Republicans to protect and defend our democracy. We used a creative and aggressive strategy to prove that Trump was a corrupt president who abused his office.

We need leaders to stand up and fight back. I’ve already been in the trenches fighting for our democracy. And I am ready to lead that fight in Congress.

Join me in the fight by donating immediately:

RUSH A DONATION → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goldman-em-q22022?refcode=em_GLD_FR_J6prehearing_060922_actives_L1&amount=25]

- Dan

DONATE NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goldman-em-q22022?refcode=em_GLD_FR_J6prehearing_060922_actives_EB&amount=25]

Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both.

Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
Dan Goldman for NY
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008

name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu9c6ipkcl4eu1sl1fdum77vk3v9vllj4jh0k578_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrjcdbhm3h3eotkelgm6o3jmlpbedhl66rrccdk65pm0p1gm9i64t316hpm0thgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjbd37mpg6ctb4mdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clgm1o30s5i60oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvchcbt4t5dto7eln7tttcu81md32ba378p17lng_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn0d6ck608l8pkvgvqfs792qp8v9epk323c5aueg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zso2e8lgin38amburup647a7c4kgfstlmu1mpk4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zosq42d8lnt6ftl5mi6b9mcq0osboourddupr638_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvf1gaii34u7nr60kulp6tt5pa9lqqusfak2ppr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm0teov13le8kfsio52ardpmqhpjsmks0rlf5kn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfuu21gvdm083aefcrekf4ogaolv7rmo66f65gi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg9eea4jg0p8p758cr5ent0h5039s2mhgv9n0s9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c3g61ob4c1h2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: Join our weekend of action!
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46322403/349763365/1627778034?refcode=fl_em_ev_20220609weekend_wm_geo_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNlOTQwMy0xNmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yS-A96yKFz3uSm3otTutN2vaQhQrVmONxSRfXr-4jKs=)
---
Friend, We’ve got only 6 weekends left until the end of this primary election. As you probably know, the most recent _Baltimore Sun_ poll shows us firmly in second place, only 5 points behind and rising. **I've been subpoenaed by the January 6th Committee**

Fellow Conservative,

Their witch hunt is getting out of hand. Make no mistake, they’re only coming after me because **I’M FIGHTING FOR YOU!** Because I won’t back down and I fight for the people who elected me trusting that I would spend every waking moment in office serving our Country.

Attack me on TV, attack me in the New York Times but to question my legal integrity with a subpoena?! I’m going to need your help, Fellow Conservative **[Can you chip in $10, $20, $30 or more today to help me defend myself from this vicious attack so that I can get back to doing the job I was elected to do?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d614c40f9f1479b9b51ca5b039dbd1c&_e=gBRxx5rRLRqx1i9lZKKgMvjjbKiFejQWlVOnmclC31KWlYSMTLA0Vhrbfd9PrG84NKQfxJby_TwmEg7e-I2zUL4dV6C1ExsIpFkle8P-y2SaOAGMatyAUm7_dFQYjQ3X9nHVjMZzjkaV1QU0QAmRyrcuIdsHkSNFBtjt7evlyoS1cDcKFMm-V0bhUDrhfFYi3NPqFRPG5B1-g-xI45r_7G0e4o37y7TCq94ChqE91FSmEKj207s79vgR6TdI7ZFq8sK4xxlimyQkCCwLRtVLn1Ilgwo_01E9dHgNKLG1ZzlTzL3cZjmOCVx_xS0nvyPMkJzt8PbsuBmMTxdzZ7YR6eZC9b-6yT3XcpVm99pyv6L0bK34lcIAzRdVecKh_g3V)**

There’s no question why this is happening so close to an election . . . Midterms are in November and THE LEFT WANTS ME GONE.

Well, I’ve got news for them: **I won’t back down without a fight.** But I need all of my supporters to rally together today so that I can show the Left that they’re not just coming after me, they’re coming after the American people that voted conservatives into office.

All they’re trying to do is distract from the real issues at hand. Whether it be inflation, record high gas prices, or moms unable to find baby formula, they want to make sure I don’t have time to do the job the American people trusted me to perform.

clean_body: Raphael Warnock is scared, and he just proved it by launching a new attack ad against me. . | Peter, Raphael Warnock is scared, and he just proved it by launching a new attack ad against me. Peter, I am personally asking for your help to fight back. There is so much at stake in this election. From gas prices to the cost of groceries, along with open borders and crime in our streets, the Biden agenda is on the ballot this November. Senator Warnock votes 96% of the time with Joe Biden, so he can't run on his disastrous record in Georgia. That's why he's now trying to distract voters with ridiculous attacks against ME. With $23 million in the bank, my opponent has enough money to spend over $1 million each week on attack ads from now through Election Day. NEW ATTACK AD FROM RAPHAEL WARNOCK ⬇️⬇️ The polls are a dead heat. If our opponent and the national Democrats weren't afraid of our campaign, they wouldn't be coming after us so hard. But that's why we need folks like you to step up. We need to fight back against these attacks. Peter, every dollar you invest today will help us reach voters to set the record straight. If we don't raise the money to spread our conservative message right now, Raphael Warnock will distract voters with ridiculous personal attacks. Please, I am asking you, help us before it's too late. Thanks so much for having my back, Peter. Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20RAGA?=
subject: On the Map
body:
Marine Corps Veteran Jeremy Gay will restore Law and Order | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=0aa43c8027&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
|
---
| **Friend,_New Mexico is on the map._**

After Tuesday's primary, conservative Jeremy Gay is New Mexico's official Republican nominee for Attorney General.

**Jeremy's mission has always been service -** protecting America as a United States Marine Corps Officer, training federal law enforcement as a Special Assistant U.S. Attorney, and defending victims, veterans and families at his law firm.

_Now, Jeremy is running to serve New Mexico and dismantle the Democrats' dangerous Defund the Police agenda._
---
| [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=0b51c6bfbe&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| While Jeremy faced no Republican opposition, [New Mexico Democrats fought it out in a bitter primary](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=84198bc012&e=edf8a4d16d). Far-left District Attorney Raúl Torrez won his party's nomination despite a surge of violent crime and a [_record number of homicides_](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=8a48608053&e=edf8a4d16d) in Albuquerque under his watch.

Across the nation, activist attorneys and liberal prosecutors are pushing radical policies that put our communities at risk. Americans are waking up to their woke agenda - **and** **we need your support to fuel a Republican Red Wave that will sweep through New Mexico this November.**

[**Can you pitch in $50 or $25 today to help strong conservatives like Jeremy Gay restore Law and Order?**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=0a28044dff&e=edf8a4d16d)

---
| [PITCH IN $50](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=09b226f43a&e=edf8a4d16d "PITCH IN $50")
---
| [PITCH IN $25](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=9176997104&e=edf8a4d16d "PITCH IN $25")
---
| | With Joe Biden's approval rating continuing to plummet, there has never been a better opportunity to flip blue seats red.

Friend, a donation of any amount - [**even $5**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=78d0158298&e=edf8a4d16d) \- will help Rule of Law Attorneys General protect American families.

_[Click here to rush a contribution of any amount.](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=2009f69dbb&e=edf8a4d16d)_

---
| [PITCH IN $5](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=36ee010d67&e=edf8a4d16d "PITCH IN $5")
---
| Thank you,

**_Team RAGA_**

---

[_why did I get this?_](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/about?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=75192dfcd8&e=edf8a4d16d&c=8b4cecc9f3) [unsubscribe from this list](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=75192dfcd8&e=edf8a4d16d&c=8b4cecc9f3) [update subscription preferences](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=75192dfcd8&e=edf8a4d16d&c=8b4cecc9f3)

In the first six months of his term, he has attacked high school students, tried to cut teacher pay, created a chaotic work environment for state employees, denied Freedom of Information Act requests, and attempted to remove books with “divisive concepts” from schools and libraries. His regressive policies and amateur governance have actually lost Virginia jobs. All that said, we’re curious... What do you think about the new administration? Do you approve of Glenn Youngkin’s job performance? | =****** =****** =******** Virginia Democrats are holding Youngkin and his entire administration accountable to the people. The Commonwealth of Virginia is not a business, and Glenn doesn’t work for shareholders — he works for the people and we’re here to remind him of that every day. Thank you for your response and your support, Team VADEMS [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Nan Whaley
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
It’s going to take a big show of support to ensure we have the resources to compete.

Team,
Mike DeWine has made one thing very clear during his time as governor: **He won’t put Ohioans first.**
He didn’t put Ohioans first when he caved to right-wing extremists instead of protecting our communities from the COVID-19 pandemic. He didn’t when he bowed to the gun lobby in the wake of a mass shooting in Dayton. And he _definitely_ didn’t when his administration oversaw the largest corruption scandal in our state’s history.
**[It’s time for a governor who will put Ohio first. I’m running to be that governor, but I need your help before tomorrow’s filing deadline. Chip in right now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46333354/349809896/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220609_2_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RmNzU0My0zOWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ckZVBwcL3IaWPnTxvc1Ovwa3qR1qsNWBVIY-KkncJhI=)**
Mike DeWine was able to become governor in the first place thanks to his own deep pockets and those of his wealthy friends – not on his record. He spent millions of dollars of his own fortune in 2018, and we know that he’s ready to dig deep again.
We don’t have those millions, or the special-interest lobbyist friends he’s spent his entire career catering to. But we do have a grassroots movement ready to build a better future for Ohio, one where working families are the priority – not just the wealthy and well-connected few.
It’s going to take a big show of support to ensure we have the resources to compete, which is why my team set a goal of raising another $15,000 ahead of today’s deadline. **So I’m asking:**
**[Our next filing deadline is _tomorrow_ , and I need your help to hit our goal. Please, rush $5 right now. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46333355/349809898/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220609_2_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RmNzU0My0zOWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ckZVBwcL3IaWPnTxvc1Ovwa3qR1qsNWBVIY-KkncJhI=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

subject: Upcoming Events
body:
This month we have several upcoming events we'd like to invite you to join us at. The meaningful conversations we have about the issues and challenges | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/upcoming-events?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | Hello friends,

Thanks to your tremendous support we became the Republican nominee for PA-17 three weeks ago, and we'll be working hard the next five months to win the general election!

I need your help to win this seat! This month, we have several upcoming events we'd like to invite you to join us at. The meaningful conversations we have about the issues and challenges Western Pennsylvanians are facing is exactly what keeps me motivated each and every day to win this race.

See below for a list of the invites and the flyers -- and if you'd like to host your own fundraiser or meet & greet for the campaign please contact our campaign manager Trevor via call/text (508-826-5135) or email ([Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))). Thanks, and hope to see you soon!
* 6/14 Tuesday, 6-8pm -- Weekly Volunteer Phone-Bank at the Shaffer office (9066 Perry Hwy, Pittsburgh, PA 15237) and RCAC office (100 Fleet St, Pittsburgh, PA 15220) -- RSVP to [AndrewL@pagop.org](mailto:AndrewL@pagop.org?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))
* 6/16 Thursday, 6-8pm -- Meet & Greet with Lori Mizgorski and Ted Tomson hosted by Janet Martha at 132 Emerson Ave, Aspinwall, PA 15215 -- RSVP to [RSVP@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:RSVP@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))
* 6/20 Monday, 5:30-7:30pm -- Fundraising Reception at the Willows (1830 Midland Beaver Rd, Industry, PA 15052) -- RSVP to [RSVP@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:RSVP@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))
* 6/29 Wednesday, 12-1:30pm -- Fundraising Luncheon at the Duquesne Club (325 Sixth Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15222) -- RSVP to [RSVP@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:RSVP@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))

Joe’s recent TV ad is about his commitment to protecting reproductive freedom in South Carolina. With _Roe vs. Wade_ poised to be overturned, Joe’s veto pen would be the last line of defense against a total ban on abortion here in S.C.

With reproductive freedom and so much more on the line this year, we need to make sure we start the general election looking strong, and that means hitting our fundraising goal this week. Can you help us do it?

**Chip in $25 or any amount today.**

**[https://sc.joeisfor.us/a/june22-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46333800/349812003/80455365?amount=25&contactdata=ryD7UffR552QMX31OBlAFmY5qWdhiNHEjMHzdnHLJYoEdzrWU98rcNVUVBCygKXzK8Fj15mS0ndDoQ%2FvZhRkoae%2BpON7BVxnKjGtajs0KQo%3D&source=JC_EM_FR_3MO_20220609_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTg0NWQ4Yi0zYmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WvsP7VdZ5CYzfFRVFfVJcRMhUx6nVpqXb-WHiOQGt0=)**

I believe in Joe and am ready to roll up my sleeves in these final days of the race to put in the work to get him elected—and I hope you’ll stand with us in this fight.

Thanks,

Jade
_Deputy Campaign Manager, Joe for South Carolina_

body:
I wanted to clarify some things for you
| | |
---
Friend, with Marco Rubio launching another round of attacks on my 27-year law enforcement career, I wanted to clarify some things for you:
I answered the call to serve in 1983 because I wanted to protect the community that I loved so dearly.

**I rose through the ranks and****became the FIRST woman EVER to serve as Orlando's chief of police.** And while Marco Rubio was plotting his political career, I was working together with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department and our community to **reduce violent crime by 40%.**
I made the decision to run for Senate because I’m not done protecting and serving Florida’s families – but Marco Rubio and the GOP dark-money machine have thrown MILLIONS into ads spreading false information about my record.
With recent polls showing that I’m rapidly closing in on Rubio, the GOP is terrified that I will win this race. I _can_ win – but I need to hit each of my fundraising goals to maintain my momentum.
**[_Friend, some voters have only heard Marco Rubio’s lies about me, and I need more resources to share my story – _or else this race won’t even be close_. name: Liz Mathis
subject: Hey, it’s GO time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
Hi Peter – it’s Liz.

I just wanted to make sure you saw this email my team sent yesterday. **I am so incredibly honored to be the Democratic nominee for this district.**

I want to thank you and the thousands of volunteers and donors who have gotten us this far. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Fighting to SAVE Clean & Safe Nuclear Power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for
body:
96Peter,

Our nation pioneered thorium molten salt breeder
reactor technologies, back in the 1960s. The promise of producing clean
and safe nuclear power was in our hands.

The Cold War – and the need to
build up our nuclear arsenal – led to the decades-long shelving of
thorium and Uranium 233 (U-233).

In 2001, the U.S. Department of Energy
began destroying our stocks of U-233.

Under the Obama administration,
we transferred our thorium technology to China.

And now, the Chinese
Communist Party is investing in it and preparing to build
thorium-powered aircraft carriers and reactors!

This is insanity. We
cannot leave the future of innovative clean energy technologies in the
hands of China.

As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I’m
taking action to secure our energy future and our national security.
I’ve authored legislation – the Thorium Energy Security Act – to stop

clean_body: 96Peter, Our nation pioneered thorium molten salt breeder reactor technologies, back in the 1960s. The promise of producing clean and safe nuclear power was in our hands. The Cold War – and the need to build up our nuclear arsenal – led to the decades-long shelving of thorium and Uranium 233 (U-233). In 2001, the U.S. Department of Energy began destroying our stocks of U-233. Under the Obama administration, we transferred our thorium technology to China. And now, the Chinese Communist Party is investing in it and preparing to build thorium-powered aircraft carriers and reactors! This is insanity. We cannot leave the future of innovative clean energy technologies in the hands of China. As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I’m taking action to secure our energy future and our national security. I’ve authored legislation – the Thorium Energy Security Act – to stop the destruction of our nation’s U-233 stocks. Now, I need your help to raise awareness on this critical issue and rally the American people to DEMAND ACTION in Congress. - billspu20220607a?utmsource=E-HouseFile&utmcampaign=TubervilleTTube rville-Nuclear-Power-Bill20220607&utmmedium=Email&utmcontent=Tubervil le-Nuclear-Power-Bill&utmagency=PG?moneypledge=true Please make a secure donation to support our efforts >>> We must invest in energy technology. name: Jasmine
subject: My opponent Chuck Edwards voted against our LGBTQ+ youth & families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
---
| | | Below is a longer, personal note about HB755, North Carolina's Don't Say Gay Bill. If you're able to pitch in, [**please click here to make a donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46324077/349770552/-1605508806?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220609_FR_DontSayGayNC_A0_na_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTYxODZmMC0xYmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD-suKgQmdaAxMiWEXX9f3iZpS5cphawZLIqLxeXe44=)
---
Peter,
Last week, my opponent Republican State Senator Chuck Edwards voted to pass HB755 – a Don’t Say Gay bill in North Carolina currently advancing through the state legislature.
This bill is the latest extreme political attack against our community and rooted in the same animus that spawned Amendment 1 and HB2. Republicans in North Carolina have made a target of our community for decades.
I grew up as a gay kid in NC public schools. The only times I remember LGBTQ+ people being spoken about in the classroom, it was with derision or hostility. It made coming out that much harder.
We can’t return to that time, and yet bills like HB755 seek to enforce bans on talking about LGBTQ+ people and lives in schools. The bill would also mandate that school staff out youth to their families, even if the youth are not ready to take that step.
Governor Cooper has pledged to veto HB755, and advocates across the state are organizing to defeat it. But we know that the damage caused by these bills starts the moment they are introduced. They have a chilling effect and they reverberate against the rhetoric of elected officials like Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson who has made a project out of attacking our community.
Now, something else is also true on the ground in NC, which is that support for LGBTQ+ people and equality continues to grow. As more and more people come out, most people in NC have a family member, friend, co-worker or neighbor who is out and whom they love, respect and support.
**While our political fights wage on, I am more hopeful than ever because I know that ultimately we will prevail.**
Like Mark Meadows and Madison Cawthorn, Chuck Edwards’ approach to politics is about dividing us. It’s about attacking LGBTQ+ youth instead of protecting them. It’s about trying to fragment our families, our community and ultimately our country.
WNC deserves a change - someone in Congress who cares about everyone in our district and shows up every day to fight for policies that lift people up and help us move forward together.
I’m running for Congress because we need to do better. The Don’t Say Gay bills being debated in state legislatures across the country are alarming, and we need stronger federal protection for LGBTQ+ rights immediately.
[**Will you chip in $25 or more to help me defeat my anti-LGBTQ+ opponent Chuck Edwards? New polling shows us within a single digit margin of Edwards - this is a winnable race, and it’s going to take all of us being all in to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46324078/349770553/27102520?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220609_FR_DontSayGayNC_A0_na_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTYxODZmMC0xYmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD-suKgQmdaAxMiWEXX9f3iZpS5cphawZLIqLxeXe44=)

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=339%2E5257348%2EiEhc4k ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Republicans are already attacking Adam.

Two of arguably the biggest suck-ups to Trump — Matt Gaetz and Marjorie
Taylor Greene — went on a rant attacking Adam. We are proud that they both
singled out Adam as their least favorite Member of Congress. It’s no
wonder — he holds them and their supreme leader accountable.

In fact, Matt Gaetz claimed he’d rather trim Nancy Pelosi’s toenails with
his teeth than have dinner with Adam.

Classy as always, especially for someone under federal criminal
investigation like Matt.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220609_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=339%2E5257348%2EiEhc4k ][IMG]

Listen, we’re not surprised to see these petty insults from MTG, Gaetz and
hardcore Republicans, because we knew this was their plan all along.

They’re going to do anything they can to try to intimidate us, belittle
us, and distract us from doing our job.

These immature remarks and spiteful attacks are only going to ramp up in
the coming days. The far-right will always use the Fox News Misinformation
Machine to peddle more lies about Adam and smear his name as revenge for
holding Trump accountable.

They may have millions of dollars in dark money Super PACs, but we have an
unstoppable force of grassroots supporters like you who we can count on to
help Adam fight back.

| Peter,

Each election cycle, national Republican and outside spending groups spend enormous amounts to try and unseat Abigail. **This cycle is no different.**

The Congressional Leadership Fund - a PAC dedicated to electing Republicans - _**has allotted $4.2 million to target Abigail.**_ It's no surprise outside spending groups have their sights set on VA-07 given it's a "toss-up," **and we need to respond quickly**.

[_**Will you please consider a $10 contribution to our campaign today so we have the resources to defend this seat?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vfn97amdAkfwR5Rd_7RNH_cUbOSJ2ObCFammXyxhpbg=/eFA-XJrXSWS_7S1CY4yRxaPjSOoKTNa-wNDvLC31Cxw=?refcode=blu-span-20220609-1-EM&amount=25)

clean_body: about the 2022 elections... | | = VERY exciting news, folks – in a few days, we’re planning to announce our first round of target races for the 2022 elections. These races will be the next battlegrounds in the fight to defend our democracy, and winning them will be extremely important to America’s future. We want to invest as much as we can in as many races as possible. And that’s where your support comes in. The more we can raise from online grassroots supporters before the announcement, the more we’ll be able to do in our fight for fair maps. Will you RUSH a donation to help us make the BIGGEST impact in 2022? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = A few months ago, President Obama recognized the work of the NDRC and noted that we’re effective. = With your help, we’ll make the 2022 elections a turning point for our country by helping to elect Democrats who will fight to end gerrymandering and protect our democracy. = Thanks, Amanda = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Friends —
Today, we have FIVE reasons you should chip in $5 to help Mark Kelly win re-election. Check it out:
1. In 2020, Mark won by 2.4% of the vote.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Yesterday the House said ENOUGH!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am writing to talk about yesterday’s House vote on gun safety and to ask you to contribute $3 to help us keep up our lifesaving gun safety work.
#

Friends -
Yesterday, the House of Representatives took decisive action and said “ENOUGH!”
By voting in favor of a comprehensive legislative package to make our communities safer from gun violence, members of Congress made a commitment to prioritize our communities and public safety.
It even passed with the support of a handful of Republicans in the chamber.
The Protecting Our Kids Act, as it is called, is a significant step forward toward protecting our communities from future tragedies.
Now, I am not naive. We have a lot of work to do before we get meaningful legislation passed in the Senate, but I will not give up the fight until we do.
But every year since we’ve started this work, we’ve made progress. And as long as we continue to fight, we’ll get closer and closer to the day we’ve worked so hard for: the day comprehensive gun safety legislation becomes the law of the land.
The stakes are too high to stop. This is about saving lives. But I cannot do it alone. So please:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today? Help us continue our lifesaving gun violence prevention work. We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june22.JkdLIw&refcode=em220609-1-15&t=1&akid=2125%2E3935704%2EMw26j9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-june22.ZjdSX-&refcode=em220609-1-15&t=20&akid=2125%2E3935704%2EMw26j9)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-june22.ZgynR4&refcode=em220609-1-15&t=21&akid=2125%2E3935704%2EMw26j9)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-june22.DHq-xA&refcode=em220609-1-15&t=22&akid=2125%2E3935704%2EMw26j9)**

| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-june22.5060bV&refcode=em220609-1-15&t=23&akid=2125%2E3935704%2EMw26j9)**

****
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2125%2E3935704%2EMw26j9) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
We’re falling short...
Hey Fellow American,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cfe9bdfa36764064884c486a1fa50011&_e=xJfHp_byriTrdcyeB2YhWYaZbrJm2mVEVD404QFsimwJkTr5dfDXE4RHVU7-se1u2yKuCNqDHgJPkuVx51xaKCYg9k-57K0JCLt4-uLqnuHOfV1vMEytoHn8-rX2AvxqjikPUbAmXFVz2sRtoNsghwAaBdh2dCTObmQh06zuQAbPhr9ljWVoBR2gtdOE9ONurfJpo5PsUiAxAq7N0YjFA1Y8LcFoxKV4qjq0R6JAXVkBKHYOcUd52Q17J2xOO_Gu2pBajJfDmSqE74a05xfkAthCPsEuhi8B8qH4AgsjGMHYwDVFLJPX8RnuigkNVKV_w14JedPsmpNd-7Nks6WjoDFrTDJi0ffQes53MqbmR34Qva5x6U89vfox4Jwl3JNK)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cfe9bdfa36764064884c486a1fa50011&_e=xJfHp_byriTrdcyeB2YhWYaZbrJm2mVEVD404QFsimwJkTr5dfDXE4RHVU7-se1u2yKuCNqDHgJPkuVx51xaKCYg9k-57K0JCLt4-uLqnuHOfV1vMEytoHn8-rX2AvxqjikPUbAmXFVz2sRtoNsghwAaBdh2dCTObmQh06zuQAbxActe2fIUivLXVn9_p8txj0mg-uk2GvuL-zMoCSEMGjonRDHdmJkaXsrVhDokQwRlOIt3-N-SSm9fa_eaMQeN2fAEHfqCbjL0BHKONSbNiNN-vUceG97Z94ZDEXLZLa4vZkb5VtT5KkBBVjYh-33l3MDztI0UlVp98cknQo8tgOikGXXJ1d9B23TlGxSaw8CvOtrXWAuSSawxt0Nbk38k)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cfe9bdfa36764064884c486a1fa50011&_e=xJfHp_byriTrdcyeB2YhWYaZbrJm2mVEVD404QFsimwJkTr5dfDXE4RHVU7-se1u2yKuCNqDHgJPkuVx51xaKCYg9k-57K0JCLt4-uLqnuHOfV1vMEytoHn8-rX2AvxqjikPUbAmXFVz2sRtoNsghwAaBdh2dCTObmQh06zuQAb7nF9l3bIFoqNfgarYSCjgMnW5EUIEkAgAw-Cw2NqYomQWn4W5Qq6x7utknuO3rC-oHilMgieGKWO52O5yFusBGXgd4Wz0NvNWmCnNp08DcTuVjhwsNO_C0nOySTRv0rX7H6ZhhXVxHw5YAg1YesHFm4_m2WSe-ZBO32ewQ8VwsAzh0KADBEcnl0HNlbZONdwmDnfnAiNEQT-zq7a_qgcS)
It’s not just me, Fellow American, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cfe9bdfa36764064884c486a1fa50011&_e=xJfHp_byriTrdcyeB2YhWYaZbrJm2mVEVD404QFsimwJkTr5dfDXE4RHVU7-se1u2yKuCNqDHgJPkuVx51xaKCYg9k-57K0JCLt4-uLqnuHOfV1vMEytoHn8-rX2AvxqjikPUbAmXFVz2sRtoNsghwAaBdh2dCTObmQh06zuQAanThlMKtDTqx4Nz00ANfeW2n2ZE0erGUOTFQYo7R68u5rlCUF9ilD9smM4WTyi4-QRBnA26-v0gW3EUl2CLE0bZvnnMVfFI7qASiEkQBJk6TQj0QH388CFa7a7xGhitymBzC0uQYhPIfdxiZrUfjS8rCDul44s4g5Z7_rcQznHq09SiHYY-eM2QUHG99vheF3ikBy7WKUWZoIu_vA0E4y2)

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cfe9bdfa36764064884c486a1fa50011&_e=xJfHp_byriTrdcyeB2YhWYaZbrJm2mVEVD404QFsimwJkTr5dfDXE4RHVU7-se1u2yKuCNqDHgJPkuVx51xaKCYg9k-57K0JCLt4-uLqnuHOfV1vMEytoHn8-rX2AvxqjikPUbAmXFVz2sRtoNsghwAaBdh2dCTObmQh06zuQAYeaz7RkuDdGzixwqdHK07z4OO3xdwKcxKlixWmlMNmzyo9Br6_WzTWaZ5oVrsUPooAlobGyFRD4zRrnp3SXbs7M_f10lp4Ar7y43ml_oNGH70EAbaQNhOI3gKuBAqWgXwTpFDAU-bs-4LLS9d2IVOxEHHvamGOX5tZ4KEHv6wPmJwL8KhrV4aahq1JCmyfq_E78Uc3sklViTGz6GU16G-H)
Thanks,
Ted Cruz

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = ---|---|--- = Thank you in advance for chipping in. I’ll be looking for your name on our list. Alma Finance Director Team Salinas | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

Friends, Time is running out before the July 19th primary election, and according to the _Washington Post_ , **Marylanders are "overwhelmingly undecided" on their vote in the governor's race.**
---
It's a wide open field and as voters start to tune in, they're focusing on crime, criminal justice and electability. **We must ensure that Doug and Candace have the resources to break through the noise and show voters they have the experience and plan to make Maryland safe.** Each donation makes a world of difference in our ability to get up on TV and win over as many undecided voters as possible before Election Day. So we have to ask, [**_team, can_****you pitch in $50 today to help send us to a victory in the critical primary election?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzumNxIRFmmk2BHOu0M9Wf-lSb-7X-wIpeGcJL5SYD-G-_6kKlEMmHY-zrj5ZoJ-hhcf_FgyIuZxx6Miszkl9hxmRZ31qCR9G-OJ8ufx6ZKAGixQa0iI88nCvgK10HiEzlHNehT1EZjLp_rjkxS46MGdmOQqo2Wnl_yk8iu1uKn4X6lhARQbJ-SUmsAGUhu0zNOmIEpIeGUV8ajUXq8QG_vNQy_SvjxBs3I4jjAE-XcUy6ROS4zNZODgX1gX-1hvoZJeHw8pErDFxCndYDw6BhIXkBGtUyJDj7DvFWk1GDHeE2UouQJ0vTfZEBsrvnVR-J6mUyH3qglM4YT-1Dknq79iTKbB0Muc4xFXOBRl6g7rn4/3mr/cBcpDf2aRAuJ4uYzw8TLWg/h1/Uuj9HKoLWzb6RFN0ajnG3Ne8z22l8e6c_Gm-HnJ2PkM)

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: Kyle needs your help, Peter
body:
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554416:6rgNKxoNt:m:1:3253819041:FA479105E3F7F8EC37323BFB5C6BAF9D:r "TMAP")
---
| Peter, this is Kyle's mom, Wendy Rittenhouse.

Todd McMurtry, the attorney behind former Covington Catholic student Nick Sandmann's slew of successful defamation lawsuits, has just joined Kyle's team,_and he'll be getting started with at least 10 lawsuits against prominent figures & companies for maliciously and dishonestly attacking my son._
---
| | | [HOLD THE MEDIA ACCOUNTABLE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554416:6rgNKxoNt:m:1:3253819041:FA479105E3F7F8EC37323BFB5C6BAF9D:r "HOLD THE MEDIA ACCOUNTABLE")
---
| The workload over the next 30 days is going to be massive and to kick things off strong, we've launched a 48-hour fundraising blitz. **[Will you make a contribution now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554416:6rgNKxoNt:m:1:3253819041:FA479105E3F7F8EC37323BFB5C6BAF9D:r "Will you make a
contribution now?")**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554416:6rgNKxoNt:m:1:3253819041:FA479105E3F7F8EC37323BFB5C6BAF9D:r "Fox News Headline")
---
| Over the course of Kyle's trial, Americans from all walks of life came out of the woodwork to help Kyle get justice.

We'll never forget it.

But his freedom cannot be the end. Too much damage was done.

The media & Big Tech in particular have become too big, too partisan and too unaccountable. We must bring them back down to earth.
---
| | | [HOLD THE MEDIA ACCOUNTABLE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554416:6rgNKxoNt:m:1:3253819041:FA479105E3F7F8EC37323BFB5C6BAF9D:r "HOLD THE MEDIA ACCOUNTABLE")

now.")****[48 HOURS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554416:6rgNKxoNt:m:1:3253819041:FA479105E3F7F8EC37323BFB5C6BAF9D:r "The next 48

now.")**

God Bless,

Wendy Rittenhouse

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We’re losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
It’s going to be close...
Hey Peter,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2b97ece6f27842f0a06e3cb61d5c6a7b&_e=vekciEItrmlrhgeBKBh3BIEIeAT7PPac3-o-LbAajY5MEn21iFkWMc8IL2SNEfXjkE74vTFVbufDaCoQ4lDGeFC4sm96D-PJWcWoEUZCOHwV2WjpR7kxlQTt2jJWxDuh1g-VYQLSepI_GofHUlyqAKtBLwP2XnWJqnca4nVjvZU0KYPvXCyt5R9m4PgnWAHzgpeHDAizv9Q8yd7Ncgb3GuD1e3YPzOeeBxdkKPUfNw-G1V7Ssu2wfOHhfpiywbH9L34TEclTWAlBwlJRXzOhcx19j75D26grl5UShWjdOR5ll0JQDOvJZJvnaTWMFXhWMu5XoOdAJH9-Ng4AWJpXMzlT9he70k-Md-9yGOoT2S2L6-bZQUD9xnbTgKJpx_GC)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2b97ece6f27842f0a06e3cb61d5c6a7b&_e=vekciEItrmlrhgeBKBh3BIEIeAT7PPac3-o-LbAajY5MEn21iFkWMc8IL2SNEfXjkE74vTFVbufDaCoQ4lDGeFC4sm96D-PJWcWoEUZCOHwV2WjpR7kxlQTt2jJWxDuh1g-VYQLSepI_GofHUlyqAKtBLwP2XnWJqnca4nVjvZVR2bgJ0YmuqmkQesWPoG0vuZRypKswT_zqcmN5p3cB-I4p3B2gDxduwrNgCzcZUioPTCo3CERHGlVIagEGW1nbSnHSwV6wEjK33n7lfqt0T1-MsfJuo9Jjt2r7txU88-zsBXphwWJ0uk-Iirvvy9rS0YwvP8LP4LBUU3CXsniVSflFQLknfvIS0KIE9Sh_NRUBRqlhr988msIMBCaNqCRS)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2b97ece6f27842f0a06e3cb61d5c6a7b&_e=vekciEItrmlrhgeBKBh3BIEIeAT7PPac3-o-LbAajY5MEn21iFkWMc8IL2SNEfXjkE74vTFVbufDaCoQ4lDGeFC4sm96D-PJWcWoEUZCOHwV2WjpR7kxlQTt2jJWxDuh1g-VYQLSepI_GofHUlyqAKtBLwP2XnWJqnca4nVjvZXmwbFpzWFI7CRNKpu7n40J0CmWecBzo21FvrVSCsJaLa7-fzTTGHoY4FRYyVYEe6bFZv80WvfqmME2-T-ZyGvH_S8qDK3qFx5VKZHiadS0Wocdmn1KBdtuHZXvnIdRcTzcugdFngtOM_5ruhh_pVKknf7oGo47e8KgpkUoXmfnMOQ4UeMi1R82VynadNDqcLezvUSKsAYSCWFCmPoOp_Ux)
It’s not just me, Peter, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. Starting off the month of May with a leaked draft to finishing it up by dangling an overturned _Roe v. Wade_ before the nation, we’re seeing a court out-of-control like never before. So... clean_body: Hung Cao will fight for Virginia| | | Hi Peter, Serving in the Navy was the experience of a lifetime. It taught me perseverance, grit, and love of country like nothing else I’ve ever experienced in my life. To be a Navy warrior is to be a strong American, and that’s why I’m proud of my fellow Navy veterans like Jen Kiggans who are also running for Congress. Just like during our service, the Navy taught us to ALWAYS put the American people first. And even if we don’t wear our uniform anymore, we’re never afraid of an enemy, whether it’s the socialist Left or a terrorist thug. Navy vets are made of the very fabric that makes America strong, and now, we’re ready to be conservative advocates for the American people. We’re ready to take our fighting spirit to Congress to take on the socialist Democrats, but right now, we need your help.
