name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Did you know you were being misled?
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjz1vwyAYhH-NvWEZMP4YGCJV3tKhqtQRvcBLgoqxBbj5-yWVsle65W64u8dKayxQ03rJesb6sV_oPMzD0LkZtRmMoE5wMQtohh4CptIlPE4dvIFYIH-7PRnszL61d7kgd46jXrg2QvOlnwSno7PawQRCQPt1VVfwwcfbO2woU3EqZYU-7FFZzLXRZ-JjPkPJaiQLYUzRNsh7KUdu-KVha1VGcybsHj4mtM_pmqU9vgqqO_aDgClA0s_TNnw9y6aKafjbx-dKXqRtkvZ4-BB8HqfKd9vquT-W8s9vv6H9ado)
---
Friend, if you turn on the news, there's a good chance you'll hear my name. Typically, it’s alongside a dishonest legacy media headline misrepresenting my agenda, insulting the people of Florida, or implying FREEDOM is the latest and greatest threat to America. It is an insulting and absurd way to distort the truth and mislead you, the American public. Their attempts at intimidation won’t work on me though. I am not backing down. Not even a little bit. I welcome the "insults" and the hard work to refute them because I know the importance of strong leadership in a time like this. That is why I’m running for re-election, and I hope you’ll **_[pledge your support for my campaign.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjz1vwyAYhH-NvWEZMP4YGCJV3tKhqtQRvcBLgoqxBbj5-yWVsle65W64u8dKayxQ03rJesb6sV_oPMzD0LkZtRmMoE5wMQtohh4CptIlPE4dvIFYIH-7PRnszL61d7kgd46jXrg2QvOlnwSno7PawQRCQPt1VVfwwcfbO2woU3EqZYU-7FFZzLXRZ-JjPkPJaiQLYUzRNsh7KUdu-KVha1VGcybsHj4mtM_pmqU9vgqqO_aDgClA0s_TNnw9y6aKafjbx-dKXqRtkvZ4-BB8HqfKd9vquT-W8s9vv6H9ado)_** If you’re still hesitant about getting involved, I’d like to remind you what we’re up against. It is evident how far to the left the media has gone by looking at how they define “radical.”
* Allowing grown men and women to assess personal risk and decide to wear a mask or not: **RADICAL**.
* Allowing CHILDREN under 9 years old to make life-altering, sometimes irreversible, decisions about their "gender identity": **__JUST FINE!__**
* Encouraging an educational environment focused on learning and preparing students for the real world: **RADICAL**.
* Encouraging students to hate themselves, their peers, and our country: **__JUST FINE!__**

The stakes could not be higher.

These out-of-touch liberal elites are so threatened by rational thought that they will call me radical for standing with everyday people on the side of common sense and sanity. If that makes me a radical, so be it.

I will always defend our liberty, protect our children, and promote the ideals of our Constitution which make our country the greatest on earth. No amount of intimidation or petty name-calling is going to change that.
_**[>> SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjz1vwyAYhH-NvWEZMP4YGCJV3tKhqtQRvcBLgoqxBbj5-yWVsle65W64u8dKayxQ03rJesb6sV_oPMzD0LkZtRmMoE5wMQtohh4CptIlPE4dvIFYIH-7PRnszL61d7kgd46jXrg2QvOlnwSno7PawQRCQPt1VVfwwcfbO2woU3EqZYU-7FFZzLXRZ-JjPkPJaiQLYUzRNsh7KUdu-KVha1VGcybsHj4mtM_pmqU9vgqqO_aDgClA0s_TNnw9y6aKafjbx-dKXqRtkvZ4-BB8HqfKd9vquT-W8s9vv6H9ado "SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW")**_
From my time in the Navy to my time in Congress, I have always been committed to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children.__
---
[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjz1vwyAYhH-NvWEZMP4YGCJV3tKhqtQRvcBLgoqxBbj5-yWVsle65W64u8dKayxQ03rJesb6sV_oPMzD0LkZtRmMoE5wMQtohh4CptIlPE4dvIFYIH-7PRnszL61d7kgd46jXrg2QvOlnwSno7PawQRCQPt1VVfwwcfbO2woU3EqZYU-7FFZzLXRZ-JjPkPJaiQLYUzRNsh7KUdu-KVha1VGcybsHj4mtM_pmqU9vgqqO_aDgClA0s_TNnw9y6aKafjbx-dKXqRtkvZ4-BB8HqfKd9vquT-W8s9vv6H9ado)
---
I have three children, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies could have on their lives. We have open borders inviting millions of illegal aliens, potential criminals, and thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into our country. At the same time, liberals try to defund our police forces and appoint judges who are soft on crime. We’re experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs at the pump and the grocery store, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion. We have kids – who are just trying to get an education – being injected by the anti-American agenda of woke corporations, woke politicians, and fraudulent media elites who have lost their grip on reality. I will never let these out-of-touch fanatical liberals win. _**[JOIN RON DESANTIS NOW!](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjz1vwyAYhH-NvWEZMP4YGCJV3tKhqtQRvcBLgoqxBbj5-yWVsle65W64u8dKayxQ03rJesb6sV_oPMzD0LkZtRmMoE5wMQtohh4CptIlPE4dvIFYIH-7PRnszL61d7kgd46jXrg2QvOlnwSno7PawQRCQPt1VVfwwcfbO2woU3EqZYU-7FFZzLXRZ-JjPkPJaiQLYUzRNsh7KUdu-KVha1VGcybsHj4mtM_pmqU9vgqqO_aDgClA0s_TNnw9y6aKafjbx-dKXqRtkvZ4-BB8HqfKd9vquT-W8s9vv6H9ado)**_ As a federal prosecutor, I dedicated my time to convicting child predators and removing dangerous criminals from our Florida streets. I continued my mission in Congress by authoring bills that ended the secret taxpayer-billed slush funds members of Congress were using to pay off those who accused them of sexual harassment. Our law enforcement, prosecutors, judges, and elected officials should work to protect us - not to protect criminals. Now, as Governor, I am standing by our law enforcement officers and holding the Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors accountable to keep our communities and our families safe. I took immediate action to end the COVID theater which crippled our nation and focused on empowering small businesses with common-sense tax policies which made it easy to hire American and fuel our Florida economy. _**Florida is in a better place now than it was before the pandemic - and that’s not something liberal governors can say today.**_ I’m also leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous, WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an indoctrination camp. It’s simple: **we’re not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist or they are oppressed.** And we’re not going to force-feed our children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly inappropriate for their age. We will prepare the next generation **for greatness** by teaching real history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do. If all this is “RADICAL,” then Friend, I think you and I have something in common: we’re both _**RADICAL**_. I could use your help continuing what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become an official supporter of my campaign? **_[YES, I WILL: $100](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjztvwyAAhH8N3rB4GIwHhkiVt3SoKnVEmEeCisEC3Pz9kkrZK91yN9zdZ6U1VmMzBEkQIYijBYtJTNPohdvMZBj2jDLBNJiQjq60sbjj3GIwOjVdv30uxo0m78NdMsExstoQ7ynjaHMbcxsmfBZEz5Qtw9dVXXWIId3e9e5kaV6VqlyIOSnram8MFYZUz9iq4nCBhCg8RHlv7aiAXgBZu6ozZ3HjI6Ti7HO6ZyWnV0F3Rz6gNk3D8vO0gK5n21UzgL59fK7wRQoI13s-U-s5Rmgo0h6PEGOofO64t71__UNr_7z6C_sibWE)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $75](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj71uxCAQhJ8Gd1iYP9sFxUmRu0sRRUqJ8ILvUDBYgHOvHy7S9ZF2iplidj6rLFgzQOcVJZQSSeZh4hPn_Ta5FTiIYRNMTMIgTkxwufbZHecaPJhYTfneUgbXQ9q7uwIhibUg6Aoj56xJtnLiRm7YPI2i-7rqq_HBx9u72Z3KddO5aOdDitq60hp9wT6WM9SiJZ4xpXrogrrXehTELogu7YqDM7v-4WN29vm6ZTnFV0FzRzqwgWpw_nlaxJaz7roCYm8fnwt-kSIqzZ7OWFve1mVlj4cPwRc5Ntrb3qb-kdV_Lv0FoeNtQQ)_**
** _[YES, I WILL: $50](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj09rxCAUxD-NuRn8l8QcclgouW0PpdCjGH3uSo0GNd2vX7ew98K7zDDMm59drLGams4vjDBGRjJTKaQQvZOwGWEG6gY-yEEjQXSAXPsMx7kFb3Ssuny7lA30Ju3dfdEzJxsl8zg52dIzcGrlxGATjDpLSfd1VVftg4-3d73DkqtTuSjwIUVlobRGX7CP5Qy1qBHPmDFFu7Dcaz0K4hfE1nYFzJmhf_iYwT5fNy-n-Cpo6kgH1qZqnH-eEvH1rLuqBvG3j88Vv0gRG_WezlibP5AuL_Z4-BB8GadGe9vb1D-y-s-lv2FQbP4)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $35](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj7tuxCAURL8Gd1iYh2MXFJEid5siipQSXV_wLgoGC3D298NG2j7SNDPFzByrLVoYsPOaM87ZyOZhkpOU_Ta5FSWqYVNCTQqIZBBcrn12x7kGjxArlO8tZXQ9pr27aSndwOzIUTFQEiYuVkSnQKrZMgWq-7qYC_jg4_Uddqdz3UwuxvmQorGutEZfqI_lDLWYkc6UczN0Qd9qPQoRr4QvTcXhmV1_9zE7-5huWU7xWdDckQ4KWIHmn4clYjnrbioS8fbxudAnKeEj7OmMteVCdVnb4-5D8GV8abTXvV39I6v_fPoLsUZtVg)_** Make no mistake: this race won't be easy. We know liberals will do anything to win when they’re afraid of the opposition. And they’re VERY afraid of me. They’ve already proven they’ll try anything to keep me out of the Governor’s mansion.
Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida’s election laws are free and fair. **We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks."** I have no doubt they’ll try harder to make sure we don’t outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That’s why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we’re prepared to win whatever battles we face next.
**_[URGENT DONATION: $35](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj7tuxCAURL8Gd1iYh2MXFJEid5siipQSXV_wLgoGC3D298NG2j7SNDPFzByrLVoYsPOaM87ZyOZhkpOU_Ta5FSWqYVNCTQqIZBBcrn12x7kGjxArlO8tZXQ9pr27aSndwOzIUTFQEiYuVkSnQKrZMgWq-7qYC_jg4_Uddqdz3UwuxvmQorGutEZfqI_lDLWYkc6UczN0Qd9qPQoRr4QvTcXhmV1_9zE7-5huWU7xWdDckQ4KWIHmn4clYjnrbioS8fbxudAnKeEj7OmMteVCdVnb4-5D8GV8abTXvV39I6v_fPoLsUZtVg)_** Friend, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. _But I also know that this is just the beginning._ That's why I am asking you for your help now. It’s time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this “radical” freedom we’re fighting for continues for another four years.
In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. _Are you with me?_ **Please donate to my campaign today using this secure _[link](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNjz1vwyAYhH-NvWEZMP4YGCJV3tKhqtQRvcBLgoqxBbj5-yWVsle65W64u8dKayxQ03rJesb6sV_oPMzD0LkZtRmMoE5wMQtohh4CptIlPE4dvIFYIH-7PRnszL61d7kgd46jXrg2QvOlnwSno7PawQRCQPt1VVfwwcfbO2woU3EqZYU-7FFZzLXRZ-JjPkPJaiQLYUzRNsh7KUdu-KVha1VGcybsHj4mtM_pmqU9vgqqO_aDgClA0s_TNnw9y6aKafjbx-dKXqRtkvZ4-BB8HqfKd9vquT-W8s9vv6H9ado)_.** I appreciate you reading my whole letter, Friend. Thank you for your time.
Sincerely,
---

---

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: The general election just started in Pennsylvania

body:
We need all hands on deck to hold on to Pennsylvania in 2022.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46336239/349821775/278639227?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220609-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjRjMmY2Ni00NmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gc4f7Jl235OnWz8f_KqLBvFGGzN8qOvU-H4rpRDUaZk=)

| Peter, it’s Josh Shapiro here, and I asked Susan if I could reach out to you.

I’m humbled and honored to officially be the Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania. The general election starts now — [_**will you join Susan and me, and donate $10 right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46336240/349821776/815265081?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220609-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjRjMmY2Ni00NmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gc4f7Jl235OnWz8f_KqLBvFGGzN8qOvU-H4rpRDUaZk=)

We need all hands on deck to hold on to Pennsylvania in 2022, and I’m ready to work hard with this team to make it happen.

During this campaign and as Pennsylvania’s next Governor, I’m going to take my cues from people in places like Allentown and Carbon County — not from lobbyists or big corporations trying to screw over Pennsylvanians. Because I’m not working for them — I’m working for Pennsylvanians.

We’re facing unprecedented challenges here in Pennsylvania, but I’ve taken on the big fights for the communities we call home — delivering for working families and holding special interests and bad actors accountable.

The fact is, our GOP opponent wants to bring an extremist, conservative agenda to Pennsylvania — and I’m ready to take him on with everything I’ve got.

I’ve spent my career taking on the big and powerful, whether it was taking on well-connected corporate interests to protect health care for nearly two million Western Pennsylvanians, holding accountable predator priests to get justice for survivors after decades of sexual abuse and cover-ups, or standing up to Trump’s election lies in the courtroom to protect our democracy.

As Pennsylvania’s Governor, I’ll keep taking on those big fights. I’ll fight to defend your right to vote, I’ll fight to defend access to abortion, and I’ll fight to defend our democracy — right here in the birthplace of our nation.

[_**Can I count on you to join this important fight? Make a donation of any amount now to support my campaign for Governor and Susan’s campaign in the 7th Congressional district as we fight to win our races this November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46336247/349821783/815265081?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220609-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjRjMmY2Ni00NmU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gc4f7Jl235OnWz8f_KqLBvFGGzN8qOvU-H4rpRDUaZk=)

You know Lt. Col. Vindman from when he bravely testified to Congress during Trump’s first impeachment hearings after he overheard the infamous “perfect” phone call between Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. (The one where Trump tried to withhold military aid to Ukraine...)

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: We’re so freakin’ proud of this endorsement →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The right to an abortion is non-negotiable.
#
Derek, John, Gisele, and the whole team are incredibly honored by our latest endorsement:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220609-1?refcode=em20220609-6152&refcode2=6152_434096_2vACUh&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)
It's an *honor* to have Planned Parenthood’s endorsement in this race. 💗
The right to an abortion is non-negotiable + with SCOTUS preparing to overturn _Roe_ , we need to codify it into law.
[**_Send John Fetterman to the Senate, and he’ll be the 51st vote on protecting safe, legal abortion._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220609-1?refcode=em20220609-6152&refcode2=6152_434096_2vACUh&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220609-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220609-6152&refcode2=6152_434096_2vACUh&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)**
The stakes in this race got even higher last week when Dr. Oz officially became John’s opponent.
Because in addition to being, y’know, a quack celebrity doctor who lives in New Jersey and not Pennsylvania. **Dr. Oz is a staunch anti-choice extremist who said he wants to ban abortion without exceptions for rape or incest.**
Derek, we cannot let someone with such dangerous views even get close to the U.S. Senate.
The right to abortion is sacred, and we *must* do everything in our power to protect it, including flipping this seat and electing a filibuster-proof, pro-choice Democratic majority.
[**_Derek, make a donation of any amount today to help us win this race, flip this seat, and protect the right to an abortion._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220609-1?refcode=em20220609-6152&refcode2=6152_434096_2vACUh&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220609-1?refcode=em20220609-6152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6152_434096_2vACUh&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)**
We’re so grateful you’re in this fight alongside us + Planned Parenthood.
— Fetterman HQ 💗

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220609-6152-footer&t=1&refcode2=6152_434096_2vACUh&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6152%2E434096%2E2vACUh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Safe Guns, Safe Kids bill just passed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220609&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220609&amount=28]
Friend,
I wanted to email with an update from Washington. My Safe Guns, Safe Kids bill just passed the House, along with a host of other gun safety legislation as part of the Protecting Our Kids Act.
The bill is straightforward: it says that if you own weapons and a child could reasonably access them, you’re responsible for keeping them stored safely – and if a child does commit a crime with your weapons, you can be held criminally liable. This is something that most responsible gun owners already do, but surprisingly, it isn’t required right now.
This legislation was directly inspired by the searing experience of representing Oxford, Michigan, a community that lost four young students to gun violence after a school shooting last November. It comes from the very scenario of the shooting, where a student used a gun provided by his parents to inflict such a horrible tragedy.
Across our communities, gun violence takes different forms. It’s one of the few issues that links our urban areas, to our suburban areas, to our rural areas – but what they all have in common is the trauma and re-trauma that sets in after each of these instances. It’s a far-too-common feature of the everyday lives of kids in Lansing, where we recently had three separate shootings over the course of twelve hours.
I grew up with guns. When I was in the CIA, I carried a Glock and an M4 during my three tours in Iraq alongside the military. My husband’s a career Army officer and carried a weapon every day he was deployed. In Michigan, safe, responsible gun ownership is normal. And we still allow hunting on my property. And, it’s precisely because of that experience that I reject the false choice that you either care about the Second Amendment or you care about kids’ safety.
Right now, in the United States, gun violence is the leading cause of death in young people. Think about that.
I’ve been asked what I’m doing to address this at every single event I’ve held in my district this past week. I’ve heard from more hunters, sportsmen, and other responsible gun-owning Michiganders in the last two weeks than I have in the last four years. Everyone I talk to – from all kinds of backgrounds and political affiliations – agree that responsible gun ownership is fundamentally compatible with common sense gun safety legislation.
But here’s the thing: as nice as it is that this bill has passed the House, the real work continues in the senate. Bipartisan senators are working to get an agreement on something that can secure the 10 GOP votes needed to pass into law. At this point, I think most of us will take progress over perfection — and feel the weight of history on our shoulders to do *something* to move the needle to protect our kids.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220609&amount=28]
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

clean_body: Raphael Warnock is scared, and he just proved it by launching a new attack ad against me. . | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock is scared, and he just proved it by launching a new attack ad against me. Fellow American, I am personally asking for your help to fight back. There is so much at stake in this election. From gas prices to the cost of groceries, along with open borders and crime in our streets, the Biden agenda is on the ballot this November. Senator Warnock votes 96% of the time with Joe Biden, so he can't run on his disastrous record in Georgia. That's why he's now trying to distract voters with ridiculous attacks against ME. With $23 million in the bank, my opponent has enough money to spend over $1 million each week on attack ads from now through Election Day. NEW ATTACK AD FROM RAPHAEL WARNOCK ⬇️⬇️ The polls are a dead heat. If our opponent and the national Democrats weren't afraid of our campaign, they wouldn't be coming after us so hard. But that's why we need folks like you to step up. We need to fight back against these attacks. Fellow American, every dollar you invest today will help us reach voters to set the record straight. If we don't raise the money to spread our conservative message right now, Raphael Warnock will distract voters with ridiculous personal attacks. Please, I am asking you, help us before it's too late. Thanks so much for having my back, Fellow American. Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

| | | Peter,
Joe Biden, Democrat politicians, and even some Washington Republicans were triggered by my plan to Rescue America.

_But I’m far from done yet. _

**I’m proud to announce RESCUE AMERICA 2.0 with two NEW sections on _taxes_ and _communist China_. These additions contribute to our plan to SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left. **

We received over 3,000 responses and suggestions for our original plan, and we listened to what patriots across America had to say.

**That’s why today I have released my updated plans to _cut taxes_!**

You’ve been an integral part of our mission to RESCUE AMERICA, Peter, and I’m so grateful for all you’ve done so far to turn our mission into reality.

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Fellow Conservative,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. subject: It’s because of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=4ef69f9f8a&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | We did it, Peter. Thanks to you, our campaign was the top vote-getter — by a nearly 2-to-1 margin — in the CA15 primary.

I am humbled by yesterday’s results. First and foremost, I would like to thank Jackie Speier and everyone who supported and believed in our campaign.

Every donation, every door knock, every phone call, every endorsement, and every vote mattered. I am enormously grateful for your support.

The voters of this district have spoken loud and clear. Our first-place finish proves that voters want an experienced leader to succeed Congresswoman Jackie Speier and a proven legislator with the skills and track record to deliver on the toughest issues of the day, like protecting our democracy, codifying a woman's right to choose, building an economy that works for all Americans, and safeguarding our planet for the next generation.

As we turn our focus to the general election, I want to thank you once more from the bottom of my heart, none of this would have been possible without your support, hard work, and dedication to our movement.

Onward,

Kevin Mullin

P.S.: [We have our next major quarterly deadline at the end of this month, click here to jumpstart our general election fundraising with a gift of $15, $25, or $50 today!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=ed853b9add&e=292fde286a)

With the Republican Party openly embracing fascism, we can’t afford another second of this pathetic weakness.

body:
*** Read this before 8:00 PM (EST) ***
This is Elise Stefanik \-- I'm writing this email as fast as I can!
Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and all their Trump-hating puppets are about to launch their SHAM January 6th hearings on primetime television _TODAY_. **I won 't mince words: it's a WITCH HUNT against President Trump and the MILLIONS of loyal Americans who support him!**
I'm teaming up with Steve Scalise to authorize a [**500% contribution match**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554423:6m6jdxoN1:m:1:3253819041:55B85C50D793449FE0EF91985E033CE6:r) for EACH AND EVERY American hero with the courage to stand with us before these sham hearings begin.
Look, the Liberals cooked up these hearings for two reasons:
1\. To DISTRACT YOU from skyrocketing inflation, soaring gas prices, rising crime, and our crumbling border under the Left's failed leadership, and...
2\. To TRICK YOU into abandoning President Trump and his America First movement
_So what are you going to do about it, Peter?_
[**If you can spare a donation of any size -- even just $5 -- Steve Scalise and I will 500% match you right now: **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60554424:6m6jdxoN1:m:1:3253819041:55B85C50D793449FE0EF91985E033CE6:r)

The televised WITCH HUNT is about to begin, so I have to ask...
Are you going to stand with us in this historic moment, or not? What you -- and every other Pro-Trump American -- do next will be remembered for generations. clean_body: We’re still in this fight. | | | Peter, we are not backing down from this fight. The Texas Democratic Party just approved our request for a recount — with only 281 votes between Jessica Cisneros and Henry Cuellar, we need the resources to make sure that every vote is counted correctly. Henry Cuellar is the only one calling this race. There’s a reason no one else has – the vote is too close to call. This recount is especially important because this is our opportunity to ensure a fresh voice, a pro-union, a champion for reproductive rights who reflects the future of the Democratic party is elected. We are done with the status quo and we are making sure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard. Now that the Texas Democratic Party has approved the recount, it’s going to begin next Thursday and we need your support. Thank you, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Dr. Annie
subject: Why I don’t like Mace or Arrington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| My kids know that I don’t like Nancy Mace and Katie Arrington. They think it’s because of their support of Trump and the bitter battle they’ve been in to get his supporters’ attention, and because they are anti-science.

Those are some reasons, but there’s another: I don’t like them as leaders because they are gun extremists whose policies directly lead to more kids getting shot. And as a pediatrician who’s seen too many kids in the ICU with gunshot wounds, I can’t support politicians who don’t stop this from happening.

[Now more than ever, we need leaders who will take decisive action to protect our communities from gun violence. But I need to know you’re with me. Will you sign my petition today to show me that my supporters are all-in on common-sense gun reform?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328456/349789233/1838503499?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220609_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=Afp7EjCCs+QmH9ojG7LXIAmK9w0y3gu2aPRTVCBWRpeESxpKAeM4TR91COgNgNE7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTc0ZWE5Yi0yYWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xM5ypBhSttljXCH7f3N1QIxsg6IXnOZZaFx6MKC2hg8=&emci=60b93ff3-0ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=8a74ea9b-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529) | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328457/349789235/1838503499?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220609_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=Afp7EjCCs+QmH9ojG7LXIAmK9w0y3gu2aPRTVCBWRpeESxpKAeM4TR91COgNgNE7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTc0ZWE5Yi0yYWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xM5ypBhSttljXCH7f3N1QIxsg6IXnOZZaFx6MKC2hg8=&emci=60b93ff3-0ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=8a74ea9b-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)
---
Our kids shouldn’t have to worry they will be gunned down in their classrooms. They shouldn’t have to know what to do in a lockdown drill in kindergarten. And as a parent, I shouldn’t have to worry when I send my kids off to school that I may never see them again.

I will fight like hell every day between now and November 8th to ensure that SC-1 doesn’t send another gun extremist to DC. That is a promise.

[Please sign my petition to take a stand→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46328458/349789236/1838503499?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220609_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=Afp7EjCCs+QmH9ojG7LXIAmK9w0y3gu2aPRTVCBWRpeESxpKAeM4TR91COgNgNE7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTc0ZWE5Yi0yYWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xM5ypBhSttljXCH7f3N1QIxsg6IXnOZZaFx6MKC2hg8=&emci=60b93ff3-0ee8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=8a74ea9b-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)

— Annie

body:
Here's what you need to know about the January 6 televised hearings: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46337509/349826845/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwMDcxNjI1LTRjZTgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WxoOPy4VKWQS1JNHDo2yKjQh9l5wj15DEfPqXkrKsgA=&emci=b4efd704-35e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0071625-4ce8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

After nearly a year of undertaking a January 6 investigation and who was involved in the insurrection, **the House committee will be holding televised hearings tonight at 8 PM EST/ 7 PM CST.**

Here are some things to know:
* The hearing will focus on laying out a complete timeline, including the events of the 2020 election all the way to what happened AFTER the insurrection.
* By the end of the hearing, we'll know more about the involvement of far-right groups who participated, including the Proud Boys and Oathkeepers.
* With the exception of _FOX NEWS_ (no surprise there), all of the major news outlets plan on streaming the hearing LIVE.

This is a big moment, team. For months we've been sending you flash polls and talking about the importance of the House committee's work, and now, it's time to get a first look at the investigation and what it has uncovered.

We're excited for the truth to come out, and we're ready to see justice served in the November elections. [**Will you help us unseat the Treason Caucus for their involvement in the January 6 insurrection? clean_body: Here's what you need to know about the January 6 televised hearings: Team, After nearly a year of undertaking a January 6 investigation and who was involved in the insurrection, the House committee will be holding televised hearings tonight at 8 PM EST/ 7 PM CST. Here are some things to know: The hearing will focus on laying out a complete timeline, including the events of the 2020 election all the way to what happened AFTER the insurrection. By the end of the hearing, we'll know more about the involvement of far-right groups who participated, including the Proud Boys and Oathkeepers. With the exception of FOX NEWS (no surprise there), all of the major news outlets plan on streaming the hearing LIVE. This is a big moment, team. For months we've been sending you flash polls and talking about the importance of the House committee's work, and now, it's time to get a first look at the investigation and what it has uncovered. We're excited for the truth to come out, and we're ready to see justice served in the November elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Team Never Again ** Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. For generations, people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6 –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. Additionally, Warnock votes with New York's Democrat Senator Chuck Schumer 99% of the time too! The numbers don't lie. So while my opponent may claim to represent Georgia, he votes like he's the 3rd senator from California or New York! It's no wonder that more than half of my opponent's online donations come from the most far-left states like New York and California, but only 10% of his money comes from Georgia. Georgians deserve a senator with conservative values who will fight for them - not California! If we're going to flip a Democrat-held seat and stop the Biden agenda in the Senate, it starts in Georgia. Warnock's campaign may be supported by Hollywood millionaires, but our campaign is fueled by patriotic Americans - LIKE YOU! Sincerely, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: They call me a self-hating Hispanic.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I lost my race for the House by just 6,588 votes back in 2020. I'm running for office once again and I need all the help I can get to win this race I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY3p0AX6MlQynw8X1yzHKKHIQE74av5yCrvmr_jKCsiQnreVMc0g4MEXQewwNKLu7FIZkLmgKSeziY5H5RqocPgeo5IgjMy2bTjBKRXEEjNqqd7KSfJ94Gh5UNNq0KNgWodJBqC_6AlfMwUD5A_wkOovRzUKYOsI31XW6tXSQn3_HuG47EaH1MatRSsOIJviUXdDW65-1fDTLHpYt4fkr4Ds)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Hispanic Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY2yIeWC0nBsoGnFOUg0tBH0Uve9khA3TSB-LQsIkVE0IbKey1q6ltAdWt1o_SPN2fAdm4gkYlFiALX74oQGAuoCbsKhJpdlqqATW_jbIE2LAxlWIwcUnJDxAVBrXIoN2-E3uP4D4jgAPNgbMvKHS7gujKaI5lfLpy7B67_4LAcE2_It4eOL464mLVPyR1gGM7BFdObOcMQZVblfHRVNJnoc)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON HispanicS⇒ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY3rFFWAdfvx8V473UIFHwZ6AkmKSX9sZjfCPeLntlDDjoy6zuzl3dKQBMHFaCz_iUVYpkLMchAx2pkUDk_JXPvDv_sPQLG3KrhRDsa_C6XWrWR1lozxBSUVldMoUm7WgS2DujGD3UrvqcnV67Vq795HNyKS-Uw3qRaJPyMzbQEcR8jWQ4J9kL8XkaLgo6QfWdx8RIsRscBC5p0ZnC1v6FxN)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY3rHhTf0VdW3GUACWz8qnWH-wWYTlxyiE5WNyU4TQDAqbWUiDVLIJaVG8mzBbNWSQIqM4yYSgQUKRIeBE8t-zrtxq5DpxoUhCQtiEpTmaqzMdDlCdekjVrjG2WxOKEsucKRqCp8EjQ8FvdKOr8vj3T85O07HJhOtczSg5vsap5GOvgsYhCPI_vfe34vo5J9CpXxCcIWeNrle1RRSBS2KTlj)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON HispanicS ⇒ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY1x9703KiggPonMA5id0JPr6Qr_dMxf00RwRNBy2AWeSujCYhwmvH5435w6IgLQdytupN1or_cHXfYV2JNnCoZ-LWfRvdj9EE4JxKFgoFByJa3WyK1i0Oiqmw9X6UbX7AwEaDniODrKMN4I3uNzNHGIfyPI5VeFcxHiJyyMYkCHylDAdzAeiL7IpgbjwmviE7V8e1I9VEr-Y-b5ckePIA3e)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY2ovEQeB3_B4HZK9SVk1fLv0ErxlGf9ifIcydXcvFHI5zaqMIpxEFKsnwvMNrnuggINfxOiZTJ5jNPJFiv5zKO4hgcnm55_KGxCAZL_WeSK0l7cAqQI-EQI-di1PMJWr1Sct7DZVAdm1p2YQKuqOlXL5CoC919m1MDAmiEvufLrRVD6cpNfJH_6IDo7hD4CDhbxwuA2jMI-BYJDGwQ-1DoK)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Hispanic Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_e=2oncNkO_10s8AtHBKG3zfh_JYYA1muAuvMnbSqD47toKyoiAGD66cUEFdSKz81GUCgg626wPZs3PnUrsa9Pwz46kxTxkUnWHCxOCQyMagUfUO9CT10gPaDKlTh1AIlbccUj_obejeXDpHpiBAhUt-wTUqrSJlcokuyfzL6XkMpZoPwV8Y0ITtXPmfEzKTITCHMkcz2k6J_SZFmE5ZxXLwykHyJ5gkzOLKrd0T33dvnRde_lSHNFk2VUoBl9FFugV5wSMM3yuLm_lVSW8F-0uU7MemA3wq54p_YG71BwsNY1HamIuT_IDNv-vK1pFISTpGgH7tcyzhMLoNS2S60TYaN35Rb2uiz-w5hQIm78HmvRAQJYY7Hy015vTxWZt1dmRxBNjbdUJTSKWx3GKoBm84Ec9PBFPpjNIxN4zKAAPG53kNwCuWz_OZwgnxTl-LA_s43HBS2A03pN3MhBOqMIXZ-G69UVG7dCqeddVtgCs9P5VEbGNQwqwoM2Sx4cqqIho)

| 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516
Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=7e830a275c4f4f819a35ad656a402f73&_t=2_VfbslYVqYUP5Cg5ZZbMVrcjOQVC-y9T-pFtNInpnA_jeunAyx1u_21aMs07Ti-llkM6tdqEuxik-v7D90bSWbke_ZaWnfOh2mbN4jlMwvBPkRuuIESXIlnyMLc9MVpUmHVoKNpz7UPWUMTWM3ppoXw-azHmbbKHmzLRrbdJOo%3D) Paid for by Monica for Congress

name: January 6th Committee Hearing SHAM via NRSC
subject: The radical Democrats couldn't go ANY lower if they tried

name: Team Schmidt
subject: My plan to improve public safety
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Kansas kids deserve to feel safe in our communities and especially in our schools. The Kansas Legislature has already led the way with commonsense, pr| | |
---
| | Friend, Kansas kids deserve to feel safe in our communities and especially in our schools.
---
[](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2aae17064fc3495ab9852d77fd48aad0&_e=axYu6uTkPUIl8ftVDSl02KXiGGT_J-a--1RJleKZKbLtCGTlv4rZPk86vC7rW1iZjsj-L72ytyXsXv6k5rUN2dj1W0ULBs2bXxmAyuWMntLFLSbzDXm4wWbvyLkzbtkeZfvBpMtTQvNinTGJipFwIuMKW9S-eiIDzMC2EgfzC2HWrc4BxLGktP6bTGAQBSUTNT2LW9lll2lV78BF0mSOHyZjFN7iyc2vDIKZtCk4BZqkL-WEzRbV3cnJQ6o_w-GcIcNEkKwsb8STwn2bHPkUxnz-cd6QmBHa6oZWZo3bsZAlKseUyuH1D-0R_5OGf6rq8cPjuipLwO4OdoeR5fF4q_rSXiVHvaYGiWB3rKjseLE%3D)
---
The Kansas Legislature has already led the way with commonsense, proven programs to make schools safer. We need stronger leadership to keep us moving forward. Kansans have recently seen firsthand how important well-trained School Resource Officers can be for school safety. My public safety plan helps more schools have a School Resource Officer and a Mental Health Intervention Team to protect students, provides funds to assist local school districts in securing facilities, improves our ability to discover threats before they are carried out, and strengthens penalties for gun crimes committed by repeat violent felons. It’s an overall approach that should garner a bipartisan consensus.
---
[**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2aae17064fc3495ab9852d77fd48aad0&_e=axYu6uTkPUIl8ftVDSl02GR5WuC4fWXefHhez3UD7YoG5fYiOPXGsPTXntrHf_U96HWf_aMCcM0bDKlYNcFqrBvnDaEHf2E3JqUCmtCHKFljyeyMfEKt_1HqAjQ_uTZ4RfmE_A9-4DnOQVFcMPtrXRCtOQFF_UqI8Mz0GzWueiJlbAg_-6LA9HNEK2qwesUDnMN1zErzMdsj-BLIxbHjl5ozO45B1jlmclQHFBZ9KD3u-s0LvLzsEYfcAsGzDV9eGAOSzbIDfGHR30alekbSAY1Ncu0d0NGrRdJkCq741XqTWRUMeU6fTYKrY2bxUX8VCqDx4XNA_-UY5q0ZGNJ0A7SLh6FFk41v-aTi15wGkwK1_9OmM-MRtlPhahoiQtvmOhOySRw1auxcoRZ09qeUpLA0w9W-vZ0lj5w74HyFC48CEZUIZavEDvcxJEeTM7amk2_INk9pXWF4Wruqwauzcn7xf5oue1nD69hdSjwHgVRqjAYV5pk8IfgQl0VEtbH9)
---
Here are the six specific points that make up the plan: ✅ Double funding for the Safe & Secure Schools grant program ✅ Hire, train, and retain more School Resource Officers ✅ Provide more mental-health professions for Kansas schools ✅ Seek authority to use existing federal COVID-19 funds for school-safety needs ✅ Promote awareness in schools on Suspicious Activity Reports ✅ Enact the Reduce Armed Violence Act
---
[**PROTECT KANSAS SCHOOLS**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2aae17064fc3495ab9852d77fd48aad0&_e=axYu6uTkPUIl8ftVDSl02GR5WuC4fWXefHhez3UD7YoG5fYiOPXGsPTXntrHf_U96HWf_aMCcM0bDKlYNcFqrBvnDaEHf2E3JqUCmtCHKFljyeyMfEKt_1HqAjQ_uTZ4RfmE_A9-4DnOQVFcMPtrXRCtOQFF_UqI8Mz0GzWueiJlbAg_-6LA9HNEK2qwesUDnMN1zErzMdsj-BLIxbHjl5ozO45B1jlmclQHFBZ9KD3u-s0LvLzsEYfcAsGzDV9eGAOSzbIDfGHR30alekbSAY1Ncu0d0NGrRdJkCq741XqF4WqwdfbZiZ6yhl1WRA3za0bsx47cQ6zQixr3rFQnpCxt34DQ-Z8UdKAsJ4vhjuTCqOArON3kWM_h8Cfe0OfAF4DsA7UII2zrXn5A47JBZTjyVJ4D7eQ2J8r0c70FN-j0tLwVa8Y7ZIF2jFrzq1YCgdsEY2Ke1grbDmVV5uRPMYckJmz0zkuGKU_Grkq53ijDFzwJ-lkV8dvaJfIdpOif)
---
I look forward to discussing the plan with Kansas voters and, as governor, working with the Legislature to enact each provision next year. If you want to read more specifics about the details, visit our website here: [https://schmidtforkansas.com/ag-derek-schmidt-announces-public-safety-plan-to-improve-school-security-and-reduce-armed-violence-in-kansas-communities/](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2aae17064fc3495ab9852d77fd48aad0&_e=axYu6uTkPUIl8ftVDSl02GR5WuC4fWXefHhez3UD7Yooa19egx4zLwG0PxkXKJiJZxD1X55H1Sn4Afhb49Lc2TfpMRRzXzSE-JjjEnpbc5uGUIGl5EX4nn2zSubfCrsfxt0MPPn5KzjyTpmQcMNTy5P0wmuvW8E-jclVz09tU-AIzRTjGsqTpy_gd5SCBXWhT0NjFsD_kcilwLGFN8dJ8ZFDEp8l0QfBjfc39ZAknYGQ9WbkVyfdzZDmwDOqx47By1PqucBY_-9HkCj1Nbq12xU_JCtPw_jwE8nDR-ek62L-xx9hb5LSEIdHF4zafdACPryAPmLwUI5HdMyqdzYfKDOipe_0uXv84E2O4z_BRBxITzrrq36FCV9u091t9ASeylrx9IKq0AOvMW4JL7U4efL6NGgpqHNYflaoArvJHr0%3D) Thank you, Derek Schmidt

clean_body: James Carville says he has "ZERO DOUBT" that I can win | = Peter: I apologize for landing in your inbox again, but this is fantastic news. Legendary political strategist James Carville says he has "ZERO DOUBT" that I can win this battleground race in Florida and expand Democratic Senate control! My race is Democrats' BEST chance to ensure Mitch McConnell remains in the minority, but he and Marco Rubio are already ruthlessly attacking me – and they hauled in more than $100 million last year alone that they can pour into Florida at any moment. That's why it's absolutely essential that I hit my grassroots fundraising goals. I know I can win this. The political experts know I can win. | Team, believe it or not, we’re only five months away from Election Day.

We've got a lot to do from now until November. We have to scale up our voter contact programs, organize volunteers, and continue our work letting Arizonans know just how extreme the AZ GOP is.

With all this going on, we really need to know that we have the support of our grassroots team guiding us forward. We’ll be ready for anything as long as we’ve got our supporters by our side.

**[Team, these first six months of 2022 have flown by and there’s no doubt these next five months will as well. As we look to scale our voter contact programs immediately, we realized we’re still $2,000 short of our goal to fund these programs. Can you donate $10 today to make sure we can scale our voter contact to win in November?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zss2G-YXq5FQVg0V_RomZPRpUBXAMkpqCW1Q0UVvTh8wIrqYe51Z80f-ycGzAP7aplCZj36yPSbgb34HjjaOKZiKKRA75kKx3W4sDL_en5Tb-mYd5ZPgxUsxTvv7mJ0MaNXqc7-bdBIPHZkbXR1zMxfyYzfvlMw3xINCzGXVyBMy_GNVj50rHC0Wx96dzWg8EjVadCE8W1YL4xFj2_ttxDl-ezKS-Ro-5rA6dMNoDw5QATYwORhdOHkKUKzMcvzZpkgxMfcpvw7nC5uNctgJvfTGd5_0KFMxO1q4UnhuLwCGjrSQlW-HtKAlSNKZU7Y6x9i8JslSFlI45ac9nK3vkopl8YkeIUFQgdpgrgPyolgHhEozQ7N0h_uDbQ0YwB9gyW_e_3oyqMxC4mlwKvMkUxuBz50biCNqcnlDSBRjKQ_g/3mr/UujPqyTaSXi-3PgtWAPndQ/h1/xNXlbCBtdZIZXcbxIHyG2CVjQUq4rX6xYYk0b5jBYmE)** [

We started our voter outreach program last summer, because we knew it would be important to counter the AZ GOP’s narratives as early as possible.

Thanks to you, early organizing has paid off for us. But we have to switch into campaign mode and really ramp up all our various voter contact initiatives ASAP.

The AZ GOP may have the money advantage, but as we’ve shown in the past – we can do more with less. We don’t have to match them dollar for dollar, but we do need enough resources for our programs to be successful.

**[Team, we’re evaluating this week whether we can ramp up our voter contact programs right now, or whether we have to wait a few months. Hitting this $2,000 goal will be the difference between starting now and waiting. clean_body: | | | Here's how you can help | | | Team, believe it or not, we’re only five months away from Election Day. We've got a lot to do from now until November. We have to scale up our voter contact programs, organize volunteers, and continue our work letting Arizonans know just how extreme the AZ GOP is. With all this going on, we really need to know that we have the support of our grassroots team guiding us forward. We’ll be ready for anything as long as we’ve got our supporters by our side. We started our voter outreach program last summer, because we knew it would be important to counter the AZ GOP’s narratives as early as possible. Thanks to you, early organizing has paid off for us. But we have to switch into campaign mode and really ramp up all our various voter contact initiatives ASAP. The AZ GOP may have the money advantage, but as we’ve shown in the past – we can do more with less. We don’t have to match them dollar for dollar, but we do need enough resources for our programs to be successful. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let's finish strong, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Exercise for a cause!

body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I invite you to join me for the Fifth Annual Rock The Ride, a benefit bike ride, walk, or run in Napa to help end gun violence prevention. This year, we are excited to share with you that Rock the Ride is back in-person on **Saturday, June 25, 2022.** Save the date!

Rock the Ride was created as a way to use our voices (and our feet) to raise funds for local and national nonprofit organizations working to address gun violence. As we have seen in recent weeks across this country, there are solutions to end the epidemic of gun violence, and those solutions need our collective support.

Our 2022 event will continue to benefit the work of dedicated organizations committed to ending gun violence, and we are grateful to **Alaina’s Voice Foundation** for serving as the nonprofit fiscal sponsor of this year’s Rock the Ride.

We hope you can join us on **Saturday, June 25, 2022.** More information, including how to sign up, can be found here:

**[https://raceroster.com/rock-the-ride-napa-ca](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46337993/349830500/-506155965?refcode=MT_EM_IN_WL_20220609_1_1&refcode2=de2dcd54-50e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTJkY2Q1NC01MGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvZhEJTd5F1D-uPdyqjbs08pg-YzABnI7kFmT4Fq6vk=&emci=fd2c5a57-ffe7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=de2dcd54-50e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2678920)**

Thanks!

Mike

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: NEW PRESS RELEASE
body:
Urgent Press Release Inside

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=1)
---
# **PRESS RELEASE**
Early this morning Michigan Governor Candidate Ryan Kelley was arrested by the FBI in the presence of his children. Curiously, this is 519 days after his attendance at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 and conveniently, right before the media circus covering the hearings regarding that event, one that took the life of Ashli Babbitt, an American Air Force Veteran who, although unarmed, was murdered on January 6th. Fellow Governor Candidate Pastor Ralph Rebandt is appalled at this blatant example of politicization by the left and the deep state. Candidate Rebandt stated, “The left knows no bounds in their attempt to hold on to power by distracting from the abysmal economy, high inflation, high gas prices, and overall ineptitude of President Biden and Gretchen Whitmer.” He went on to say that “our Founders clearly stated that our Constitution was made, ‘only for a moral and religious people, it is wholly inadequate for any other,’ and we are seeing the effects of the loss of our Judeo-Christian moral and religious foundation.” Rebandt believes that the evaporation of those values has lead to an amoral fight for power no matter what the cost. He concluded by stating that “the left has politicized everything including medicine, education, local prosecutors, the media, gender, and even the FBI. They have replaced God with the State and political power. We can not let this happen. I will not let this happen! This is a time for all people with a moral compass, whether Republican, Democrat, or Independent to stand up or we will completely lose our Country. As Edmund Burke stated, ‘The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil, is for good men to do nothing.’ I publicly condemn this outrageous grandstanding, and I am praying that God will expose every evil attempt to silence the voice of American patriots. I am praying for Ryan and his family. May God have mercy on us all.”
##### **SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN**
| [](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/donate?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=2 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/donate?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=2)
---
Thank you for your continued support
Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=3)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=4).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=5) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ryan_kelley_press_release&n=6).

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Personally endorse my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I'm not asking for money
| | |
---
Folks –
**Tomorrow, I'm officially filing for reelection in a race that was last decided by just 1,017 votes.**
And this year, with the Senate split 50-50 and a recent poll showing me down by 2 points, it's going to be even more competitive.
Mitch McConnell and the entire Republican Party are targeting my race because they know the path to the Senate runs through New Hampshire.
This is a critical moment in the campaign.
**That's why I'm reaching out to ask: will you personally endorse me for reelection?**
Since I won my last race by only 1,017 votes, I'm hoping for __at least__ 1,017 grassroots supporters to sign on today. **[I know this may seem insignificant when compared to the GOP's endless war chest but in a race this competitive, having you by my side makes all the difference. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46338281/349832960/1085978106?em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&pc=03264&amOpts=3,10,25,50,100&code=mh-jtk1144-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2UxY2YwNy01MWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iIBZALWmvGYpop_faEljCbL_TSSIfSTcXYreghckKd8=&emci=1333723c-5ee7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f3e1cf07-51e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893)**

**TEAM MEMBER: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**ENDORSEMENT:** **SUBMISSION PENDING**
**DEADLINE:** 11:59 p.m. tonight
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46338283/349832962/1085978106?em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&pc=03264&amOpts=3,10,25,50,100&code=mh-jtk1144-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2UxY2YwNy01MWU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iIBZALWmvGYpop_faEljCbL_TSSIfSTcXYreghckKd8=&emci=1333723c-5ee7-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f3e1cf07-51e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893)
As Senator, I’ve worked across party lines to get results on the top priorities of Granite Staters. And, when the Senate was on the verge of repealing the Affordable Care Act, I cast one of the deciding votes to protect it.
1,017 votes saved health care for millions. And this year, a woman's fundamental right to access abortion is on the ballot.
We can't afford to lose this seat to one of my anti-choice opponents. But I can't win this alone – it's going to take an army of grassroots supporters.

clean_body: I'm not asking for money | | | Folks – Tomorrow, I'm officially filing for reelection in a race that was last decided by just 1,017 votes. And this year, with the Senate split 50-50 and a recent poll showing me down by 2 points, it's going to be even more competitive. Mitch McConnell and the entire Republican Party are targeting my race because they know the path to the Senate runs through New Hampshire. This is a critical moment in the campaign. That's why I'm reaching out to ask: will you personally endorse me for reelection? Since I won my last race by only 1,017 votes, I'm hoping for at least 1,017 grassroots supporters to sign on today. TEAM MEMBER: dpwillis67@gmail.com ENDORSEMENT: SUBMISSION PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. tonight As Senator, I’ve worked across party lines to get results on the top priorities of Granite Staters. And, when the Senate was on the verge of repealing the Affordable Care Act, I cast one of the deciding votes to protect it. 1,017 votes saved health care for millions. And this year, a woman's fundamental right to access abortion is on the ballot. We can't afford to lose this seat to one of my anti-choice opponents. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2022?refcode=060922 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2022?refcode=060922]
Friend,
Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is being introduced across the country, from not allowing trans kids to play sports to Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill and more. As a queer person, this terrifies me. The Minnesota House DFL has been able to hold off new legislation attacking our LGBTQ+ community, but we can’t take this for granted. We need your help. Will you make a contribution to help protect our DFL Majority?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will do through immediately
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2022?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=060922]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=060922]

Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2022?express_lane_other=true&refcode=060922]
We've come a long way in the past few decades to make Minnesota a safer space for the LGBTQ+ community. We still have a long way to go, and we can't afford to go backwards. I, along with your queer friends, family, coworkers, and community members, are counting on you to help us move in the right direction.
Thank you,
Kinsey Stewart

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MX_gvgnsgplPJ-Z9de4X-Zwhjlxu3jsigQvbgXhOhrbdFZEeKAqhdVMgjx-zg1tR_sv_nWOn09B82h-1o0bHV-msf1JtCk7QcvDSD3kK-H7EubUZXgJS9nFg5soPXQK5U7DpmtxMkF5R0xUiH1B5i5dpwJcKlwE4dsnTIANeZIwHQpqwuiWCPQvKOSR1KH6jtMjUdyrwQRDXreJXlxfSsEEp7698xXnuYKx09HeHYJ5ZlJQmC2SUi7ZzJcQlRW8KLA%3D)

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Peter,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MX_gvgnsgplPJ-Z9de4X-Zww6IWPa3ftJ8kdFioQ0ryD9dZeaXEFi-HiExT2aYNRuk5StQCPiRWYky3e53lMgL7q7TSSgDnN3PmQlWr5NE4jxmn76h7gtMw1OCkV-kFl_hJ0zYoWeai7xzXib4lVAdrJR1s8ONLerriCjmSs49x96wSrl0YBzoLyBavG4wVgHtBVcclmwZy4LwNTziJ5nKEfg4P3YVkHpTuQbWtk3cp3AFqyjMFdZevnJLb3P4aC0o%3D)
When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. [**They must not be allowed to continue to serve in the House majority.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MX_gvgnsgplPJ-Z9de4X-Zw2TGUdQ15wNBbfUT3j5RkknxkJvTDcVOwTuEnBR_NZDvSiwFZYSw43nOXX3zHewF0DWOS9WXr3m-XLLUjNecN5BN78SnI1DDc3HBd-iHVswEgPcrgZj9HwfVWu-hLDUJv9oyJBXeKA2dukOHj-KluBSSLO9iuCyVRCpzZp-cMuHBvGx09tKFQf1j-CaQoJqUdKsDozVtAf_NWVC6yY42IWUlUjceCfDmOcrQ48Sjm-4g%3D)

[**Will you make a donation of $5 or $10 or even $15 right now to make sure I’m able to defeat the far-Left Democrat I’m facing in November’s election?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MX_gvgnsgplPJ-Z9de4X-Zw0l-d0H6VlTfDAul3MqGgfV7W4fGa9uuUHKXNuynEehzw-HREIA5qTFZpnGgXBHtVobg4Ei-cPU7iYVsEntVc_GI4HGGoIIGsSasXACzcr2na9xKEkxwqS2vopc0fts6YNc732_VZsY3D0zbOFdPeU1h6es1_ogWTlaU4mFB2CW-RrcNj100mxlAzkItgPIJyjKZ5sA4Dqo53mnUarClqAAOd0SGpjV6NpIfKK8j78eA%3D) I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - **I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic.**

[**I’m in an extremely tight race against a progressive socialist - a race that is sure to be one of the most expensive in the nation, and any gift you can make today would be grateful appreciated.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MX_gvgnsgplPJ-Z9de4X-ZwhNXgsKXmtJnVMRKvY1Igsn9UTL6pmHTZZvRcIhAMrTsWRe8P0S1rEYEafU_hBpVVzfJwuHj45Xe9aiU3gGvj_hRN990y7OkjYt0hNl2aGntxNr6yqPNEXHNRQii4CTHVf3bT10_ph5a9H8nFttGsnm6QPWrDNNqHH3lrJJBGuqjceCkpTbN63TQ6UbwWMW6AdkCniGiYAa2htHbOKPmWEC4CaAJjR6y6MOp-jHQiSw4%3D)

**Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats** [** MAKE A GIFT OF $5 ➞ **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MUvIY8HypByoOeJiT6AQ-ikX14FdhJ6hry0gb8ixenRgf5AZMQQ-4ayeb9XdQs12z4eiOaT96YuIRKt1L3Fc3lJNYNrLaHPB2cnbvMWichdp0fKWV5AQdI3pqY-4Hrf17OPLlDyuULlqojVvw-wjQ3JtYaa0gf3Div_ZmRQQpcGLDU7NXOwnJTmOT5pKVHWEcLNaLFOLk6xlkEMaOlQqY8H68ocV9yXcBZxdAkwxE1Rwu6T2iyH11hlo46UUX698Wk%3D)
What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself?

What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run?

**I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week.**

[**I’m running for Congress and I’d be honored if you would make a donation to my campaign today.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b5ee8f8b540d4239a7070f908b87492d&_e=fzoQ6rfWXqOiHkWvRdRHGwSMUlgFkoSkoVFEqt5pbXZqC0ZVqfearvQh2jVKnMpTIGc3IsiflAzNlUdPSdktWF5nGE6wDklhLBW_W536Cpct4OZr7uGJcIR8GnME5m9B2jIOzGsrSl_YRqfIILb8eXLvxdGXoBK4tHzfx-KOOfO9fq5B7XF9VPCNs6UveMO2Ght0laHCahqwYLDFysb1idiQ1wQXLyJoShXqz5-Y2MX_gvgnsgplPJ-Z9de4X-ZwYbVhTm__0AP2106h_Ka8ms-7LQ0qZO86_lrOSLNqZPL1DGKm7xoFIChNUpnw8tYnLzdp_Y7kgv1hujCL9XJcVMXEZCAO8aHctBqXDUzP4mTrRI9gPN6hkGQy1vu0G-DV-vyRL8MYgrBf5BsZ3NrvNMfaesBBfRkN5WtURc4rBvh8lR63mJPIoUi_Vwl6e2OI8z0sO6av8fJO3f74NaT6cSOC4aYIVyv7z8II9e7sLms%3D)

clean_body: Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Peter, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself? What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run? I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week. And in case you were wondering – 70% of Republicans polled said that they would stay and fight. Thanks for your consideration, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46338513/349840938/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220612photodump_tk_120da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQ4Y2QxYy01NGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVhqAji4CKkUdqnyLU8D9bV1UDQEUVdHYmL2Wzec83Y=)

Dr. Kermit has met with voters in every county in our district — whether it’s one voter or 200, he shows up.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46338517/349840940/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220612photodump_tk_120da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQ4Y2QxYy01NGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVhqAji4CKkUdqnyLU8D9bV1UDQEUVdHYmL2Wzec83Y=)
---
We’ve also learned _a lot_ — Dr. Kermit has met with business owners, union members, and first responders across the district to hear their perspectives.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46338522/349840947/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220612photodump_tk_120da_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQ4Y2QxYy01NGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVhqAji4CKkUdqnyLU8D9bV1UDQEUVdHYmL2Wzec83Y=)

In between campaign events, Dr. Kermit still makes time to volunteer at Placer Veterans Stand Down, providing free medical care to veterans and their families.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46338523/349840950/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220612photodump_tk_120da_xx_img5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQ4Y2QxYy01NGU4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVhqAji4CKkUdqnyLU8D9bV1UDQEUVdHYmL2Wzec83Y=)

clean_body: | = Friends, it’s been 10 months since Dr. Kermit launched his campaign for Congress (and two days since he won the Primary!). We wanted to share with you some of our favorite moments from the campaign trail so far: | = CA-03 has been represented by career politicians for too long. Dr. Kermit is taking his campaign directly to the people to answer their questions and earn their vote. Sometimes that happens to be at the Nevada City Mardi Gras parade! = Dr. Kermit has met with voters in every county in our district — whether it’s one voter or 200, he shows up. = We’ve also learned a lot — Dr. Kermit has met with business owners, union members, and first responders across the district to hear their perspectives. = In between campaign events, Dr. Kermit still makes time to volunteer at Placer Veterans Stand Down, providing free medical care to veterans and their families. = While Dr. Kermit races from event to event, our amazing volunteers are holding down the fort and getting out the vote! None of this would have been possible without our passionate supporters who have talked to thousands of voters — and we’re just getting started! = = — Team Kermit | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. subject: Mark your calendars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Join us at our upcoming events | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/498e7406f497/i-am-running-for-congress-9080218?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=91dd6aaed9&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Friend,

Mark your calendars — Mike Van Someren for Congress has some events coming up!

**Next Tuesday, June 14th we’re hosting a listening session at Germantown Community Library.** Most of us agree on most things, but our member of Congress, Scott Fitzgerald and his party, refuses to act. Whether it’s inflation, crime, healthcare, or climate change, Scott just votes no and points the finger.

**Mike is going to be a different kind of Congressman, who listens to concerns of families, especially those concerned about keeping a roof over their heads, food on the table or even finding baby formula.** Join us for our listening session in Germantown so Mike can hear about the challenges your family is facing and how you’d like to see them handled.
---
|
---
| **Listening session
Tuesday, June 14th | 6:30 -7:30PM**
Germantown Community Library
N112W16957 Mequon Rd
Germantown, WI 53022
_No RSVP necessary — just be sure to come with your questions and concerns for the future of our state. _
**Mike is running for Congress to bring common-sense leadership to Washington.** To be able to help regular folks who are putting in an honest day’s work to get ahead, while ensuring that programs are available for those that need help to get back on their feet.

To get his message out, we need resources to communicate with voters. **Join our hosts Carl and Susan Lock on Tuesday, June 21st at Casablanca in Brookfield for a reception to support Mike’s campaign!**
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=573235f2c5&e=356c0699dd)

---
| [**Reception to Support Mike
Hosted by Carl & Susan Lock**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=845b159b17&e=356c0699dd)
Tuesday, June 21 | 6:30 - 8
Casablanca
17800 W Bluemound Rd
Brookfield, WI 53045
[_Levels of support_](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=b9d5a57b37&e=356c0699dd)
$1,000 | $500 | $250 | $100
_All contributions gratefully accepted_
We need to focus on rebuilding the American middle class, so everyone gets a fair shake. All of us putting in our hours deserve to own a home, raise our families, meet basic expenses, and save for a rainy day.

Scott Fitzgerald refuses to work for the middle class. YOU deserve better.

[We hope to see you at our coming events!](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=d3a7fbca1f&e=356c0699dd)

Holly
